But that’s not even the worst part... All $75 million is being poured into the biggest battleground states of 2024 – Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, Nevada, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin. Friend, I REFUSE to allow a handful of shadowy left-wing billionaires like Soros buy this election in what truly is our LAST CHANCE to save America. Which is why I’ve already instructed our campaign to begin countering the Democrats’ early efforts blow-for-blow in these key battleground states. But I’m counting on patriots like YOU to help ensure our Battleground Victory Fund has the resources to continue fighting back before the FIRST deadline when our fundraising numbers will be compared head-to-head against Biden’s. | | Thank you, | Donald J. But just hours after Biden launched his campaign and only DAYS before the FIRST end-of-month deadline when our fundraising numbers will be compared head-to-head, a shadowy Soros-linked Super PAC pledged another $75,000,000 to BUY the White House for Biden. This is what we’re up against in 2024... Biden and the radical Left Democrats have no intention of running a real campaign. Crooked Joe intends to hide in his basement all while his Department of Injustice persecutes yours truly and Soros’ globalist cabal buys him another 4 years in the White House. But I’m willing to bet patriots like YOU aren’t about to let them get away with it. Friend, with YOUR support ahead of this make-or-break deadline, we will send a clear message to Biden, Soros, and the Deep State that our country is NOT FOR SALE! | | Thank you, | Donald J. | We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections...__... name: Read/Act News
subject: Counter the 1619 Project
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews.-kibwXY8s0tODELOkQ) Dear Fellow American, Thanks for opening my email. I hope you’re having a great day so far. I’m reaching out to share something important with you...something that could expand your horizons. I’m talking about studying American history! As Hillsdale College professor Wilfred McClay explains in our online course **[“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,”](http://trk.readactnews._rSRDhl5rJqTsbWBwI8A)** studying history can broaden your perspective and help you understand different ways of living. Compare that to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” now a multi-part series streaming online. The “1619 Project” locates the founding of America in 1619, the year the first slave arrived on our shores, rather than in 1776, when the **Declaration of Independence declared that all men are created equal with unalienable God-given rights**. According to the “1619 Project,” the key to understanding America is not freedom but slavery—and the project’s main goal is to broadcast this false teaching into every home, including yours. We must counter this false and dishonest historical narrative with the truth. **That’s why we’ve turned our online course,[“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,”](http://trk.readactnews.) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. We produced this course to restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—essential to restoring free government. You’ll be excited to learn that **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which tells people, especially children, that America is essentially an unjust nation—the opposite of our nation’s unifying principles. Today, you can claim a DVD copy of **[“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”](http://trk.readactnews._n07fDByOJZXGw)** for your home library or give it as a gift. **Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty.** Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://trk.readactnews._DSGHjzzIQaWGAm7ee-GA)** Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and for supporting its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01Vice PresidentNational Donor OutreachHillsdale College **P.S.** Despite what _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project” says, our nation’s history is unifying. That’s why we’ve produced a full, unbiased account of America’s past with **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,”** now available on DVD. You can receive your copy with your generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more using this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](http://trk.readactnews.-38t9TAiQxoKQ)** Act today because quantities are limited! Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans. |

name: Gary Sinise
subject: These heroes are counting on you
body:
This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3080b5o4o71eutnlhsokggnm6vbks24quvktoi8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3gm1o74cjh2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8klkagbgg3gcu1mgdhm2ci85a43bnat53rgu2o8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3gm1o74cjh2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5jv9gnedlr79ctjdpdqlp7h973nnq1eugndip78_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3gm1o74cjh2bs)
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z41g2ob5n2kcke09sukl1i69ijj1osqc25qspuk0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3gm1o74cjh2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1nvdheo5pf5rr6g9v60693u5t765g1h07hh9es0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3gm1o74cjh2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfgvb4ka02pl70f3nuj7oqid6ct84g7mljptqjqo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3gm1o74cjh2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp3thk3lf484c5ceb3d8s5m6bfr8dc1an9m8ird0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3gm1o74cjh2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi0i88p3rm1um8f48042c5ifk46ii79r1s75089o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3gm1o74cjh2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsbh1p8v3r41rj45u968ear54qg7dcv2chrcqs1o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3gm1o74cjh2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zun0gkdvalj5dla02772ui78mr1sk6a35tajn0og_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3gm1o74cjh2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

ICYMI News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1ce9g6uq6hc7p3keqdbvlm2pu4vmpcfboamig40_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3gm1o74cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c1ie2pr3cph2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za6shb293phgijjo7k8qr7gacsio0p0vbhchso3o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3gm1o74cjh2bs)_

name: FINAL NOTICE
subject: We lost you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We need to hear from you!

|
---
| | | |
---

Friend,

House Republicans have reached out multiple times, yet we still haven’t heard from you!

We wanted to reach out **ONE LAST TIME** and invite you to renew your 2023 sustaining membership. After today, you will be **REMOVED** from our membership roster.
**You’ve fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.**

---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfkf5iqv4j6im2bd2jesr09vms9hp9o9uuivmd28_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im0or2cjh2bs)
---

Renewing your membership is of critical importance to the future of the Republican party.

**Here’s why renewing your membership for 2023 is so important:**
1. You will be supporting conservatives across the country as they go on offense and bring the fight to the Radical Democrats.
2. You will be supporting our efforts to hold Joe Biden and the Radical Left accountable for their corruption and failures.
3. You will be an essential part of defending our majority and fighting for conservative values.

**[We can’t do it without you. Renew your membership before it’s too late>>>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb0f8ubqrvivfs4m26dk86rfs9nqvis7p04mbk8o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im0or2cjh2bs "We can’t do it without you. Renew your membership before it’s too late")**

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: It's time for revival
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
Fellow American, **Our nation needs _REVIVAL_.** These are dark and trying times for America, and now more than ever, we need to turn to our great God for peace... for hope... for victory. That's why TPUSA Faith has launched our **Kingdom to the Capitol Tour** \-- a series of live worship events in ALL FIFTY STATE CAPITALS over the next several months designed to ignite the flame of REVIVAL in bible-believing Americans across the country! We're traveling from state to state and gathering _tens of thousands_ of believers together to seek the face of our Heavenly Father and invite his blessing on our great nation. And we're praying for the partnership of friends like you as we continue building momentum for this movement. In fact, we can't do it without you! [**As a friend, a fellow believer, and a lover of our great country, can I count on you to partner with TPUSA Faith in this important initiative by making a generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or whatever the Lord leads you to give today?**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-Bsp8jsOXmrbzMiQ)
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._N-i8A)
---
Your generous partnership will enable us to promote these powerful worship events far and wide in our upcoming cities ... to fill local church buildings with worshipers ... and to send an army of believers back into their communities with renewed hope and power to bring revival to our nation when it's needed most. Whether it's the spread of socialism, gender ideology in public schools, the scourge of abortion, or the recent tragic shooting at a Nashville Christian school, you don't have to look hard to see the darkness plaguing our country when it drifts from the truth of scripture. But followers of Jesus know the promises that the Lord has made to the nation that turns back to him. We know that he is gracious to forgive us, and to lavish his mercy and blessings on his people. And that's exactly what we're pleading with the Lord to grant as we seek His face in worship at these powerful events. [**But we can't do it without you. Will you please make your generous and much-needed gift right now?**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.) Together, we can make these the first of many thousands to have their hearts and lives invigorated by these powerful worship events. [**Your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or whatever the Lord leads you to give will enable us to bring hundreds more people to our Kingdom to the Capitol worship events -- until we've hosted one in EVERY state capital in America! -- over the next several months.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-EM4JcCPVIx8Vroj2vwg)
---
[**GIVE NOW >>**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
Right now, we have events scheduled in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma; Austin, Texas; Topeka, Kansas; Madison, Wisconsin; Springfield, Illinois; Indianapolis, Indiana; and many more. These important events, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible by your generous partnership, have the potential to bring the hope of the Gospel to every state capital in America. These are desperate times for our nation. Now is the time to bring God's kingdom near. That's exactly what TPUSA Faith is doing with our Kingdom to the Capitol Tour. [**Will you please pray and give today to help move this mission forward for the glory of God, for the good of America, and for the good of our world?**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._g) Just imagine the national revival that our great God could begin through us! God bless you,
---
Charlie KirkTPUSA Faith
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
Faith & Liberty PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTIwLTA4YzVlODRkM2ZjYjQ4NWViZWIyZmRjNGRiYjc1Nzk1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/wshXUF8OgeXBe3NweG-8HA) to unsubscribe.
---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zipufnh9rf38idpj9qit6799cje2jtrsniv8237g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im0or2c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z69bp3b9nt51lmkfm7gqmsl9ua7hfnks2eo0feho_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im0or2c5h2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk8b4rua0kphd6hjj6415d726oi3ofuffkurfhto_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im0or2c5h2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc1cjlo59b2s8d9uva98jmpu97n7mbocdo994hu8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8o34s5jmepb246h22sh2s8i66o72c3im0or2c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh7g6vtl9teg65h7sb3h4ijolql8h8e3gq84ob90_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im0or2c5h2bs)_

Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 1600 Daily 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Your America
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19653%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=H43DakjSmDTwBr45WXSBMw&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19654%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YDDn5WYCq8gxokc1YUO8Gg&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19665%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fDWxhv5tlOMGfj3DhFQDmw&sysid=1) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19666%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rxlh3aKmpMucXW1nWKiyqA&sysid=1)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19667%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lR9JSoaI16Bes10MdNjGDg&sysid=1)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Your America News
---

name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I’m parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what’s _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next...](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo1hme9kh63gmggik92fuf3p5ph99pgh0kj7p388_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im4ob2c9h2bs "But with that in the rearview mirror, Iâm thrilled at whatâs coming next... ")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3h5iis9nii21d4afkbqmtvkjtlavoqp4o6pbd3o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im4ob2c9h2bs "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It’s an emergency situation and we’re running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren’t going to give us an inch ... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can’t outsmart us when we’re the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znc4ik9m7u9hriro09l6cpi71m6ipl1ebmhn7qrg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im4ob2c9h2bs "Look – if we want to win in 2024, itâs going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. ")**_

That’s why I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it’ll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we’ve ever seen before._

**But that’s a big “if” - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I’ll cut to the chase.

_**[>From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb19rsicspravohc20rh6i8qsgou9r1rqsrr3r00_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im4ob2c9h2bs "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zckhu6vdlrg3ppppvcuho5lgk91al00jeibn6p6o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im4ob2c9h2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl3dr0a424ro93ddps3231hnvm96k94e9t93tqb8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im4ob2c9h2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhhih2hc2b0r4c1lr4hlfhrr660u578op7db2e40_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im4ob2c9h2bs)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

---

name: Gary Sinise
subject: These heroes are counting on you
body:
This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkjekmnnof7p7nejk7uhcavs4sdb6dc08efdgs1o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im4ob2c9h2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z45tvavk1e4dcvr25qhijgcst0ee392gkpq0ktpg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im4ob2c9h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo1p0d5v2808322t45c6fhpiva1mv6ad2j895il8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im4ob2c9h2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp43avavgsb6r379lpmnub258i31sr2rir5hs1j8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im4ob2c9h2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkii1ds0mnagvu575872ff6bbj7nbavooe7bfgr8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im4ob2c9h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze1d07hhj0em157kn9r21rb4b13tt1ak3v0nv430_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im4ob2c9h2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znvg6fm2t257vppp552ngj52to1gcki6lr34faog_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im4ob2c9h2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1grbu249dm6dpdae57p5fh5il6o5gjgqmuo6uao_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im4ob2c9h2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq0u0pj9jhqr3usqmca7268dgdc1ij7bes5vqbqo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im4ob2c9h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za62is5j677c1af744brh90kj1sj0l017dgp4s0o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im4ob2c9h2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

name: Mark
subject: I’m running in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
It is official! I’ve just launched my campaign for Governor

| |
---
| | |
Patriot,

**It is official! I’ve just launched my campaign for Governor to defeat Joe Biden & his handpicked liberal poster boy. **

I’m not afraid to say that I’m a proud Christian, and America First conservative.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665452%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fg%2fRH8wxjrjH5rar2hCJEg&sysid=1)
---

And if you didn’t already notice, I’m a black American.

Joe Biden, the Democrats, and the liberal media will tell you that as a black American, I can’t be any of those things.

They think folks like me can’t think for ourselves. They think we should just fall in line and do as we are told.

And now they want me to just sit down and shut up, and they’ll do anything to destroy me for being a free-thinking man that undermines their sacred narrative.

It won’t be long until they’re running wall-to-wall coverage saying our silent majority is dead. Now, I’m ready for what they’re going to hit me with- but that doesn’t make fighting back any easier.

**So I’m humbly asking you to take just a few seconds today and endorse my campaign right out of the gates.**** **

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665452%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fg%2fRH8wxjrjH5rar2hCJEg&sysid=1)
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO OFFICIALLY ENDORSE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665453%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9Ftee%2fLfgJjg2vQYmNsTuw&sysid=1)
---
Let's show Biden and the liberal media that our movement is strong, and our movement is serious.

Thank you & God Bless.

Mark Robinson
GOP Candidate for Governor
---
|
---

Whether you’ve supported my campaign in the past or it’s your first time reading my email, I wanted to let you know why the last day of April is so important… My end-of-month fundraising deadline is TONIGHT, and I’m coming to you because I need your help. Your support will not only be key to helping us reach our goal, but it will play a pivotal part in my campaign. Here’s the rundown of just a few things your donation will help us do: - Identify and contact voters - Hold town halls, rallies and other events - Build a robust campaign infrastructure - Reach every American with my message - Build field teams and hire key staff https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f56b373038358f80972b0f62cb612146565b10d25cfe7fdfc7d45d197a47d9b999704a5d3f8752834d6a263fe175b70d4b9fed73691d7f39678f8cd930cc0b40 HELP ME REACH MY GOAL Peter, it’s simple. I'm running for President to save our country from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism that has taken hold of our country on Joe Biden’s watch. It’s time to restore American PRIDE and STRENGTH. America is the greatest country in the world, but under Biden’s failed leadership we have too many parents worried that their children won't have a better life than they did. We have too many families struggling to pay for basic necessities like groceries, and too many small businesses finding it difficult to make ends meet. Our streets are plagued by crime, drug abuse is rampant, and our border patrol is overwhelmed. As a mother, daughter of legal immigrants, and wife of a combat veteran, I understand the challenges that everyday Americans face. I have served as governor and UN Ambassador, and I am proud to be a citizen of this great nation. Together, we can work towards a brighter future and ensure that our best days are still ahead of us. We can save our country's future. But in order to do that, I need your help today, Peter. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f56b373038358f80972b0f62cb612146565b10d25cfe7fdfc7d45d197a47d9b999704a5d3f8752834d6a263fe175b70d4b9fed73691d7f39678f8cd930cc0b40 >">It’s now or never: please chip in a donation by 11:59 pm to help me reach my April fundraising goal and save our country’s future. >> https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f56b373038358f80972b0f62cb612146565b10d25cfe7fdfc7d45d197a47d9b999704a5d3f8752834d6a263fe175b70d4b9fed73691d7f39678f8cd930cc0b40 DONATE My very best, Nikki Haley GET YOUR NIKKI HALEY FOR PRESIDENT MERCH A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley is by getting your own Nikki Haley for President gear! All of our merchandise is made in America. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f56b373038358f80d5dd14104137110fca82a9b283c20e5d6a94008f951b0baaf195cc5799d423c947d27418d4088efab34e4c2bcae7820793b6f0726e955e4f >">Contribute now to support Nikki Haley and claim your Nikki Haley for President mug today. >> https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f56b373038358f80d5dd14104137110fca82a9b283c20e5d6a94008f951b0baaf195cc5799d423c947d27418d4088efab34e4c2bcae7820793b6f0726e955e4f https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f56b373038358f80d5dd14104137110fca82a9b283c20e5d6a94008f951b0baaf195cc5799d423c947d27418d4088efab34e4c2bcae7820793b6f0726e955e4f Claim Your Mug JOIN NIKKI’S TEAM https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f56b373038358f8019b3830b2a22966c5be94d76fe34c98ae623b7d074342233eba359a44be405ea5aef5b769333f87a58b18d8396989fb567b43aa2cc32991a Nikki Haley is the daughter of Indian immigrants, a proud military wife, and the mom of two amazing children. She’s served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America’s ambassador to the United Nations…and she’s a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country. Nikki Haley is running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people. In order to build momentum and get Nikki’s message out, we need you on her side. Will you join Nikki’s team and pitch in a donation today? Thank you in advance for your support. Thank you, Team Haley P.S. If you don’t have $1 or more to spare, all we ask is that you take one minute of your time to share this with 5 friends today. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f56b373038358f8019b3830b2a22966c5be94d76fe34c98ae623b7d074342233eba359a44be405ea5aef5b769333f87a58b18d8396989fb567b43aa2cc32991a DONATE Paid for by Nikki Haley for President. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=f56b373038358f80f546d8b21a97f56f6f1ac89f5f296e681d81348f45680ca0e6d2b5c62a72964d316325bad312583bb844cae5bc425a26cc893d9c0f7f04c7 www.nikkihaley.com By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided from each of Nikki Haley for President, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, Team Stand For America, SFA Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. name: American Defense News
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt7tpohiidabckdigjb6q17geamueh83ofdtmr5g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im2oj6cph2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z927deelvq82eb5tjkj8aoommlr9rqmmg67ijmd8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im2oj6cph2bs) [NO](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqf3viil24lg6pcsi8cnc4q15n1s9fc8pdqt0ktg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im2oj6cph2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjcaddtdg9bf4e7g685gonmpdeaf4g2fncsu05ng_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im2oj6cph2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9tvr61okp936pilu7v4buugq92kuhtsack37438_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im2oj6cph2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

---

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcvk68g0pv6151shm9huth7d35vkliap6cjfr6u0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im2oj6cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c1ie2pr4s9h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z06491gomfhqdlh901e0e9f2vrgslopofmkeei30_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im2oj6cph2bs)_

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Do you have a minute?
body:
It is so important that I not only meet, but crush my April fundraising goal.

| |
---
| | Friend,

_John from my team emailed you.

I emailed you.

My husband, Michael, emailed you.

**And now, I’m reaching out _one last time_ before tonight’s deadline. **_

It is so important that I not only meet, _**but crush**_ my April fundraising goal. Right now, people are underestimating me and my campaign (this isn’t the first time) and we must prove them wrong again!

name: Brent Bozell
subject: Major Victory - Don Lemon ousted!
body:
This is another major victory against the radical left-wing activists in the media.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8p4okn118ldkp5uv7at0sjejcdedrfqo05v04c0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32cjh2bs)

Hello Friend,

Chris Cuomo gone!

Brian Stelter gone!

Now, CNN fires Don Lemon!

This is another major victory against the radical left-wing activists in the media.

When I founded the Media Research Center (MRC) in 1987, I saw the writing on the wall back then. I saw the radical leftists control our media, both the news and entertainment, as a means to undermine our republic and promote Neo-Marxism.

The battle is not won yet, FirstName.

I will not rest until MRC completely destroys the credibility of the corporate news. I will not rest until the media are held responsible for their lies and fake news. I want every single American to see the lies told by the media.

With 2024 around the corner, you better believe the radicals in our media are about to ramp up their fake news.

I am urging you to please help me defeat the radical left-wing media.

Can you donate $10, $25, $100, or any amount today?

**Defeat the Media Fund**
---
**Goal: $50,000**
---
**Supporter Status: PENDING**
**Average Donation:** $22.50

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkk8qbdasnmtei1vfh1t2nk2vven1l95feirk4s0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32cjh2bs)
[Donate $22.50 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmmeujauo7ugn3hnebbu73g4aatl60idvat3ls4o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32cjh2bs)
[Donate $50 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z403if9pg4m6k3reu52do5okuqohnnmm261vjdng_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32cjh2bs)
[Donate $100 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkif9n1sfcd69sore8og1b73vuf0oagqc9uqnrig_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32cjh2bs)
[Donate $250 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zih110mgv1b971d2k2p5i4oqtujcdmp5qeies21o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32cjh2bs)
[Donate $500 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbl5j3fr49agvssdg01b0qdlnq49tamh48tc9lr8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32cjh2bs)
[Donate $1,000 >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr8dv5rcpsk9gqkk0ddf2ocs3bhhua5otafeadi8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32cjh2bs)
[Donate Any Amount >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs4ec0vdaj60qgpia0suknf8cmb7igb2fvq49aoo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32cjh2bs)
**_Here 's how MRC has successfully destroyed the media's reputation_:**
* **STEP 1:** MRC records every single mainstream news program. Our staff collects thousands of hours of news coverage.

* **STEP 2:** MRC staff reviews hours of content to find the biggest lies and fake news told by the media.

* **STEP 3:** Using our online network of activists, MRC broadcasts the lies to MILLIONS of people.

Our viral videos are shared not only online but among conservative news sites worldwide. Our stories often create breaking news and help take down radical leftists in the media like Don Lemon and even help bring lawsuits against them.

Our plan works. Since our founding in 1987, 75% of Americans have lost their trust in the left-wing media.

[We must prepare now for 2024. I need to raise $50,000 to expose the media's lies and keep our operations at full steam. Please donate $10 or more today to MRC and help us defeat the media. Click here to donate >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zorb6p4gjr6n20765nk03ddfi7sum18iqnagh8do_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32cjh2bs)

MRC is the only conservative organization fully dedicated to the mission of exposing the left-wing media. No other organization has damaged their reputation.

I cannot do it without your support. Your continued support is critical to our mission.

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

_The mission of the Media Research Center is to create a media culture in America where truth and liberty flourish. The MRC is a research and education organization operating under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code, and contributions to the MRC are tax-deductible._

body:
HER Time PAC [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP46/1/102543/images/HerTimePrimary.png]
Hey Peter,

Sorry to email so early, but I can’t sleep. (And this time it’s not a crying baby!)

I’m wide awake and stressed because my team tells me we’re not on track to hit our end-of-month fundraising goal, which is a huge problem.

We’ve had a very busy month trying to defend abortion access in several different states and protect FDA approval of mifepristone, so I haven’t been as focused on fundraising.

But now that’s coming back to bite me, and we might not raise what we need to keep fighting all year and beyond.

Will you pitch in any amount to help get us back on track? It really does make a difference. Here’s a personal link you can use: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-april2023? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htp-em-april2023?]

Thanks for listening, team.

— Katie

name: Governor Jim Justice
subject: We can’t trust our future to the twoJoe’s
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Justice for U
body:
I’m challenging Joe Manchin because his failure to stand up to Chuck Schumer has put all of us in a precarious position, not to mention bankrupting our country.

|

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgq9lkekl9e5cib1ang7mi37fl7bli4qnrqh9bug_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32chh2bs)

---
Fellow Conservative,

This is West Virginia Governor Jim Justice. I’m writing tonight to let you know that after six highly successful years as governor of the Mountain State, **I’m launching my campaign to be the next United States senator for West Virginia**.

[** STAND WITH ME
HELP ME UNSEAT JOE MANCHIN-> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlngordgtmsphdr4us8u7n9tarvnrpmhnjlooe50_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32chh2bs)
I thought long and hard about whether to enter this race. After a lot of prayer and consultation with my family, the conclusion we kept coming to was that **I must do this not only for the people of West Virginia but for every American**.

The stakes in this U.S. Senate race are high.**** Joe Manchin and I have known one another for a very long time, but I’m afraid I cannot stomach the idea of him serving in the Senate any longer. As much as I like Joe Manchin on a personal level, **as long as he represents West Virginia in DC, Chuck Schumer will continue to rule over the Senate with an iron fist.**

**I’m getting into this critical Senate race because we cannot allow a Democrat from a ruby-red state to play kingmaker in D.C. any longer.**
Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer’s agenda is too disastrous; we must take action TODAY. If you want to see this Senate seat flip Republican,**[can I count on you to chip in $10 to help me unseat Joe Manchin today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd8fvhqjne1p716lkmbj379j4b4gvg4od3f3igq0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32chh2bs)**

[** STAND WITH ME
HELP ME UNSEAT JOE MANCHIN-> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbl7kjp2i252k4k4j6c6behk8u4ca9og1hpneflo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32chh2bs)
**Joe Manchin in the Senate means advancing Biden’s failed liberal agenda every day.**

That’s how we got The Inflation Reduction Act with its 87,000 new IRS agents.

West Virginians don’t need the IRS breathing down their necks,_**nor do you.**_ The voters of the Mountain State have put their faith in me to be their governor over the last six years - **[now I'm asking them, and you, to put your trust in me and help send me to the United States Senate.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjlep6jnvvrvoqvk09vrudi10vb01m03alq0olpo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32chh2bs)**

As West Virginia’s next United States Senator, I will fight for stronger borders and law and order. I’ll defend our energy jobs, cut middle-class taxes, end wasteful liberal spending, **and keep radical woke politics out of our kids’ classrooms**.

BUT - **[without your help right now](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z27lm4m5q80e43oliprfnbrbge37dvavls1jqibo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32chh2bs)** , none of this will be possible. Joe Manchin has more than $9 million in his campaign accounts, and Democrats in D.C. will spend hundreds of millions to defend this seat because they know that without West Virginia, they can kiss their majority goodbye.

Can my team and I count on your support tonight? We need to make a big splash because Democrats are watching. **[Even if you can only chip in $1 right now](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztulp7n3n3ipn78nuu2bjk7vmkbgpsoe36a1smqo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32chh2bs)** , I assure you it’ll be the best investment you’ve ever made.

[** STAND WITH ME
HELP ME UNSEAT JOE MANCHIN-> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj9ouiguss4h0ub8ruuqcl2e79vt2bd8epqq37io_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32chh2bs)
Fellow Conservative, I'm a patriot. I truly am, and our country really means a lot to me. I’m not running out of self-interest. I’m running to serve.

Thank you - **I hope you’ll come along for the ride**.

Sincerely,
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvvd2r3l8phrl7qjp4b4b47th6dv92eogoissdqg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32chh2bs) Gov. Jim Justice
Republican for U.S. Senate

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

[** Join **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zllode6sk1iokr0jta1tn2brjg71riipu8isoea0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32chh2bs)

---

**Join the Conversation:**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcvvkdavef5ba786n6a50ej9applfne7v7up34ko_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32chh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmv3nddk4q3lts8ks2p9c1k74efbn3sekl4j7gco_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32chh2bs)

I’ll defend our energy jobs, cut middle-class taxes, end wasteful liberal spending, and keep radical woke politics out of our kids’ classrooms. BUT - , none of this will be possible. Joe Manchin has more than $9 million in his campaign accounts, and Democrats in D.C. will spend hundreds of millions to defend this seat because they know that without West Virginia, they can kiss their majority goodbye. Can my team and I count on your support tonight? We need to make a big splash because Democrats are watching. , I assure you it’ll be the best investment you’ve ever made. Fellow Conservative, I'm a patriot. I truly am, and our country really means a lot to me. I’m not running out of self-interest. I’m running to serve. Thank you - I hope you’ll come along for the ride. Sincerely, Gov. Jim Justice Republican for U.S. Senate | MEET JIM Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs. Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team. Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog. Join the Conversation:** | Paid for by Jim Justice for U.S. Senate American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: ICYMI News
subject: Don’t let this classic disappear forever
body:
Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoibaoem7jieq21bsmnveae5iurk0jt56bvts6sg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32cjh2bs)
---
This sponsored message from For ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| |
Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name. It’s _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we’re working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America’s greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, “****Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** ”](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zidof9b2g1v2d6kt91lssjj62ipoohsoul19mg50_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32cjh2bs) Twain’s realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I’d like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zse2g78fvh3cepbd0hrumrjvtkrq391pgj0llahg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32cjh2bs).
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn1obv40luue7blprst6pik0bdb9j65kfo2cfj98_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32cjh2bs)
---
| | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** on DVD: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsgbsjbides214elfbrquvpgm8oqaen6s7imqrlg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32cjh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, “All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ ” Don’t let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7nenptttpfsh8eg4cqfu5ds0kpmce4n9njmltl8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c3im6o32cjh2bs)
---

name: Team Miyares
subject: Miyares Weekly Roundup
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
See what the AG and Team have been doing this week in the Commonwealth!
---
| | | | | | | [ ](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=0d62b90321c3f39d7a7c61f4dce4f93c68f9d02a0142009129593be39a92bc554198ffe110e206ed9d3ef9acdea1ba7011ed74667cc8d1bf)

| | | [ ](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=0d62b90321c3f39d0ac57c72294428907d0ba15555cc668e3e80163e9cd4fb70f0cbde03511c852163d51198b5ae118f264854a2451d219c)
---
**This week, we honored the voices of victims and their journey for justice.**
---
|
---
**6th Annual Unsung Heroes Awards**
---
| [](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=0d62b90321c3f39d62bb3e86cd326ff0d71a65c31f8f54dd68aafdf3fa2618b2dce8c79ea0c71886318df67082105229d81f1aab0140fe24)
---
| **Attorney General Jason Miyares hosted the 6th Annual Unsung Heroes Award Ceremony this week recognizing Virginians who provide exemplary service and support to victims of crime in Virginia.**
---
| [](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=0d62b90321c3f39d62bb3e86cd326ff0d71a65c31f8f54dd68aafdf3fa2618b2dce8c79ea0c71886318df67082105229d81f1aab0140fe24)
---
| [](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=0d62b90321c3f39d62bb3e86cd326ff0d71a65c31f8f54dd68aafdf3fa2618b2dce8c79ea0c71886318df67082105229d81f1aab0140fe24)
---
_" Unsung heroes work tirelessly for others, never seeking the limelight, and, instead, serving as a light to crime victims who are often facing the darkest, most unmooring time in their life. Our unsung heroes wake up every morning, not knowing what horrors or pain the day could bring, and go to work because they know that there are victims who need their help. Our unsung heroes' resilience and determination to make a difference in a victim's world inspires me everyday." _ **- Attorney General Miyares **
---
| | [ Read About this Year's Award Recipients Here](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=e0554654d1ff78f22c300f23b08aff1ea88a9c2bfabc4331698bdde10626d174251597f20b5c67aa67fe8ba46d00a8e267c7e05d0db64a60)
---
|
---
**Operation Ceasefire**
---
**On Tuesday, Attorney General Miyares traveled to Lynchburg to provide updates on Operation Ceasefire, an initiative designed to lower violent crime and gun violence by specifically prosecuting those repeat violent offenders while also supporting our youth through community intervention and prevention strategies.**
---
|
---
|
---
**Prior to the press conference, Attorney General Miyares met with federal, state, and local leaders. **
---
| [](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=e0554654d1ff78f2297e4e43b2d51ec2f600f7924181882c792a70e040ee6464b4271f9081f35d7d8bec8c874df58054d6ceeffefef868ca)
---
|
---
| | [Watch the Clip](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=e0554654d1ff78f2297e4e43b2d51ec2f600f7924181882c792a70e040ee6464b4271f9081f35d7d8bec8c874df58054d6ceeffefef868ca)
---
|
---
**Victim Advocate Roundtable**
---
|
---
| **_In Virginia, we 're always working to ensure victims have access to the best support and resources available. _** **Thanks to the victim service group leaders who shared some recommendations this week on how to fill any gaps faced while trying to support crime victims.**
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
**Victim Advocate Luncheon **
---
|
---
| **Continuing Victims ' Rights Week, AG Miyares spoke to a group of victim advocates in Culpeper on Thursday. **
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Thank you to all of our victim advocates for your unconditional will and drive to make a difference by supporting and advocating for those too often forgotten._**
---
|
---
**Amherst GOP**
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Always a great time with our friends from the Amherst GOP! _**
---
| Until next time,
Jason Miyares
---
|
---

name: Kash Patel
subject: This is the most personal email you’ll read today
body:
I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19696%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9n55VZ%2bAs7M95W1nlYsUeQ&sysid=1)

Hello Friend,

I never thought that my own government would spy on me.

I have always loved my country.

That’s why I’ve dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, _good or bad_ , it had to be published.

When I started my investigation, I hadn’t even met President Trump. **But this investigation changed my life forever ...**

_Trump did NOT collude with Russia_.

**My investigation discovered the FBI’s unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it _intentionall_ y to get rid of President Trump.**

It’s why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

Once I found the truth, that’s when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees.

As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters.

I set a goal to raise **$45,000** by the end of the week, and we’re behind in reaching that goal.

[As a personal favor, will you donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount to support these freedom fighters? Click here to rush your support before the deadline >>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19697%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VDaVsbkECapT4API7utJPA&sysid=1)

Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are **innocent** until proven guilty must join together in this fight.

Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system.

**This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution.**

Due process has been destroyed.

**We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. **

[I am humbly asking for your support. Join me in the fight for justice in defending patriots against abuse of the justice system by clicking here >>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c19698%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3TIMn47Iy%2fmZjPdmePaqnw&sysid=1)

Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots.

Whether you’re a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that’s what Kash Foundation is doing.

clean_body: I never thought that my own government would spy on me. Hello Friend, I never thought that my own government would spy on me. I have always loved my country. That’s why I’ve dedicated my life to being a public defender, a federal prosecutor, and a legal liaison to the United States Armed Forces. I believe in the foundational values of America - life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. So when Devin Nunes asked me to help with the Russiagate investigation, I told him whatever we discovered about President Trump, good or bad , it had to be published. When I started my investigation, I hadn’t even met President Trump. But this investigation changed my life forever ... Trump did NOT collude with Russia. My investigation discovered the FBI’s unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionall y to get rid of President Trump. It’s why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are crooks who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news. Once I found the truth, that’s when the spying began... Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help American patriots by offering financial assistance to whistleblowers, veterans, patriots, and some families of Jan 6 detainees. As a former federal prosecutor, I know that we need protection if we are going to expose corrupt government gangsters. I set a goal to raise $45,000 by the end of the week, and we’re behind in reaching that goal. Conservatives, America-First patriots, or anyone who believes that Americans are innocent until proven guilty must join together in this fight. Some of the Jan 6 detainees have become victims of the abuses outlined above, and we cannot leave them in solitary confinement within the D.C. prison system. This two-tiered justice system is a complete sham and a mockery of our constitution. Due process has been destroyed. We cannot let the justice system be hijacked and used against us. Trump and the Jan 6 defendants are only the beginning. The radical left has weaponized the justice system against America-first patriots. Whether you’re a whistleblower exposing deep state corruption, a parent protesting against trans ideology in our schools, or a pro-life activist praying outside of abortion clinics, the justice system can be used against you. We need an organization to defend our supporters, and that’s what Kash Foundation is doing. Will you help me reach my goal by donating today? Please click any link below. Thank you, Kash Patel P.S. The radical left cannot destroy our reputations with the media like they used to. Now, they are assisted by the two-tier justice system. A legal foundation is needed to help America-first patriots with these struggles. I refuse to watch this sham of justice, but I need your help defending whistleblowers and America-first patriots. Friend,
Republican House Oversight Chair James Comer went on Maria Bartiromo's show to say that the Biden Campaign's act of election interference was worse than anything Russia or China could ever do.
_He 's right._
You see, we accept that our enemies abroad will always try to undermine our Republic.

For Biden's campaign to coordinate with former U.S. Intelligence officers and spies to discredit a laptop documenting his family's crimes is an absolute DISGRACE.

_I am saying this so that we are prepared for the future._
