subject: Exposing the Great Reset
body:
This is one of my biggest fights yet.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f01b3bd0e65d4134b7856199a8ac7054&_e=Bhx-PI8F9cXg0TMK8UvC8xLnfofpRgUjbDYpuwkbq6QgeUKbIlE6v3d58bCH89JI7kv1gnP4iPMPFkhOqEkJ7gB_uV68LMCN4pwICHekdwmzA2wl4ou9imTr3YNA2flatKgLjjAV2MU5Bke_TsMhBstw46-FN8D0tE8SjQIRDu6aCoc_KENLNOaVC8Mkeh9NHIhanrwYwKWnlWXOTZeLKj_Gr8SBLl9hH7wyp976cICXW9QwxYtEGCB9TPw9zsEd2Rs2ENfkgMtb7NwuX85ul1yqcGd7YeZrAU7xI7WgKhsvAstfh1xYhIgRiqvECnv5)
---
Friend, This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f01b3bd0e65d4134b7856199a8ac7054&_e=Bhx-PI8F9cXg0TMK8UvC8xLnfofpRgUjbDYpuwkbq6QgeUKbIlE6v3d58bCH89JI7kv1gnP4iPMPFkhOqEkJ7gB_uV68LMCN4pwICHekdwmzA2wl4ou9imTr3YNA2flatKgLjjAV2MU5Bke_TsMhBppjnShuAojzw-sgYcMkXBvZEE9nUUYNKpIcGi-ulpgQ1nLs9nspMh-V00ZbrW9n33JCji42TM6cT7SrjZQGvr9oim6fTJD7QZ_gAxbh59Op_W_8T_76G4hxYC9wihkzFLvYW-avzoyxdFfsoKoYtJEC-EouiTgcHvFieKemmlkr)
---
I wrote a new book, _The American Response to the Great Reset_ , for YOU, and I want to send it to you RIGHT NOW. [**Please claim YOUR COPY of _The American Response to the Great Reset_. All I'm asking for in an exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT (even just one dollar!) to help Turning Point USA cover the shipping.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f01b3bd0e65d4134b7856199a8ac7054&_e=Bhx-PI8F9cXg0TMK8UvC8xLnfofpRgUjbDYpuwkbq6QgeUKbIlE6v3d58bCH89JI7kv1gnP4iPMPFkhOqEkJ7gB_uV68LMCN4pwICHekdwmzA2wl4ou9imTr3YNA2flatKgLjjAV2MU5Bke_TsMhBoQPdhC2FYvzTtL9UNLS9GubXPGBqwrOnBWR5KocEUrhgPaN9YR2VlO6cm7WWzzn0JNFrLccbRlBIm4FMzGhSjP0BA6Wb8eemdqQYpvbdNlmyjyiz7zhltvVma8fyX91g6ZypkKqINSaqu3EEaJb_5423PwvvL_TmtTCzGaF_mWU)
---
[Get your book now](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f01b3bd0e65d4134b7856199a8ac7054&_e=Bhx-PI8F9cXg0TMK8UvC8xLnfofpRgUjbDYpuwkbq6QgeUKbIlE6v3d58bCH89JI7kv1gnP4iPMPFkhOqEkJ7gB_uV68LMCN4pwICHekdwmzA2wl4ou9imTr3YNA2flatKgLjjAV2MU5Bke_TsMhBnGhhtDyVWvxBuLBlGrkEGiLcJFiEGnN2XMTFebl1ovpHE30mDA0mCBVd50PbCEX3Q1PuI9tSxC4TI4zrVPefj6jG6u-Fb8LElHe6C_2Qh3jNcdFvZUhC4dLGGO2Dw-AB1xbQTjf718YQc_mt8ynt0s1u24TjQte_Haex9su4xZy)
---
Friend, I know what it takes to FIGHT and WIN against Leftist "Elites" who hate our country, our freedom, and everything that makes America great. I've dedicated my life to inspiring MILLIONS of young people to love America again and to WIN the American Culture War. **Now Turning Point USA and I are taking on the secretive World Economic Forum (WEF) and their dangerous GREAT RESET agenda ... and I want to reach as many Americans AS POSSIBLE with our important plan to DEFEAT the Great Reset.** [**Because this fight is so important, I am GIVING AWAY my new book,_The American Response to the Great Reset,_ for a gift of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA. Please make your gift and claim your book right now.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f01b3bd0e65d4134b7856199a8ac7054&_e=Bhx-PI8F9cXg0TMK8UvC8xLnfofpRgUjbDYpuwkbq6QgeUKbIlE6v3d58bCH89JI7kv1gnP4iPMPFkhOqEkJ7gB_uV68LMCN4pwICHekdwmzA2wl4ou9imTr3YNA2flatKgLjjAV2MU5Bke_TsMhBhQw6t08LWJQeX3TLiZi8FDajk93X9H2G81K8f0wS_eQN_LZm5KqKSFLJLHq05Y-f5UMzcWBXhsjw2BtGS69MbJfT7TkPj9Fs1L7gISsXrIrUBs2kG0HWnB8llRtpNExzcVArE87vOvrsjg8N1SYGVYKKLRX2EfhlyI7k_hvUvvU)
---
[Get your book now](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f01b3bd0e65d4134b7856199a8ac7054&_e=Bhx-PI8F9cXg0TMK8UvC8xLnfofpRgUjbDYpuwkbq6QgeUKbIlE6v3d58bCH89JI7kv1gnP4iPMPFkhOqEkJ7gB_uV68LMCN4pwICHekdwmzA2wl4ou9imTr3YNA2flatKgLjjAV2MU5Bke_TsMhBuWWDhbGuoF2D6RjuEcFrHbNKukw-kV2JdTxeile4qhWyqFiVW5HhLYb8PIGx7lWZOFcuc1w1pBrO7JgxmRKh5IOdQ4oCvo5_wJhvklkd13iVjfj5j_V4M358XdaakU0h8Q7VPtDBC8dsCu70lN7MvtLh0YdenxfitX_qtzC0I1y)
---
If you've heard of the WEF's Great Reset agenda before or you're just learning of it now ... you must read this book. If you're trying to understand the MASSIVE challenges in America today, from skyrocketing inflation to wide-open national borders to medical tyranny ... you must read this book. It’s about doing right by the American people. And right now, under the control of extreme MAGA Republicans, we have a Congress that’s more focused on political stunts than problem solving. You deserve better, Peter. = But we can’t do it without your help. Now, more than ever, I need to know that my strongest supporters are behind me and will defend our progress. name: Al Franken via Blue Amp Action
subject: 2022 was a hard year to win in New York as a Democrat. Here’s why my friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley can win in 2024.
body:
House pickup
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5024bc0f-ed73-47a0-b32b-fd1048c2f415/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [__](https://default.salsalabs.org/T293b5436-0615-47f0-af10-ffc56a8e0fe7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Dear Person Who Opens My Email, My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley just made a BIG announcement. Josh is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District — a key district to taking back the House in 2024. He ran for the seat last cycle in his first political race, nearly defeating a 30-year career politician and Republican Marcus Molinaro – losing 50.8% to 49.2% in a district where some Democrats at the top of the ticket lost by more than 6 points. Josh will win this time! And I will give you five reasons why 2024 promises to be better than 2022. **[But first, let’s help Josh’s 2024 campaign get off to a great start. Will you join me right now by splitting a contribution of $10 or more between Josh Riley and Blue Amp Action right now? He’s not taking corporate PAC money and he’s counting on individual supporters like you and me, Peter.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T79420c24-051e-4c0c-9245-a46d3787f71d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta42df7d4-45f7-4714-9fa4-cb34a27aa82c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Here are five reasons why 2022 was a seriously hard year to win in New York as a Democrat, and why it’s so impressive Josh came as close to winning as he did:
1. **Redistricting**. Last cycle, the New York State Legislature drew a congressional map that the New York State Courts deemed too partisan — so they threw it out and redrew it themselves. Unfortunately, for five months Josh had been running in the wrong damn district! The only good part is that the working-class town Josh grew up in remained in the newly formed 19th District. But Josh had a whole bunch of new territory in which to make himself known.
2. **Primaries**. Josh had to win an expensive primary challenge in late August against a strong opponent. Still, Josh won the primary by a nearly two-to-one margin. By working his butt off, not that he had much of a butt to start with—have you seen this guy? Beanpole!
3. **Marc Molinaro**. Josh’s Republican opponent in the general election had already been a State Assembly Member, County Executive and GOP candidate for governor in 2018, losing to then-Governor Cuomo. Molinaro gained wide name recognition and had no challengers in his 2022 primary. But now he has a record to run on–and it’s not a good one. He’s voting 95% of the time with Marjorie Taylor-Greene!
4. **Crazy GOP Attack Ads**. Republicans had momentum statewide, and they ran tons of deeply dishonest dark money ads that said crap like, “Josh Riley’s allies want to defund the police.” I don’t know who Josh’s “allies” are but Josh and I funded the police—getting crisis intervention training and bullet proof vests for local police departments across the country. It was completely false, and it was sickening.
5. **Midterm vs. Presidential Years**. 2024 will not be a midterm! Ultimately, too many New York Democrats didn’t show up in a number of races this past cycle. But this time, not only is the presidency on the line – so is the Supreme Court. You can bet Democrats will turn out!

So now that you know how tough 2022 was — and how CLOSE Josh came to pulling it off — are you ready to join me in supporting Josh for 2024? **[Split a contribution to support Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign — he’s going to win one of the most important races in America for 2024 and I want you to be a part of it.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb86d7643-1f44-4f5a-bffc-242e38579179/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thanks, Al [**P.S. I like the P.S. because it’s one more opportunity to ask for a donation. So donate now!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1f13c135-fd07-487f-aa0e-1069b0f26eda/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9e9f9005-be96-4de7-8328-761cc2ead71c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Tell Chase to OPPOSE toxic plastics plant
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1748657?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Stop the 2,400-ACRE, MEGA-POLLUTING petrochemical factory in _CANCER ALLEY_ before it’s built! [_Act now!_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1748658?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** We can’t trust the company that wants to build this plant, Friend. In the past, Formosa Plastics had to pay MILLIONS in fines for **injuring workers** and **endangering public health** after a series of _**EXPLOSIONS, FIRES, and TOXIC CHEMICAL RELEASES**_ at its plant in Texas. Now, Formosa Plastics wants to build a new MONSTROUS petrochemical factory that would release so much pollution that it’s not even allowed to operate in Taiwan, **where its headquarters are located.** Formosa can’t be trusted in Texas. **Formosa can’t be trusted in Taiwan. Formosa DEFINITELY CAN’T BE TRUSTED in Cancer Alley,** where hundreds of thousands of Louisianans already suffer from 200+ existing toxic facilities. But JP Morgan Chase, the largest bank in the U.S., might trust Formosa enough to support the factory, inviting **_TOXIC WASTE and POLLUTION_** into this predominately Black community. **This dirty project NEEDS backing from financial institutions like Chase -- you can help make sure that doesn’t happen.[Friend, will you demand Chase Bank OPPOSES putting another toxic plant in Cancer Alley? We need 1,938 more signatures by 11:59 pm TONIGHT! >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1748659?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1748660?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The greed of companies like Formosa Plastics is taking a heavy toll on our communities, wildlife, and the entire planet. **Rampant plastics production and pollution is contaminating our air, food, and water with microplastics.** The average person consumes a **_CREDIT CARD-SIZED_** amount of plastic every week!
Our oceans are hurting too. Drifting plastic can end up in fish stomachs, entangle whales, or even **CHOKE UNSUSPECTING ANIMALS TO DEATH** , like sea turtles. Scientists estimate there could be **MORE PLASTIC THAN FISH** in the ocean by 2050.
The plastic apocalypse is getting worse, Friend. And communities like those in Cancer Alley are ground zero, feeling the impacts first and the worst. That’s why it’s absolutely critical we STOP the proposed Formosa Plastics plant before it’s too late. **Demanding Chase leave Formosa Plastics high and dry is one way YOU can help.[Please, Friend, don’t let Cancer Alley face more toxic pollution!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1748661?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1748660?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans and vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: What Hemingway said
body:
You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story.

| | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c2e7cc04ccb41469583a29397b76b18&_e=XBnzGjhJU4MlHtmCgVFjwEmSSNx34YgyH94lS7OB0uobAs2UrVCjiQRPBhnGJiXkaCYmlSvSUOGex4mU0BoMTU-qGEqMEGvZHGsqyIsvntamxyczZotCcLRIAPRWQBRp5kPKgEhXRPiHPfRFNR0OGgwb41QHH-Vpa6nSy-EK6JxGR6oVYlL2ieSukfhVkrkbrJfvAnht23AJBNEyhM7I-fX0dhnf9iCIuASE1decaMbl1S73EizME29nMCRgUXEpPJsXNeytuEGVDGwFSUpV35PXuPThlqgUIoA1ClGwIhJSR3_sQgUIpXk25S7JV2KWK328krvB6faUtO_MO42PcUoO5QNwwDYhp11tx-qszz6DkikC_HXbJ0gUYaqjxUAW2-z5n0I79ESGGKvMRSUhGQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven't read the book, you know the name. It's _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we're working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America 's greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, "****Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer**_**, **_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** "](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c2e7cc04ccb41469583a29397b76b18&_e=XBnzGjhJU4MlHtmCgVFjwEmSSNx34YgyH94lS7OB0uobAs2UrVCjiQRPBhnGJiXkaCYmlSvSUOGex4mU0BoMTU-qGEqMEGvZHGsqyIsvntamxyczZotCcLRIAPRWQBRp5kPKgEhXRPiHPfRFNR0OGgwb41QHH-Vpa6nSy-EK6JxGR6oVYlL2ieSukfhVkrkbrJfvAnht23AJBNEyhM7I-fX0dhnf9iCIuASE1decaMbl1S73EizME29nMCRgUXEpeG5MgVFZOcfAfrNyupTCdExCzp2t4er812TKQpvrG6pAAZLa0x_X_5_2epfNjGGNtE7FBYxxrpVNdcqCftbgt891qRrh7kEjJgvz5EqnimZXY8tj4rr8VaqThjLii71p9lTGNkA55uuO7r95a7CINQ%3D%3D) Twain's realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I 'd like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c2e7cc04ccb41469583a29397b76b18&_e=XBnzGjhJU4MlHtmCgVFjwEmSSNx34YgyH94lS7OB0uobAs2UrVCjiQRPBhnGJiXkaCYmlSvSUOGex4mU0BoMTU-qGEqMEGvZHGsqyIsvntamxyczZotCcLRIAPRWQBRp5kPKgEhXRPiHPfRFNR0OGgwb41QHH-Vpa6nSy-EK6JxGR6oVYlL2ieSukfhVkrkbrJfvAnht23AJBNEyhM7I-fX0dhnf9iCIuASE1decaMbl1S73EizME29nMCRgUXEp100AWpyNg2l2P2w66Mspa6RcZXazACUjgLqM1HupgjmGzv3Kijzz4J23mi0HuyKR8m3JZOVKRRBYUx0eq4IAknbVo0LKOlRF7Bqp6BGEZObeBflWZU7-3TbyTZE0RWqZp4PE7GzALthU35G0MU9L2g%3D%3D).

body:

I need patriots I can trust, Friend.

My Senate Republican colleagues and I just left a BIG 2024 Election meeting, but we ran into a problem - we needed more up-to-date information to make better strategic decisions.

I'm entrusting YOU with completing the **[Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=688907d59e05459fa2feb051ae97ad85&_e=xnFkW3dEArUpwYepK_E2kxAbU0iw23vitLRn2BKOBOzglesps4dX6eiIoWppcitTmznUnxmz9sXWBL_g-fdC2kMXKHclTLvkekYkVk4nPt4c2x8PEZb3jjPikZpUGUKa4DFugDVhFQ8gv9PLcrjcIcgNC3KuROIt5Eo5x0MRMHShGLxryiF7_bGekApwqNuj_44trhqLrZo2bLngNN_5CxIa9qW5nbpu334DhZ0flVY_60-aN-Mq2NPAwJFxdC_I7OYkk7FcmK6PpGOvln67HIf4W-wdta5DqVJ_RJyRxWiEryXhUC-6I_v_RZ6OLTFL6X6AISmBTl00CoYhtiSfC3vVD4jJ3tM16TbJRZeRsrwDjly9yhoQDrQOPkG1JD4uWwECpHoAtViN8ANK71GP0tmuzhB-1rEDHnRDShtQNQ_tukIU4NXJEf1g_SKQoJ5yC-ZUbUwuYLlvPKk-HEeK68T6nt7iiQBAxoyJxz7YUKs%3D)** because of your excellent track record of providing valuable input for the Conservative movement.

You'll be the voice of your fellow patriots in your area, so we're counting on your quick response.

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Democrats' Drug Problem
body:
The 2023 legislative session has mercifully come to an end - and it was a train wreck. Democrats effectively legalized hard drugs when they failed to pass a statewide drug possession law. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61750152:WHCwaWDUN:m:1:2610672541:BF5CDA2C3EC7A50BF721404A4DFCFFC7:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends, The 2023 legislative session has mercifully come to an end - and it was a train wreck. Democrats effectively legalized hard drugs when they failed to pass a statewide drug possession law. Democrats refused to make serious reforms to their failed police pursuit law. Democrats also passed a record-breaking $70 billion budget without providing tax relief of any kind. It's a sad story, but, as always, we here at Shift WA have you covered with have insights into what is going on in your own political backyard! Read on... ** ** **This week 's Newsmaker Interview...** Representative J.T. Wilcox joined us this week to discuss his recent announcement to step down as the Leader of the House Republican Caucus, a position he has held since 2018. Wilcox also shared his insights on the major issues that were debated during the 2023 legislative session, including the Democrats' failure to pass a much-needed drug possession law and not supporting meaningful police pursuit reform. [Read more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61750153:WHCwaWDUN:m:1:2610672541:BF5CDA2C3EC7A50BF721404A4DFCFFC7:r). **This week 's top story...** Following legislative Democrats' failure to pass a fix to the State Supreme Court's so-called "Blake decision" and implement a much-needed drug possession law, hard drugs - including deadly substances like fentanyl - are effectively legal in our state. Their failure has left city governments scrambling to pass restrictions of their own. Despite public backlash, pro-drug legalization Democrats like Representative Roger Goodman are still pushing for their version of a bill (which is opposed by the mayors) to legalize hard drug possession and public use (and prohibit cities from passing laws that punish drug users). [Read this story and more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61750154:WHCwaWDUN:m:1:2610672541:BF5CDA2C3EC7A50BF721404A4DFCFFC7:r). **In case you missed it ...** Cities are already moving to put laws on the books that would allow for the arrest of people for simple drug possession. Snohomish County cities have moved quickly. Marysville, Arlington, and Lake Stevens have already passed laws. Sultan, Everett, and Lynnwood are poised to join them. If the state legislature does not meet for a special session to resolve the problem before July, all cities will have to act, or drugs will be legal. [Read this story and more](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61750155:WHCwaWDUN:m:1:2610672541:BF5CDA2C3EC7A50BF721404A4DFCFFC7:r). P.S. Have you signed up for our Daily Briefing? If not, please take a moment to sign up now by [**clicking here**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61750156:WHCwaWDUN:m:1:2610672541:BF5CDA2C3EC7A50BF721404A4DFCFFC7:r).
| [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61750157:WHCwaWDUN:m:1:2610672541:BF5CDA2C3EC7A50BF721404A4DFCFFC7:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14189843&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWHCwaWDUN).

clean_body: Sorry to bother you on Sunday morning, but this is important. Fellow Democrats, the IDCCA's end-of-month deadline is just hours away, and we still have $1,883 to raise! We set this goal to raise the funds we need to make crucial early preparations for the 2024 election. We've said it before, but the next few months will be some of the most important of the entire cycle. As the most active grassroots Democratic partner in Illinois, I know we have what it takes to make 2024 one of the best elections for Democrats in decades. But we can't do it without you, fellow Democrats. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Please note your contribution may be used in connection with a federal election. State law requires that we report the occupation and name of the employer of any individual who contributes over $500. A copy of our reports are available for free online at FEC.gov. name: Gun News USA
subject: We paid for this already
body:
Grab your Complimentary Shoulder Holster now, before it’s too late.
---
| We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3686/6374453/895e96b8401ed55afe543b97ca4c8b36503afb1c/2970efd06a8889bd78d3dac0bafa85d7b46c30df) here at any time. April 30th, 2023 Please see the special promotion going on for Gun News USA subscribers from our sponsor below.
* * *
| | | | | | | \- We’re happy to tell you **we’ve paid the Full Price** of American Tactical Supply’s new “invisible” Shoulder Holster for you.

So you can own one of the 382 available Shoulder Holsters for FREE!

[Just click here to claim your complimentary Shoulder Holster today.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3686/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/2970efd06a8889bd78d3dac0bafa85d7b46c30df)

We’re doing this as a **“No More Gun Control”** awareness campaign -- and to give a __big ol’ middle finger__ to Biden’s surge of insane new gun laws.

This is our #1 favorite holster.

It fits nearly all handguns...

It’s unbelievably comfortable...

And it’s so good at concealing guns... it can make a large frame pistol **disappear in plain sight.**

Plus, the fact [you can get it for $0.00 today](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3686/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/2970efd06a8889bd78d3dac0bafa85d7b46c30df) is a huge selling point. ;)

The only problem is that there are a limited number available to give away.

Once they’re gone, you can still get one... **but you’ll have to pay full price**.

Right now, there are enough Free Shoulder Holsters [for the next 382 people who request on here](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3686/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/2970efd06a8889bd78d3dac0bafa85d7b46c30df).

After that, we can’t make any promises.

**[So HURRY and grab your Free Shoulder Holster now](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/3686/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/2970efd06a8889bd78d3dac0bafa85d7b46c30df)** , before it’s too late.

**Thank You.**

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Bank Accounts: Frozen!
body:
The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.

| | | | | Dear Subscriber, In 1990, the Brazilian government froze the bank accounts of thousands of citizens. In 2013, the victims were the people of Cyprus. Think nothing like this could happen in the United States? If so, think again. |

The Federal Reserve System Docket No. OP-1670, reveals the plan.
See front page is right here __

---
Team, we face a critical moment in our fight against gerrymandering. The Supreme Court is set to hand down decisions that could have far-reaching consequences for voting rights. And in states like Alabama, we're up against power-hungry interests that will stop at nothing to maintain their grip on political power.
[**But how did we get here?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62563630/403865300/2033091052?refcode=20230430_AOTL_F_EOM3_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0OGQxNzE3LTcwZTctZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UyingQEZEtcrv9CqWARQ7GA3Qx_VIX02KvhP8lHH1Cg=)
**In the 1960s** , civil rights workers and Black voters risked their lives in voter registration drives. They faced violence, intimidation, and even death. **But they knew what they were doing was right and were willing to put everything on the line to fight for justice.**
**In 1965** , The Voting Rights Act (VRA) was passed to protect the voting rights of Black Americans who were systematically disenfranchised. **And it made a real difference, for Black voters and disenfranchised communities across the country.**
**In 2013** , the Supreme Court gutted key provisions of the VRA, and since then, we've seen a wave of voter suppression efforts across the country.
**In January of 2022** , federal district judges issued a decision striking down Alabama’s enacted congressional map for likely diluting the voting power of Black communities in Alabama in violation of the VRA.
**In October of 2022** , the Supreme Court heard oral arguments in _Allen v. Milligan_ (formerly _Merrill v. Milligan_) to determine whether Alabama’s 2021 congressional redistricting map dilutes the voting power of Black communities.
**And in 2023** , the Supreme Court will soon rule on _Allen v. Milligan_ , a case that will determine whether a gerrymandered, congressional redistricting map is constitutional or violates the Voting Rights Act.
[**Black voters in Alabama face the threat of their votes being diluted because of gerrymandering. If this happens, Black Alabamians will be silenced and their political power diminished. Will you chip in $23 today to help All On The Line have the resources we need to remain vigilant in our fight for Black voters in states like Alabama?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62563631/403865301/2033091052?refcode=20230430_AOTL_F_EOM3_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0OGQxNzE3LTcwZTctZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UyingQEZEtcrv9CqWARQ7GA3Qx_VIX02KvhP8lHH1Cg=)

clean_body: | = = Team, we face a critical moment in our fight against gerrymandering. The Supreme Court is set to hand down decisions that could have far-reaching consequences for voting rights. And in states like Alabama, we're up against power-hungry interests that will stop at nothing to maintain their grip on political power. = In the 1960s , civil rights workers and Black voters risked their lives in voter registration drives. They faced violence, intimidation, and even death. But they knew what they were doing was right and were willing to put everything on the line to fight for justice. In 1965 , The Voting Rights Act (VRA) was passed to protect the voting rights of Black Americans who were systematically disenfranchised. And it made a real difference, for Black voters and disenfranchised communities across the country. In 2013 , the Supreme Court gutted key provisions of the VRA, and since then, we've seen a wave of voter suppression efforts across the country. In January of 2022 , federal district judges issued a decision striking down Alabama’s enacted congressional map for likely diluting the voting power of Black communities in Alabama in violation of the VRA. In October of 2022 , the Supreme Court heard oral arguments in Allen v. Milligan (formerly Merrill v. Milligan) to determine whether Alabama’s 2021 congressional redistricting map dilutes the voting power of Black communities. And in 2023 , the Supreme Court will soon rule on Allen v. Milligan , a case that will determine whether a gerrymandered, congressional redistricting map is constitutional or violates the Voting Rights Act. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The outcome of Allen v. Milligan could determine the future of voting rights and fair representation in Alabama and beyond. That’s why we are working tirelessly to ensure we're fully prepared to respond to whatever the U.S. Supreme Court decides. We are the civil rights workers of our generation, team. Thank you for sticking with us on what's right and fighting to ensure that every voter has a fair shot, regardless of race or politics. subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb99d9f29289417db2d5be7b48719aca&_e=oCRIv9qahdmjMIccMU_y8ZoSYJJMWoHPmPEGQYtrgyCMvP86CM6GzVj5pxEkK2Jlk_WnIX7fvAhT0zRoNZPq8R5bIoD6aP3DEPG7oeV0UbTs9De8Pn0tP3WnKIVmS-kSgwttnKuGpX4SefVC5Di1iKvkXV1Hzu99lbtbaezuqCbmrxd4J1d3Caks5dDUg1LN5IBzvveK1dJmBIkMHzoclZNLnY2a193BouOM1tQDq6FNXtTBT9TrwCx20h7uUNarQE94yokICr-KVDaD0Bm-q6z0hkBcHMCwK7Zm-YzOr-GI9vfsBzD2ujN7842kI1LFFv2Gtu51JyF8FYLwZ_mhPymWFXPKmffaulWk29IjNGkC7-mdsv3xT32ajyouhDv-Kbyrw3092DaTbLTCoQ_2VA%3D%3D)

| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb99d9f29289417db2d5be7b48719aca&_e=oCRIv9qahdmjMIccMU_y8ZoSYJJMWoHPmPEGQYtrgyCMvP86CM6GzVj5pxEkK2Jlk_WnIX7fvAhT0zRoNZPq8R5bIoD6aP3DEPG7oeV0UbTs9De8Pn0tP3WnKIVmS-kSgwttnKuGpX4SefVC5Di1iKvkXV1Hzu99lbtbaezuqCbmrxd4J1d3Caks5dDUg1LN5IBzvveK1dJmBIkMHzoclZNLnY2a193BouOM1tQDq6FNXtTBT9TrwCx20h7uUNarIsPhtA1Uxm6MSz71s_2lFMGvEQnOaVrfRF79-skUQR14Mrggf2s6JRzmO-SyGzONZGm8FDfu_fTpTD3ST4dFoFGEPEFvw7m2Na86O3dxi4NJGpw1bz_yH5ntWzRvPbDCXyut3snVjCxh3ygfIYk_BA%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb99d9f29289417db2d5be7b48719aca&_e=oCRIv9qahdmjMIccMU_y8ZoSYJJMWoHPmPEGQYtrgyCMvP86CM6GzVj5pxEkK2Jlk_WnIX7fvAhT0zRoNZPq8R5bIoD6aP3DEPG7oeV0UbTs9De8Pn0tP3WnKIVmS-kSgwttnKuGpX4SefVC5Di1iKvkXV1Hzu99lbtbaezuqCbmrxd4J1d3Caks5dDUg1LN5IBzvveK1dJmBIkMHzoclZNLnY2a193BouOM1tQDq6FNXtTBT9TrwCx20h7uUNarra6Uy5MgSMHKDHorXLIyaVJW5G2mNVFpbH2i3phyzPiE9BD4xixQOzmjIb5BLT2FJSQkc6y1CMJmrZ--sM6dblxyY55GR4ObgES2Gbb7-waXTCnN9gyrQeAGzuBteCkvDct3NCcpjNS8B-qmAza-GA%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb99d9f29289417db2d5be7b48719aca&_e=oCRIv9qahdmjMIccMU_y8ZoSYJJMWoHPmPEGQYtrgyCMvP86CM6GzVj5pxEkK2Jlk_WnIX7fvAhT0zRoNZPq8R5bIoD6aP3DEPG7oeV0UbTs9De8Pn0tP3WnKIVmS-kSgwttnKuGpX4SefVC5Di1iKvkXV1Hzu99lbtbaezuqCbmrxd4J1d3Caks5dDUg1LN5IBzvveK1dJmBIkMHzoclZNLnY2a193BouOM1tQDq6FNXtTBT9TrwCx20h7uUNara0Hs_0qCbOpqw510YB9nNwlkhy172k2WC4_iub4Grr0zUHsRmFYoKTJI3_y3lwMCMVNoptidJ23b2PIsbySO4QXQ09R-5V6kFXIyaYQB5vZTrCuJb69htc3KQ0coQLZlOt0JW6DR7iVp3Y3d8S8wHA%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fb99d9f29289417db2d5be7b48719aca&_e=oCRIv9qahdmjMIccMU_y8ZoSYJJMWoHPmPEGQYtrgyCMvP86CM6GzVj5pxEkK2Jlk_WnIX7fvAhT0zRoNZPq8R5bIoD6aP3DEPG7oeV0UbTs9De8Pn0tP3WnKIVmS-kSgwttnKuGpX4SefVC5Di1iKvkXV1Hzu99lbtbaezuqCbmrxd4J1d3Caks5dDUg1LN5IBzvveK1dJmBIkMHzoclZNLnY2a193BouOM1tQDq6FNXtTBT9TrwCx20h7uUNarbLFqNZ9bP6Bbm2C81d4X0jo-k0-MAVYPYxqhpHuMrCxhCj6lXgBbXmgsXQ5syPLWpa9hRD7sHyaT5GGbOC99ZOAZMoR6TaBVXhP1dwk4nDzZvODrYfMv57q5soH9PE-cy2CA7NHijXkz4cEpp8pbDA%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

| | | Peter, Only hours left in April, and we're so close to our fundraising goal! Peter, can we count on you to chip in? Use this secure, personal link before midnight tonight: **<[https://secure.winred.com/john-james-for-michigan/action/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=998f2962d5c91ebf88a160ea97a8f16a5a9b8d508c36b9e5b45e36d2c4bfef690b8c9facd1fd5a2085458599fe5e6ed6ffb6744fd90a0dcb "https://secure.winred.com/john-james-for-michigan/action/dpwillis67@gmail.com")>** -Team John James

\----------- Forwarded message -----------
From: John James
Date: April 28, 2023
Subject: Can you believe it's been this long, Peter?
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=998f2962d5c91ebf45927d9590516396b2517ef2f3b2843e1e9ddee55951a7d0651e47820e0408a470d40402ff6e4f7412a7c32d19982219 "dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
| Peter, Can you believe it's been over 100 days since I started serving in Congress? In that time:
* **I fought for American families** , passing a landmark energy bill and voting for the Parents Bill of Rights.
* **I stood up for Michigan,** leading an effort to protect our beautiful Great Lakes from a new Canadian nuclear waste facility.
* **And I passed my first piece of legislation** : a bill that protects Medicare & Social Security from cuts during any debt ceiling negotiations. We've got to keep our promises to America's seniors, and I'm proud that this is my first bill.

Peter, I'm doing everything I can to keep the promises I made to the American people when I went to Washington. _And I 'm just getting started._ After 100 days, I hope it's clear: **I 'm 100% ALL-IN on America**. It's why the Democrats ALREADY have our seat on their list of top targets. They think that MI-10 is one of the seats they can flip to retake the majority. **But I 've got a surprise for them: There's NO WAY I'm backing down.** **Are you with me, Co-Pilot? Then help me hit our April fundraising goal.** We're getting to work for the American people, but there's so much more left to do. **[Stand with me this month and let's keep going!](https://click.action.jjforcongress.com/?qs=998f2962d5c91ebf0cf2e88caa642fbb5c735ccbe2360d450188ecd77ed7fb5c2d8bf48ad4fe93f8b4aedb890f1b48b481e12749a2aa3231 "Stand with me this month and let’s keep going!")** Thank you,
John James

We couldn’t have made this much progress without your help, so before I say anything else, I want to thank you for your belief in our campaign. **We can’t quite wrap things up for the month just yet. name: Rick Scott
subject: I’m not giving up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:

body:
The Radical Left is throwing everything it has to DESTROY our Supreme Court Majority.

| |

---
| | | **FIRST:** It was Justice Clarence Thomas and Justice Neil Gorsuch
**THEN:** It was Chief Justice John Roberts.
**NEXT:** **???**
One thing is clear Friend: The Radical Left is going to do **EVERYTHING** they can to **DESTROY** our Supreme Court Majority **FOREVER**.

These smear campaigns led by the Liberal Media against Clarence Thomas and Neil Gorsuch are **RIDICULOUS**.

Toss in Senator Durbin's request for Chief Justice John Roberts to step away from the important business of the Supreme Court to testify on these baseless claims and you've got yourself a situation ripe for **INSANITY**.

**Even worse - who knows who the Radical Left will come after NEXT???**

If we lose our Supreme Court Majority, we will lose all of the hard-fought victories we have won to keep America the free country we all deserve. The future of America will be DESTROYED if we don't do everything we can to save our Supreme Court Majority.

name: Jon Tester
subject: the Senate's only seven-fingered dirt farmer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62550116/403814837/-154960198?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2537-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0OGVmNWEwLTU3ZTctZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LoZtUfjzkuERvxtWMniAy1xqLkUTvwgFng6or9tOAz8=)
Hello,

I’m sure your inbox is flooded with messages about the upcoming end-of-month fundraising deadline, but I want to take a minute to say something different: **I want to tell you how grateful I am that you’re part of this grassroots team.**

Without you, I wouldn’t have been elected as the Senate’s only seven-fingered dirt farmer, and I _definitely_ wouldn’t have won reelection in a state Donald Trump carried twice.

I’m so grateful for your help, and for all that we’ve been able to accomplish as a result: we’ve invested in infrastructure and education. We’ve lowered health care costs. We’ve fought back against inflation and helped working families get the support they need – whether they live on a farm like me or in a big city.

_You_ helped make all of this possible – thank you.
**But there is still work to be done.****** Hardworking families are still struggling to stay afloat, and small businesses are still fighting to survive. And instead of working to actually solve these problems, national politicians are proposing dumb-as-rocks ideas like a national sales tax. I’m running for reelection because Montanans have worked too hard these past few years to let the GOP take us backward.

So I need to thank you in advance for supporting my reelection campaign. We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and I sure as hell don’t want to face this alone.

**I’m the most vulnerable senator up for reelection next year, and if we’re going to win, it’ll take all of us working together – just like we always do.**

**[I’m personally asking: Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and American Bridge PAC ahead of tonight's end-of-month fundraising deadline and help keep me in the Senate delivering for Montana?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62550117/403814838/-154960198?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2537-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0OGVmNWEwLTU3ZTctZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LoZtUfjzkuERvxtWMniAy1xqLkUTvwgFng6or9tOAz8=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jon Tester and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62550118/403814839/-154960198?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=jtk2537-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0OGVmNWEwLTU3ZTctZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LoZtUfjzkuERvxtWMniAy1xqLkUTvwgFng6or9tOAz8=)

name: Secure & Prosper
subject: Interesting...and alarming
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.secureandprosper._t05G082_zqF3bU-fITZg)
Dear Fellow American,
Bill Gray from Hillsdale College here... I’m going to share something alarming with you. Something that we’ve learned over the last few years.
Here it is: Recent events and revelations demonstrate that the U.S. Department of Justice is increasingly motivated by **partisanship**.
Making matters worse, the DOJ has access to the incredible powers of the modern surveillance state.
**Americans must understand the grave danger this poses to our most fundamental liberties.**
That’s why I asked to send you this email today.
**And it’s why I want to send you a FREE issue from _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—on the topic, “The Politicization of the Department of Justice.”**
Since you’re a concerned citizen and an intelligent patriot, I know you’ll find this issue interesting and alarming. You may also want to share your free issue with friends and family.
You can receive your FREE copy of **“The Politicization of the Department of Justice”** at this secure link:
[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/doj-imprimis-offer/**](http://trk.secureandprosper._61Wkgd4CA)
Please don’t delay! Our liberty is at stake, and education is our surest defense.
Warm regards,

Bill Gray, ’01Vice PresidentNational Donor OutreachHillsdale College
|
Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTIwLTZmMjE1MjZlMGFhZjRlNzc4ZDY0OWNlYzZlMmY0NjE5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/B6Qh1zyYpxu4XZ2-BhOowA) to unsubscribe.

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | Dear Fellow American, Bill Gray from Hillsdale College here... I’m going to share something alarming with you. Something that we’ve learned over the last few years. Here it is: Recent events and revelations demonstrate that the U.S. Department of Justice is increasingly motivated by partisanship. Making matters worse, the DOJ has access to the incredible powers of the modern surveillance state. Americans must understand the grave danger this poses to our most fundamental liberties. That’s why I asked to send you this email today. And it’s why I want to send you a FREE issue from Imprimis —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—on the topic, “The Politicization of the Department of Justice.” Since you’re a concerned citizen and an intelligent patriot, I know you’ll find this issue interesting and alarming. You may also want to share your free issue with friends and family. You can receive your FREE copy of “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” at this secure link: Please don’t delay! Our liberty is at stake, and education is our surest defense. Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01Vice PresidentNational Donor OutreachHillsdale College | Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

Team, here's just some of what House Republicans have voted on so far this year:
* Cutting food stamps for low-income Americans
* Rolling back clean energy tax credits
* Discriminating against trans youth
* Further restrictions on abortion rights
* Making it easier for wealthy tax cheats to game the system

**But despite this out-of-touch agenda, their early fundraising has been strong — and Jennifer needs to beat her April goal so she can withstand the coming attacks from the NRCC and GOP super PACs.** **[Will you chip in before our deadline tonight to help Jennifer raise $2,197 more?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62551843/403821747/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230430EOM1_EOM_GOP_FULL_8_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDI2ZDA2Zi01YWU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rbxIxFluQtuZxCBRs0dImG3YvPMY-lpHmmXdNfEQvVs=) ** [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62551844/403821748/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230430EOM1_EOM_GOP_FULL_8_NG_N_B1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDI2ZDA2Zi01YWU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rbxIxFluQtuZxCBRs0dImG3YvPMY-lpHmmXdNfEQvVs=) There's no dirty trick the GOP won't try when it comes to advancing their extreme policies.

They've shown that they'll support voter suppression, spread conspiracy theories about the integrity of our elections, and double down on Trumpian MAGA politics in a craven effort to turn out their base.

**Just like in 2022, they'll be throwing major financial support behind candidates in battleground districts like VA-10 who will rubber-stamp these dangerous views.**

Jennifer won't give up on defending our democracy or advancing the policies that our economy, schools, and families need. But she can't do it alone, and if she doesn't get an early head start, this race could be defined by Republican spending.

clean_body: House Republicans have voted on cutting food stamps for low-income Americans, rolling back clean energy tax credits, and discriminating against trans youth. = Team, here's just some of what House Republicans have voted on so far this year: Cutting food stamps for low-income Americans Rolling back clean energy tax credits Discriminating against trans youth Further restrictions on abortion rights Making it easier for wealthy tax cheats to game the system But despite this out-of-touch agenda, their early fundraising has been strong — and Jennifer needs to beat her April goal so she can withstand the coming attacks from the NRCC and GOP super PACs. = = There's no dirty trick the GOP won't try when it comes to advancing their extreme policies. They've shown that they'll support voter suppression, spread conspiracy theories about the integrity of our elections, and double down on Trumpian MAGA politics in a craven effort to turn out their base. Just like in 2022, they'll be throwing major financial support behind candidates in battleground districts like VA-10 who will rubber-stamp these dangerous views. Jennifer won't give up on defending our democracy or advancing the policies that our economy, schools, and families need. But she can't do it alone, and if she doesn't get an early head start, this race could be defined by Republican spending. = = Thank you, Team Wexton | Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America. =** Paid for by Wexton for Congress Wexton for Congress PO Box 650550 Sterling, VA 20165 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: You deserve an explanation

body:
Here is the absolute, honest truth:
#

Peter -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign for Senate in Arizona before our April fundraising drive ends at midnight. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here is the absolute, honest truth:
As you read this, Kyrsten Sinema’s fundraising is picking up and Kari Lake is probably getting set to enter this race.
At the same time, our fundraising has slowed pretty significantly since the start of this month.
The timing is not great — mostly because it makes us vulnerable to attack. Immediate attack: from Wall Street funded campaigns and from the MAGA-right.
That is why we’re really hoping to catch up on our fundraising goals before our midnight deadline.
So I am turning to the people I really need to step up and make their first online donation if we’re going to win this race.
What do you say?

Our Democratic trifecta is hard at work getting things done, and we’re making good progress. It's been an exciting time in Michigan since our Democratic trifecta took office, and you can see the direct results of our action already.

In just over 100 days, we've made strides in critical areas like lowering costs, abortion rights, common-sense gun reform, workers’ rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and job growth. It's been a busy time, and I'm proud of what we've accomplished so far.

But here's the thing - we can't do it alone. That's why I'm asking for your support before our midnight end-of-month deadline. **Every dollar you can spare will make a real difference in our efforts to hold on to and expand our slim majorities in the State House and Senate.**

clean_body: With your support, we'll be ready to continue making strides toward a better future for all. | | = Our Democratic trifecta is hard at work getting things done, and we’re making good progress. It's been an exciting time in Michigan since our Democratic trifecta took office, and you can see the direct results of our action already. In just over 100 days, we've made strides in critical areas like lowering costs, abortion rights, common-sense gun reform, workers’ rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and job growth. It's been a busy time, and I'm proud of what we've accomplished so far. But here's the thing - we can't do it alone. That's why I'm asking for your support before our midnight end-of-month deadline. Every dollar you can spare will make a real difference in our efforts to hold on to and expand our slim majorities in the State House and Senate. And let's be real – we know the GOP, with the help of people like Betsy DeVos, is gearing up to launch right-wing attacks aimed at stalling our progress. But with your support, we'll be ready to fight back and continue making strides toward a better future for all. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Together, we can make a real difference. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Please allow me to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I truly mean it when I say that my team and I would not make these asks if they weren’t so important.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr23.fjJHm6&refcode=em230430-1-subs&refcode2=5355.3935704.lVenF5&t=1&akid=5355%2E3935704%2ElVenF5)
---
Hi there, it’s Gabby Giffords.
I hope that you’ll allow me to explain why I’m reaching out to ask for your support today.
At midnight tonight, we’ll close the books on our April fundraising deadline. The goals we set are not arbitrary—they are real benchmarks that help us continue our lifesaving work to elect gun safety champions, pass lifesaving legislation, and stand up to the gun lobby.
In these next hours before the day ends, we have to give it all we’ve got so we can reach our goals.
[**That’s why I’m personally asking: Can I count on you to chip in $3 or any amount that makes sense for you to GIFFORDS PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr23.fjJHm6&refcode=em230430-1-subs&t=2&akid=5355%2E3935704%2ElVenF5)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-apr23.7BzXPA&refcode=em230430-1-subs&t=21&akid=5355%2E3935704%2ElVenF5)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-apr23.Phu1VU&refcode=em230430-1-subs&t=22&akid=5355%2E3935704%2ElVenF5)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-apr23.6sNEa3&refcode=em230430-1-subs&t=23&akid=5355%2E3935704%2ElVenF5)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-apr23.OKouW1&refcode=em230430-1-subs&t=24&akid=5355%2E3935704%2ElVenF5)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-apr23.7su2Eh&refcode=em230430-1-subs&t=25&akid=5355%2E3935704%2ElVenF5)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-apr23.kgvFSZ&refcode=em230430-1-subs&t=26&akid=5355%2E3935704%2ElVenF5)**
---
****
I know we ask a lot of you. But I truly mean it when I say that my team and I would not make these asks if they weren’t so important.
While we’ve made undeniable progress in the movement to end gun violence in our country, there are still far too many innocent lives stolen each and every day in our nation from preventable violence.
[**We must keep moving forward in the fight to keep our communities safe. So please, make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC before our April fundraising deadline passes to support our lifesaving work.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr23.fjJHm6&refcode=em230430-1-subs&t=27&akid=5355%2E3935704%2ElVenF5)
I am so grateful to have you on this team. Thank you for your continued support.
With courage,
Gabby Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=5355%2E3935704%2ElVenF5) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Andy Kim
subject: Join our movement to create a better future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
The past month has been marred by scandal, mass shootings, and a Republican budget that wants to strip away so much that we've worked hard to accomplish together.

After a month like this, it's easy to feel discouraged.

But this grassroots movement is what gives me hope. Together, I know we are a powerful force for good.

Tonight is our end-of-month deadline. Will you chip in before midnight and power our movement forward? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-04-30-eom-deadline&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5cb9c614-5de7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73]

Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-04-30-eom-deadline&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5cb9c614-5de7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73]

The work that we are doing is not just about the present moment. We are building a better future for our children and future generations. Together, we can create a nation that is more just, more equitable, more compassionate, and a place we are proud to hand over to the next generation of leaders.

Andy

clean_body: The past month has been marred by scandal, mass shootings, and a Republican budget that wants to strip away so much that we've worked hard to accomplish together. After a month like this, it's easy to feel discouraged. But this grassroots movement is what gives me hope. Together, I know we are a powerful force for good. Tonight is our end-of-month deadline. Will you chip in before midnight and power our movement forward? [] Donate Now [] The work that we are doing is not just about the present moment. We are building a better future for our children and future generations. Together, we can create a nation that is more just, more equitable, more compassionate, and a place we are proud to hand over to the next generation of leaders. I am committed to fighting for the people of Ohio. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62553860/403829233/-818894537?refcode=EM_FR_230430FR_N_MK_90DA_6_NG_TestA_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2RmNjEzNS01ZGU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=haOGN_Y83u37GUvkkk7R7PDLsy8-g_txu3PKXuQv604=)

I wanted to take a moment to share with you some of the work that we have been doing for the people of Ohio over the past few months. I am committed to fighting for the needs of our communities, and I am proud of the progress we have made so far this year.

This year, I’ve been able to secure:
* **$16.1 million to the Toledo area to spur jobs and solar energy innovation.** This funding will help create new opportunities for our workers, while also supporting the growth of clean energy in our region.
* **A $400,000 matching grant award to the Toledo Museum of Art** , which will help ensure that our community continues to have access to world-class cultural experiences.
* **A $3.971 million grant award to expand the Senior Farmers’ Market Nutrition Program in Ohio.** This funding will help ensure that our seniors have access to healthy, nutritious food, while also supporting our local farmers.

Of course, there is still much more work to be done.

That's why I am asking for your help today. Kevin McCarthy is targeting this district because he wants to flip this seat and undo all the progress we have made. But I am not going to let that happen. **I am committed to fighting for the people of Ohio,_but I need your support to do it._**

**[Will you make a contribution of $5 today to help us keep up the good work? We are in a toss-up race, and every dollar counts – even this early on. subject: Do you have a minute?
body:
It is so important that I not only meet, but crush my April fundraising goal.

| |
---
| | Friend,

_John from my team emailed you.

I emailed you.

My husband, Michael, emailed you.

**And now, I 'm reaching out _one last time_ before tonight's deadline. **_

It is so important that I not only meet, _**but crush**_ my April fundraising goal. Right now, people are underestimating me and my campaign (this isn't the first time) and we must prove them wrong again!

Hitting these monthly deadlines are so important. It will give me the boost to assemble the grassroots infrastructure I need to become your next President.

We have set an aggressive goal for April and **[I need every patriot to pitch in just $15 before midnight in order to make it happen.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c831173ac9634ad3bd290f7f489cec42&_e=TaFO9t1dnTe1t3Mjr_7Wqi1VIvsZxMrMLIOBrCiehMiglgcH3P2htZCnuvI6IE3SSEvbftkdhyNgH36ML4KIzuXxxLY4hmZUl-Lemcf3DLYCDfe6KcKlIkcAVvfe5KGxu9xcKbehp04sh0_XU2cAk8jk-FcyOVe3LOdvQVOVpvbVUx0n-uD4CKzv2aEdQPRKkhwcoNOXfUX9eFU0OblRXcT0oJJQz7UFeQnvy9TkxJe82pzIoMm_d_5ToTM98a19l9dOg-_IuXTabl_BqWi_JjuBa-PRpYtVI-qMduEEw8C8QJY02YJF0bfy3X0wew7kEs61wRbWSfR-7F6zD3WzAhwVzBO3H9XPMwYrsVSoghlQbBOgcWL9y2WRW8kwp0nq " I need every patriot to pitch in just $15 before midnight in order to make it happen. ")**

With your help, Friend, we can send a CLEAR message that the doubters and haters who underestimate me are mistaken.

**[But, we only have a few HOURS left. Please, don't wait any longer to act. I'm counting on you to chip in whatever you can afford to help me reach my goal BEFORE 11:59 PM TONIGHT!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c831173ac9634ad3bd290f7f489cec42&_e=TaFO9t1dnTe1t3Mjr_7Wqi1VIvsZxMrMLIOBrCiehMiglgcH3P2htZCnuvI6IE3SSEvbftkdhyNgH36ML4KIzuXxxLY4hmZUl-Lemcf3DLYCDfe6KcKlIkcAVvfe5KGxu9xcKbehp04sh0_XU2cAk8jk-FcyOVe3LOdvQVOVpvbVUx0n-uD4CKzv2aEdQPRKgAJwBYVDV9Z6U0o7zl-YamH5jucVnwlbfkZmVoyh5vi3qY9GFUx56BWe1x09xWiZLFqTPvGzrgYTCzSC5vW59bZ08ZqcfX9S-Nw5ZiqxgusJEsBfI5gPt9V8S7aBVcROoXtwxd_yWdXCyjsa5IWdhg3bZE_6VkR9ctj14Un8qIE%3D "But, we only have X HOURS left. My very best,

clean_body: It is so important that I not only meet, but crush my April fundraising goal. | | | | Friend, John from my team emailed you. I emailed you. My husband, Michael, emailed you. And now, I 'm reaching out one last time before tonight's deadline. It is so important that I not only meet, but crush my April fundraising goal. Right now, people are underestimating me and my campaign (this isn't the first time) and we must prove them wrong again! | | "DONATE $5" | | "DONATE $15" | | "DONATE $25" | | "DONATE $50" Hitting these monthly deadlines are so important. It will give me the boost to assemble the grassroots infrastructure I need to become your next President. We have set an aggressive goal for April and " I need every patriot to pitch in just $15 before midnight in order to make it happen. " With your help, Friend, we can send a CLEAR message that the doubters and haters who underestimate me are mistaken. "But, we only have X HOURS left. Please, don’t wait any longer to act. I’m counting on you to chip in whatever you can afford to help me reach my goal BEFORE 11:59 PM TONIGHT! " Thank you in advance for your support. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | ---|--- | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of by Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Nikki Haley for President, Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Inc. and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Thank you for fighting for a better future with us.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We are in a fight for the soul of the Democratic Party. Justice Democrats
exists to recruit and support working-class community leaders to run for
Congress and fight for policies that match the scale of the crises we
face.

Money has always been the number one thing holding our work back. We face
millions of dollars spent against us every cycle from moderates and
right-wing-backed groups who want to stop us.

We won’t give up or let their money drown us out.

But we’re counting on your support to help us reach our $75,000
end-of-month fundraising goal. Will you contribute $3 right
now to help us reach our goal before midnight? Here’s a personal link you
can use to donate:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134244?refcode=em20230430-28710&personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com-1&t=1001&akid=28710%2E1203867%2E362S9R ]https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-20230430?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-1

When hundreds of thousands of people chip in $5, $10, and $20 at a time,
it all adds up to compete against the billionaires and corporations who
use their money to rig the political system in their favor.

Thank you for fighting for a better future with us. We know that together,
there is so much more we can achieve.

-Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1002&akid=28710%2E1203867%2E362S9R ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1003&akid=28710%2E1203867%2E362S9R ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230430-28710-footer&t=1004&refcode2=28710_1203867_362S9R&akid=28710%2E1203867%2E362S9R

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=28710%2E1203867%2E362S9R

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
#
Hey Derek,
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you, Derek.
Your support, voice, and participation have helped us run some of the most powerful election ads out there and flipped races for Democrats.
It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans like the PACT Act and stopping Republicans from privatizing the VA. And right now, it's helping us stop the GOP from making billions in cuts to the VA.
But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation to support our work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that select group.
Our average donation is $25. Some give more, many give less. But with the GOP waging an all out assault on our Veterans, all that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation before our end-of-month deadline ends at midnight tonight.
We’ll put it right to work fighting and defeating these liars and hypocrites in the most important election cycle in modern American history — the one we’re in right now.
**[If helping VoteVets run some of the most effective election ads of the cycle, ads that win races seems worth $3 to you, we’re humbly asking you make that donation today. We need you. Thank you.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-apr23.Brw65h&refcode=em230430-1-15&t=1&akid=8382%2E3013755%2EZXTkyO)**

| | April 30, 2023
---
| WEEKLY NEWSLETTER
---
| Issue 9
---
| | **A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)** This past week, I attended the Republican Party of Virginia’s Advance conference and had the honor of moderating the big tent panel on how to expand our GOP base. The Republican Party of Virginia is the “big tent” party. We accept people of all backgrounds and varying points of view, unlike the left, which requires you to walk in lock-step with their narrative or be attacked with vitriol. It was great to connect with so many familiar faces through the RVP Advance, and I look forward to working with the passionate patriots across the Commonwealth who are committed to ensuring America stays the beacon of hope for future generations. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET), Honorary Chairman of [Unleash America PAC](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=7bde2524cd7c48219f414bb9709abc57&_e=CfypALbxx5BCdD-BDUunH-dIgAoWMQrysp_uAWJ9b3c05On6py3MF-qDN5e9q8_b5mF3RcJlYvvbI6EVne2oiIXBVVHnbbXWZdOVrdjUZNra8JA62Af5gwK4YeG3IF0L-1xGgeC6Ea4MjkuI8lZT2oQ_UcP9vuOCA3-zJy9JFgH_de2rI5zxJzQ2NgHymv4GpZl5_-qHsMCHeE8VUhOXFXXydeK-IC4K7ewDGN3Bjglj_DhbfV7I1z35aWxiU6Il7CGqt94vjiu5wdfzyA9E8kggJ7ZEoANUR9XCWZVJrjo%3D)

clean_body: | | | | | April 30, 2023 | WEEKLY NEWSLETTER | Issue 9 | | A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) This past week, I attended the Republican Party of Virginia’s Advance conference and had the honor of moderating the big tent panel on how to expand our GOP base. The Republican Party of Virginia is the “big tent” party. We accept people of all backgrounds and varying points of view, unlike the left, which requires you to walk in lock-step with their narrative or be attacked with vitriol. It was great to connect with so many familiar faces through the RVP Advance, and I look forward to working with the passionate patriots across the Commonwealth who are committed to ensuring America stays the beacon of hope for future generations. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET), Honorary Chairman of | The Military Recruitment Drought is a National Security Crisis This week, Hung Cao writes in The Spectator, “With the strategic mistakes of President Biden, such as the Afghanistan retreat, paired with puzzling Pentagon priorities, it’s no wonder recruitment is at an all-time low.” Hung Cao Joins Newsmax National Report Cao joined with Ret. Brigadier General Blaine Holt to speak with National Report about the alarming FBI busts of a Chinese ‘police station” in New York City and six more throughout the United States. | Social Media to Share Here are a few of our top posts from social media this week. Be sure to like and share, and when you tweet at Hung remember to use #UnleashAmerica! | | | | | | That's it for this week, thank you for reading. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Can I explain something?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44145?t=6&akid=7396%2E878179%2EDKj-f2) Friend,

In a moment, I’m going to ask if you can [pitch in to support Voter Protection Project and my campaign for U.S. Senate](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44145?t=7&akid=7396%2E878179%2EDKj-f2) ahead of tonight’s April fundraising deadline. But first, can I explain why this deadline is so important?

Just hours before I announced my campaign, Kevin McCarthy removed me from the Intelligence Committee, where I’ve served as Chairman and top Democrat for years. All because I held Trump and MAGA Republicans accountable.

As it turned out, that was just the beginning. Ever since I started running to serve Californians in the Senate, McCarthy, Matt Gaetz, Tucker Carlson, and the entire Fox News machine have attacked me nearly every day.

Earlier this month, McCarthy claimed that a Republican could win this Senate race in California and also said they needed to make sure I didn’t win.

**It’s clear that McCarthy and his right-wing allies are going to do everything they can to prevent me from becoming California’s next Senator. That’s why it’s so important we hit tonight’s April fundraising goal and send a powerful message: I’m not going anywhere.

Pitch in now to help:** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44146?t=8&akid=7396%2E878179%2EDKj-f2)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44147?t=9&akid=7396%2E878179%2EDKj-f2)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44148?t=10&akid=7396%2E878179%2EDKj-f2)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44149?t=11&akid=7396%2E878179%2EDKj-f2)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44145?t=12&akid=7396%2E878179%2EDKj-f2)
Investing _now_ and building the campaign infrastructure to break through the Republicans’ noise and reach voters across California is going to be the key to success in this race. Thanks for anything you can contribute to help.

— Adam
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7396%2E878179%2EDKj-f2). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7396%2E878179%2EDKj-f2).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7396%2E878179%2EDKj-f2) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=7396%2E878179%2EDKj-f2). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=7396%2E878179%2EDKj-f2)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=7396%2E878179%2EDKj-f2)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Let me explain something about why we need to reach this month’s fundraising goal.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=2152%2E5257348%2E5OW1hL)
Here it is, Derek — our first fundraising deadline since the FEC reports.
Can you pitch in? Use my personal link: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/april2023](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230430_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=2152%2E5257348%2E5OW1hL)**
Let me explain something about why we need to reach this month’s fundraising goal.
Kevin McCarthy, the Republican House Speaker, isn’t about to allow me to waltz into the United States Senate.
Not after everything I’ve done to expose his hypocrisy. To hold him, McConnell and Trump accountable.
I was the poster child for their attacks against Democrats in the midterm elections, and that will only intensify as I run for the Senate.
McCarthy has the ability to raise millions of dollars at a single fundraising event. And he has pledged to the California GOP that I cannot be California’s next Senator.
So I need you with me. Today.
Derek, can you contribute any amount to our campaign before my midnight deadline?
Here’s that link one more time: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/april2023](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230430_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=2152%2E5257348%2E5OW1hL)**
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230430_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=2152%2E5257348%2E5OW1hL)
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=apr2023_abs_em.jChiIi&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230430_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=2152%2E5257348%2E5OW1hL)
---
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=2152%2E5257348%2E5OW1hL) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=2152%2E5257348%2E5OW1hL)**
