name: Cori Bush HQ
subject: Calling out their hypocrisy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Republicans continue to show us where their interests lie.
#
Peter,
The fight surrounding the debt ceiling is heating up.
After voting several times during the Trump presidency to raise the debt ceiling, Republicans are deciding to dig their heels in the sand. Despite _narrowly_ passing the new debt ceiling proposal, it would come with major strings attached — reversing some of the progress our movement made last year by repealing key parts of the Inflation Reduction Act and eliminating the Biden administration's student loan forgiveness initative.
**This is unacceptable.** While Republicans have no problem running up the debt through tax breaks for billionaires and the wealthy, they're showing us who they are — bought-and-paid-for hacks who will do anything to maintain their money and power.
**[Can you chip in $5 today to help sustain our movement so Cori can continue to fight for everyday people and hold the GOP accountable?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/2532?c0=cori-em-20230430-1.xPoF1W&refcode=em20230430-2591&t=1&akid=2591%2E1082990%2EDFxg9t)
For years, Republicans have used the very process they're using now to threaten to tank the economy for years. And despite taking emergency measures, the federal government's tap is expected to run dry this summer. Any default would hurt our economy, bring even higher interest rates, create a surge of unemployment and would **_likely cause a recession.**_
**We won't be fooled:** When the GOP talks about "fiscal responsibility" this is nothing more than an attempt to impose their extremist and unpopular agenda on the rest of us. We won't let this happen. **[Will you chip in $5 today to help power Cori's efforts in Congress to avoid economic catastrophe?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/2532?c0=cori-em-20230430-1.xPoF1W&refcode=em20230430-2591&t=2&akid=2591%2E1082990%2EDFxg9t)
**[Donate](https://act.coribush.org/go/2532?c0=cori-em-20230430-1.xPoF1W&refcode=em20230430-2591&t=21&akid=2591%2E1082990%2EDFxg9t)**
We will keep you updated on how this continues to unfold.
In solidarity,
Cori Bush HQ

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230430-1?refcode=em20230430-2591-footer&t=22&refcode2=2591_1082990_DFxg9t&akid=2591%2E1082990%2EDFxg9t) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=23&akid=2591%2E1082990%2EDFxg9t)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2591%2E1082990%2EDFxg9t)

name: Ilhan Omar HQ
subject: Asking for something a little different
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=131%2E791427%2EJ9KLBa)
Friends -
We're emailing to ask for something a little different than usual today, and we hope you'll keep reading on to hear why.
As you know, Ilhan funds our campaign the right way — grassroots supporters chipping in small amounts, often to emails like this one.
That's a fact we're incredibly proud of, and we hope you are too.
But here's the situation: while the number of contributions we've received this month has been strong, our _average contribution_ has dipped considerably. This month we're down by about $4.94 each compared to last quarter.
We know it doesn't seem like much, but when you rely on lots and lots of people chipping in, it adds up very quickly.
There are two ways we can fix this before midnight — either bring in a LOT more contributions today, or by asking our supporters to chip in slightly more than we usually would.
You may have noticed that when we send a fundraising email, we usually ask you for $3. But if you could chip in $5 to Ilhan today, it'd go a long way toward reaching our April fundraising goals.
What do you say?
**[If you can, please use this link to make a $5 contribution to our campaign. Every donation is a signal of the strength of the movement we've built together.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-apr23.QUZUGP&refcode=em230430-1-t2&t=3&akid=131%2E791427%2EJ9KLBa)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-apr23.QUZUGP&refcode=em230430-1-t2&t=4&akid=131%2E791427%2EJ9KLBa)**
This is a movement truly built by and for the people Ilhan fights for every day, never corporate PACs or special interests. Thank you so much for being a part of it.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=131%2E791427%2EJ9KLBa)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=131%2E791427%2EJ9KLBa)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=7&akid=131%2E791427%2EJ9KLBa)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=8&refcode2=131_791427_J9KLBa&akid=131%2E791427%2EJ9KLBa)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

As you know, Ilhan funds our campaign the right way — grassroots supporters chipping in small amounts, often to emails like this one. That's a fact we're incredibly proud of, and we hope you are too. But here's the situation: while the number of contributions we've received this month has been strong, our average contribution has dipped considerably. This month we're down by about $4.94 each compared to last quarter. We know it doesn't seem like much, but when you rely on lots and lots of people chipping in, it adds up very quickly. There are two ways we can fix this before midnight — either bring in a LOT more contributions today, or by asking our supporters to chip in slightly more than we usually would. You may have noticed that when we send a fundraising email, we usually ask you for $3. But if you could chip in $5 to Ilhan today, it'd go a long way toward reaching our April fundraising goals. What do you say? This is a movement truly built by and for the people Ilhan fights for every day, never corporate PACs or special interests. Thank you so much for being a part of it. In solidarity, Team Ilhan PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: I’m humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
[**I am reaching out to humbly ask you to make a $3 contribution to The Long Run before our April end-of-month deadline comes to a close at midnight today.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-apr23.76jeGr&refcode=em230430-1-t3&t=1&akid=4402%2E196590%2E1pNeMo)
April has been a tough month for our PAC. We leaned on this team and pushed as hard as we could to get Judge Janet across the finish line in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race earlier this month. _But since then, our movement has been losing the steady support it needs._
Our team has already proven that it can be consequential in key races, so we cannot afford to slow down.
I can proudly say that the work we did helped to elect Judge Janet and I have no doubt that we can continue to do the same around the country — as long as we have your support and the resources to do so.
[**So please. If you can afford it, make a $3 contribution to The Long Run today. Every dollar will help us make a greater impact around the country.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-apr23.76jeGr&refcode=em230430-1-t3&t=2&akid=4402%2E196590%2E1pNeMo)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $3](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1272?c0=longrunpac-em-apr23.0-npSQ&refcode=em230430-1-t3&t=21&akid=4402%2E196590%2E1pNeMo)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-apr23.U8uW83&refcode=em230430-1-t3&t=22&akid=4402%2E196590%2E1pNeMo)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-apr23.iOORRz&refcode=em230430-1-t3&t=23&akid=4402%2E196590%2E1pNeMo)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-apr23.cUHA-m&refcode=em230430-1-t3&t=24&akid=4402%2E196590%2E1pNeMo)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-apr23.ML01HH&refcode=em230430-1-t3&t=25&akid=4402%2E196590%2E1pNeMo)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-apr23.76jeGr&refcode=em230430-1-t3&t=26&akid=4402%2E196590%2E1pNeMo)
Our movement is proudly funded by grassroots donors, who chip in what they can when they can. So with so much on the line in 2024 — from the presidency to Congress to local races — campaigns are counting on our movement to garner the support and resources they need to build their infrastructure, organizing programs, and get out the vote.
But without the support of this grassroots team, our movement cannot continue to sustain itself and we will not be able to give those campaigns the crucial support that they need.
There is still a lot more work left to be done and I know that we can continue to make a difference as long as I have you by my side.
So, what do you say?
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to the Long Run today ahead of our end-of-month deadline? I would not ask if it weren't crucial for the sustainability of our movement.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-apr23.76jeGr&refcode=em230430-1-t3&t=27&akid=4402%2E196590%2E1pNeMo)
I know that you care about the future of our country and our democracy. So I am counting on you to continue to make a difference.
Mandela

Peter Willis,

Public school teachers are the backbone of
American society, but sadly, we don't treat them like that.

Fifteen hedge fund managers make more than every single Kindergarten
teacher combined, and Bernie Sanders is fighting back.

As HELP Committee Chair, his plan would set a $60,000 minimum wage for all
teachers, which is the least we can do given all we ask them to do.

name: Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate
subject: 5 reasons why you should donate $5 or more toward our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce before midnight TONIGHT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
This is Democrats’ best chance to flip a Senate seat in 2024 — but we can’t do it without your help.
#
Peter — here are 5 reasons why you should donate $5 or more toward our goal of raising $20,000 before midnight TONIGHT:
1. **Lucas Kunce is our best chance to flip a U.S. Senate seat in 2024** — and after he launched his campaign to defeat Josh Hawley earlier this year, _National Journal_ even said our movement “represents one of the Democratic Party’s better offensive targets” this cycle.
2. **Josh Hawley’s cowardice on January 6th made him the GOP’s most vulnerable senator.** His support base in-state is crumbling and a recent report showed a growing “intensely negative sentiment” about Hawley among Missourians.
3. **Lucas’ bold message is already resonating with voters.** Whether it’s calling out Hawley for being a fraud or corrupt politicians for failing to actually serve the people they were elected to represent, Lucas has earned in-state and national media attention for speaking truth to power.
4. **National Republicans are attacking Lucas relentlessly.** Hawley’s campaign and GOP insiders at the NRSC know Lucas has the message + momentum to flip this seat — and they’re doing whatever it takes to tear him (and our grassroots movement) down before it’s too late.
5. **If we start strong, we can win — that’s why your early investment could make all the difference.** If we have the resources _right from the start_ to get Lucas’ message in front of voters and stave off GOP attacks, we really can defeat Josh Hawley and take this seat back for everyday Missourians.

**So what do you say, Peter?[Will you chip in $5 or more toward our goal of raising $20,000 before midnight tonight so we’ll have the resources to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31920?refcode=em20230430-3059&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3059%2E614464%2EMfkL4_)**

[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31921?refcode=em20230430-3059&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=2&akid=3059%2E614464%2EMfkL4_) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31921?refcode=em20230430-3059&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=3059%2E614464%2EMfkL4_) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31921?refcode=em20230430-3059&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=3059%2E614464%2EMfkL4_) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31921?refcode=em20230430-3059&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=3059%2E614464%2EMfkL4_) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31921?refcode=em20230430-3059&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=3059%2E614464%2EMfkL4_) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31921?refcode=em20230430-3059&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=3059%2E614464%2EMfkL4_) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31920?refcode=em20230430-3059&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=3059%2E614464%2EMfkL4_)
---
It’s time to elect a real warrior for working people to represent Missouri in the U.S. Senate — not a fraud and a coward like Josh Hawley.
This is our shot to get it done.
Thanks for being part of it,
Team Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230430-3059-footer&t=9&refcode2=3059_614464_MfkL4_&akid=3059%2E614464%2EMfkL4_)**

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: A fight for our community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
Peter, our campaign is about so much more than just keeping OH-13 blue. It’s about fighting for our Northeast Ohio community and the hardworking people who make it feel like home.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62559108/403848269/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.30_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTViNTA3YS02NGU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RH6QlTrvUgie7Anb5_cN-BTIqeJCE3eHHyTNKvZRyhA=)
Hi there, it’s Emilia. I wanted to reach out, personally, before tonight’s end-of-month deadline.

**Peter, our campaign is about so much more than just keeping OH-13 blue. It’s about fighting for our Northeast Ohio community and the hardworking people who make it feel like home.**

But these days, an essential part of fighting for our community includes ensuring the dangerous, out-of-touch Republican agenda – _an extreme agenda that endangers our community, prioritizes politics over people, and falls far out-of-line with our community's values_ – stays far away from OH-13.

Look, we are a community of people who want to safeguard our jobs and bolster economic opportunity in Northeast Ohio, not eliminate jobs here at home and ship them overseas.

We are a community of people who want to ensure our Seniors receive the hard-earned benefits and healthcare they deserve, not gut Social Security and Medicare.

We are a community of people who want to protect our environment and preserve access to clean drinking water, not give handouts to Big Oil and polluters who will contaminate our air and water.

And we are a community of people who want more personal freedoms, not less.

**Peter, I vow to always put our Northeast Ohio community first.[But in a race as competitive as ours, I’m going to need your help to ensure I can stay, fighting for OH-13, in Washington. That’s why I have to ask: Before our April end-of-month deadline at midnight, can I count on you to chip in $5, $25, or whatever makes sense for you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62559109/403848270/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.30_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTViNTA3YS02NGU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RH6QlTrvUgie7Anb5_cN-BTIqeJCE3eHHyTNKvZRyhA=)**

clean_body: Peter, our campaign is about so much more than just keeping OH-13 blue. It’s about fighting for our Northeast Ohio community and the hardworking people who make it feel like home. = Hi there, it’s Emilia. I wanted to reach out, personally, before tonight’s end-of-month deadline. Peter, our campaign is about so much more than just keeping OH-13 blue. It’s about fighting for our Northeast Ohio community and the hardworking people who make it feel like home. But these days, an essential part of fighting for our community includes ensuring the dangerous, out-of-touch Republican agenda – an extreme agenda that endangers our community, prioritizes politics over people, and falls far out-of-line with our community's values – stays far away from OH-13. Look, we are a community of people who want to safeguard our jobs and bolster economic opportunity in Northeast Ohio, not eliminate jobs here at home and ship them overseas. We are a community of people who want to ensure our Seniors receive the hard-earned benefits and healthcare they deserve, not gut Social Security and Medicare. We are a community of people who want to protect our environment and preserve access to clean drinking water, not give handouts to Big Oil and polluters who will contaminate our air and water. And we are a community of people who want more personal freedoms, not less. Peter, I vow to always put our Northeast Ohio community first.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you for being in this fight with me, Emilia A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change. Friends, Our end-of-month deadline is MIDNIGHT today, and we need your help to meet our monthly fundraising goal. Unfortunately, we're still $1,215 away. name: Add Your Name | Left Action
subject: Add your name if you’re on board with stronger banking regulations
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Add your name if you agree we need stronger bank regulations](https://default.salsalabs.org/T66709126-164b-46a2-9fcc-6fc3ef956c7a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tedc4a1d3-fd0a-4f48-8e5d-426cb12b21b7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _(We can't afford more bank failures![ Please show your support Elizabeth Warren's new bill](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5720dba4-f80d-4421-8432-38898ac4eaf4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to bring back sensible banking regulations!)_ The failures of Silicon Valley Bank and Signature Bank were a direct result of Donald Trump weakening our banking regulations. **We can't wait for an even bigger bank failure before taking action. The banking industry needs to follow stronger rules ASAP.[ Senator Elizabeth Warren proposed a bill with Congresswoman Katie Porter to get this done. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td7d61a03-3e82-4b63-a029-98b35bb74513/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** This legislation repeals a key piece of Trump's bill, which eased regulations on banks that controlled assets ranging from $50 to $250 billion. A minimum of $50 billion in assets isn't pocket change, and needs to be strongly regulated. [Banking should be boring](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9cffe835-f58b-4a36-b0de-161551c63adc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). It should never involve this kind of high-stakes theatrics, especially when so many livelihoods are involved. Anyone who wants to take on a lot of risk to make a lot of money quickly should not be in banking. Trump's bill made it easier for banks to load up on risk to boost their profits without being subject to enhanced capital requirements and stress tests to prevent a collapse. We need to go back to better regulation to make banking more boring again. **If you're on board with stronger banking regulations that protect consumers and our economy,[ add your name to show your support for Sen. Elizabeth Warren's legislation. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T015abbd5-9f80-49ab-b820-ce1a5f7970c1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tba40bd4a-a99d-4817-8bab-3b917d858135/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_
---
|
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ec4c6f8-fd9b-4b2e-a60d-79ba029f1b81/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T60f8ae79-1fcb-4176-b07b-0aaa23d0ad3f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T97a1b3a0-ae6f-4667-ba34-1f63eaf2b3ad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb68b7725-de34-474f-9768-a0deee1e624f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
Follow Us | [](https://Facebook.com/LeftAction) | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=LeftAction) | [](https://www.instagram.com/left_action/)
---|---|---

Washington, District of Columbia
info@leftaction.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tyler=20B.=20Jones?=
subject: Have lunch with Shad White
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8133028?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
Last year, State Auditor Shad White released a report highlighting the high crime rate in Jackson.

**It found that every homicide in the southeastern United States costs taxpayers roughly $900,000 to $1.2 million. Based on these statistics, this means Mississippi spent between $136.8 and $182.4 million dollars alone on homicides in our capital city in 2021. **

Shad White will be speaking next Thursday, May 4, on ways he believes our state can lower these crime rates and save taxpayer money.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1a13773a49&e=5703353baa)
---
**_Click on the image above to reserve a ticket!_**
| **White will be joined by best-selling author Rafael Mangual, who makes the case that more policing leads to less crime. ****Tickets can be found[here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1a126cfd44&e=5703353baa). **

Each ticket comes with a copy of Mangual's book, "Criminal (In)Justice." You don't want to miss out!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=9375b24e6a&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
All the Best,

Tyler B. Jones
Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs

---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=e34c08b7dc) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=e34c08b7dc).

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friend, Last year, State Auditor Shad White released a report highlighting the high crime rate in Jackson. It found that every homicide in the southeastern United States costs taxpayers roughly $900,000 to $1.2 million. Based on these statistics, this means Mississippi spent between $136.8 and $182.4 million dollars alone on homicides in our capital city in 2021. Shad White will be speaking next Thursday, May 4, on ways he believes our state can lower these crime rates and save taxpayer money. | Click on the image above to reserve a ticket! | White will be joined by best-selling author Rafael Mangual, who makes the case that more policing leads to less crime. Tickets can be found. Each ticket comes with a copy of Mangual's book, "Criminal (In)Justice." You don't want to miss out! | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | All the Best, Tyler B. Jones Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs | | |

name: Roy Cooper (personal)
subject: a longer email that needs your attention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
About our shared values. | Hey Peter, I’m reaching out to you because I know that we share a few essential beliefs: That our democracy is worth fighting for. That our fundamental rights should not be up for debate. That the climate crisis is real and urgent. That all people are worthy of respect and dignity. And that we can always make more progress — provide more opportunities — for our people. These are values that far-right politicians are threatening here in North Carolina and all across our country. Peter, to protect our nation’s future, we need to elect Democratic leaders who share those values and are ready to do whatever it takes to secure them. You can help do just that by donating to power our efforts in NC at this link that’s unique to you: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc_em_apr-eom23?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62560388/403852892/34016365?refcode=ea.018857b5-67e7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.018857b5-67e7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTg4NTdiNS02N2U3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mhtB6rFjdrP-9h9YWS4CfDcVfWDyRS8xCua8UffzFTM=)** North Carolina will be among the most competitive battleground states in next year’s crucial elections, but I’m confident that, with sustained investment and a lot of hard work, we can bring home victories for Democrats. That’s what I told President Biden, too — and I made him a promise: that 2024 would be the year we flip NC blue in the presidential election. Peter, we need to lay the groundwork now for Democrats’ success next year, and I need your help to do it. If we don’t meet my team’s $20,000 fundraising goal for April, we’ll have to cut back on our plans in the months ahead. I cannot let that happen. We’re about $5,200 short of our target with only hours left before the month is over. I’m asking you to contribute anything you can right now to help hit our goal. Here’s that link again where you can give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc_em_apr-eom23?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62560389/403852893/34016365?refcode=ea.018857b5-67e7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.018857b5-67e7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTg4NTdiNS02N2U3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mhtB6rFjdrP-9h9YWS4CfDcVfWDyRS8xCua8UffzFTM=)** Thank you very much, Roy Cooper

clean_body: We cannot afford to sit back and do nothing while our communities are devastated. | = | Peter, Brian here. Sorry to interrupt your Sunday, but we have an important deadline tonight. Stop Gun Violence PAC is investing in critical races across the country to elect gun violence prevention champions, pass lifesaving gun legislation, and save lives. But we need a concerted effort from supporters like you. = | = Every year, gun violence claims the lives of tens of thousands of Americans. We cannot afford to sit back and do nothing while our communities are devastated by these senseless acts of violence. Stop Gun Violence PAC is committed to electing gun violence prevention champions at every level of government. Our goal is to pass life-saving gun legislation that will help to reduce the number of deaths and injuries caused by firearms. But we can't do it alone. We need your support to fund our efforts and make a difference in the fight against gun violence. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Change starts with us. Brian Lemek * | | = Paid for by Stop Gun Violence PAC Stop Gun Violence PAC 600 PENNSYLVANIA AVE SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States | = If you do not wish to receive emails about this important movement to end gun violence, please

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWUcMfWDnN

Hillsdale College

Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey
on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWUcMfWDnN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Your participation in Hillsdale
College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is
requested.

Your response will only take a few
minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and
the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the
proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court
differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the
bench.

Do you agree that the role of the
Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and
NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?

YES

NO

Even worse, progressives dismayed by
recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with
additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put
it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to
a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by
four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you
today...

What is your opinion about the Supreme
Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me
using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme
Court right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form
effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the
importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the proper
role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution
instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your National
Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61748842:WUcMfWDnN:m:3:2532013465:DC0BE5CAD04AE168FBA87BAAAB723493:r

Thank you for your time and
attention-and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty
since 1844

Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI
49242 USA

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: This makes a lot of classist, ageist, misogynist, and racist people mad.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Alexandria is the youngest woman in U.S. history to be elected to Congress. She was a waitress. She is Latina. She comes from a low-income background and is one of just a few working-class people elected to Congress.
That makes a lot of classist, ageist, misogynist, and racist people mad.
But together with your support, we’ve built a movement fighting for transformative change — from Medicare for All to democratizing fundraising power in politics.
[If you’d like to help support our movement, could you donate $3 or anything you can afford right now to help us reach our $400,000 end-of-month fundraising goal before midnight tonight?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230430-1.k3yh3t&refcode=em20230430-4245-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4245%2E2526796%2EReVCuG)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230430-1.k3yh3t&refcode=em20230430-4245-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4245%2E2526796%2EReVCuG)**
AOC and our movement are often labeled “extreme.” Here’s what they think makes us extreme:
* AOC believes in Medicare for All, aka guaranteed healthcare in the United States.
* AOC operates independently from either party’s establishment. So she is willing to challenge Democratic Party leadership and, when necessary, break from the party line.
* Our movement does not believe in late stage capitalism or that prioritizing the extreme pursuit of profit at any and all human/environmental costs will save us. AOC believes in cooperative economics and cooperative democracy, aka democratic socialism.

This campaign is funded by grassroots, small-dollar donations and AOC accepts $0 in corporate money (the average donation to this campaign is around $16).
[ If you believe in fighting for a brighter future for all, please contribute $3 today to help us reach our $400,000 end-of-month fundraising goal before midnight tonight.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230430-1.k3yh3t&refcode=em20230430-4245-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4245%2E2526796%2EReVCuG)
Thank you so much for your support,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230430-1?refcode=em20230430-4245-P_FND_EOM_GOL&t=22&refcode2=4245_2526796_ReVCuG&akid=4245%2E2526796%2EReVCuG)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230430-4245-P_FND_EOM_GOL&t=23&akid=4245%2E2526796%2EReVCuG)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=4245%2E2526796%2EReVCuG) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=4245%2E2526796%2EReVCuG) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=4245%2E2526796%2EReVCuG)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=4245%2E2526796%2EReVCuG)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=4245%2E2526796%2EReVCuG)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Brandon Presley
subject: 'Ripe for an upset' sounds good to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
| | | Hey Peter, I just came across something that caught my attention: _**“Democrats see Mississippi governor’s race as ripe for an upset”**_
[**_\- The Hill_**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXco6vcBYB09C7k6u0pWYzsEGeXuMdcpwJzXMhK_Wt4xnaqpsMgJnFV5U7246rUbzii5K-a-bHzVnaG9A1l0cUgwDgbrhNN30_pAxYN_AACsMapSllR_FrU4HW5Ub5roP1peUizWOgeX8aN633mKkPXQUrDFqMnzlQWJrJX7bNPzfSzeGDgTYb4o3C7FmO9VVHCBAYZv3Uy7c7TU_0WwKHgbre_9NjuCdMWVpgOf5j0ib9OkwIwKpYoe5vBrLtC0giG6QmmYIQSfpaSGwa3H1GQiGOOCw54S7-KwCky8YINhI8qxTgTNCxuC8MbNmPBSApH_zrSy9CjzCw2AmxEJshjKWdzWxLC9KOrfAeEO7UrThuLbxPUUVch6NA-jRcMDB6Mvxm3p5p7jv03EmPP3_nc6AWdduKJvMdMz-Lg_1HCCzfGHJXXNeLf16sZdeV5qly-LVPKaTKCR47oRnyLO8VqQ/3vs/YbLvlvH3R16bCzKZua3wwQ/h0/MkRf29Tmk7RpysdqMUTuz7Wz-EpnOhkQQRGlh_ReZjw) Before I tell you why that headline is so important, let me introduce myself. I'm running against Republican Tate Reeves for Mississippi governor. I got into this race to fight corruption and serve working people and families. I've heard from political pundits and pollsters that this campaign is not going to be easy. Tate Reeves opposes it. 79% support fully funding Mississippi public schools for needs like teachers, textbooks, buses, water, and lights. Tate Reeves fights against it. 68% favor suspending or eliminating the ridiculous 7% grocery tax. Tate Reeves just ignores public outcry like it's no big deal. It's time to say enough is enough. We can do better than this guy. So let's get to work and send Tate packing. clean_body: CNN will lose their minds reporting this! | | | Friend, 24 hours after I was indicted, our campaign PUBLICLY reported how much money we raised. It was over $4 million! But Crooked Joe Biden’s campaign was DEAD SILENT on how much it raised in the first 24 hours following his RE-ELECTION announcement. That meant his fundraising had to be AWFUL. And now we have proof... “Biden’s Donors Haven’t Cut Enough Big Checks Yet, Worrying Allies” [Source: Bloomberg] With less than 48 HOURS until the April end-of-month deadline, we have a REAL SHOT at OUTRAISING Crooked Joe during his announcement month! Wouldn’t that be beautiful, Friend? Could you imagine the faces of CNN’s “journalists” when they’re forced to report that we outraised Biden’s swamp donors? As I’ve always said – Crooked Joe’s special interest donors can cut MASSIVE checks – but there will always be MORE OF US than there are of them. Even $1 can OUTRAISE Biden... But it only works if we all step up, which is why I’m asking you to make a contribution of ANY AMOUNT to be part of the movement that OUTRAISES Crooked Joe. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. clean_body: These early months are our best opportunity to build a strong campaign infrastructure that will power us to victory = Hey friend, I just had a meeting with my team and unfortunately, we are still pacing behind in our end of month fundraising goal. Our deadline is tonight at midnight , and we still need to raise $1,231 to close the gap. = The truth is, I don’t like asking for your hard-earned money – so you can bet that I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important. But it's critical that we hit this $5,000 goal because these early months are our best opportunity to build a strong campaign infrastructure that will power us to victory. So, I have to ask: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you for your support, Andrea | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. subject: Update on our April goal:
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
I know the election might seem far away, but trust me—we have a lot of work to do between now and then, and frankly, the time will go by fast.
As Campaign Treasurer, I know one of the most important things we can do to make sure Lizzie can continue fighting for us in Congress is to raise as much money as we can early and reach our fundraising goals. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230430?refcode=folf230430_1]
Our next fundraising deadline is tonight and I’m encouraged by the strong support we’ve been receiving this month.
We’re making great progress toward our goal, and it’s a testament to you, your support, and the coalition we’ve built over the past three elections.
We need to keep up our momentum. Can I count on you to give $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can before tonight’s deadline? Here’s a link where you can contribute: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230430?refcode=folf230430_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230430?refcode=folf230430_1]
Thank you for your support!
Gordon Center

subject: Deadline
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april23?refcode=043023eom3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-april23?refcode=043023eom3]
Hi friend,
We have an important end of month deadline today. We’re looking at how we will be able to staff up our operation as we get closer to 2024, and our grassroots donors play a key role in that planning. If we can get 55 DFLers to make their Political Contribution Refund (PCR), that will make a huge impact. With your PCR contribution you can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and get it refunded to you by the state of Minnesota. Will you help us protect our House DFL majority and make your refundable PCR contribution today?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Mark Warren

name: Diana
subject: I don't see your response... -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi team -- it’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

I’m reaching out because President Biden's approval hit its highest point in almost a YEAR, **_and that could be a leading indicator of a MASSIVE blue wave!_**

The president’s standing among voters like you is a key driver of voter turnout patterns, so it’s **_critical_** that we have accurate state-by-state data to help us make necessary strategic decisions.

But I just checked our President Biden approval poll and didn’t see your response -- in fact, without hearing your answers, we will NOT be able to reach statistical significance for our poll in Pennsylvania!

**Our Live Poll is closing at 11:59 P.M.,_so please answer immediately:_**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12387?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230430-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalSurge-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230430-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalSurge-Pros-sl1&akid=10602%2E9716520%2EoTPKRn)
**Do you approve of President Biden?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/12387?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230430-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalSurge-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230430-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalSurge-Pros-sl1&akid=10602%2E9716520%2EoTPKRn)

---

Thank you for your input,

Diana
Research Director, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: the 1 percent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
April Showers bring May Flowers
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62562323/403860205/-1140859173?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.04.30_B1_EOM-2_Main-90o_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTFkM2JlNi02YmU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fHjdjrYQQfY0gSA7rq7et5iTvAXsz8xLysaf9Zw3yFA=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62562324/403860206/-1140859173?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.04.30_B1_EOM-2_Main-90o_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTFkM2JlNi02YmU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fHjdjrYQQfY0gSA7rq7et5iTvAXsz8xLysaf9Zw3yFA=) Folks,

Republicans in Congress are really concerned with the 1 percent.

They want to give them an easy ride – slashing their taxes, allowing them to influence legislation. It's absurd.

**Here's the 1 percent I'm worried about:** the 1 percent of donors who have made at least 2 donations to me.

# Webster Republican Committee AnneMarie Santoro Crabapple Gala
---
---
Senator Ortt spoke at the Webster Republican Committee's AnneMarie Santoro Crabapple Gala. He was honored to present their Elmer Smith award to his friend and colleague, [Senator Pam Helming](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001af2c9ZFPawhNbuRLAZRH9G_wK0OPtildapNsE3SSiyxpevjmgbLDyRdGK8rc72UIDc9bw9Bz6CSpwu4bClpKUGrhfL3ae9NKNkCsTdkhaclL578CdUIlPRrjuVi0tpzubBA47z686NFVyqu3zHjLN3O7af6I8Tm_E5Z03XotbyMtyYQOCQLqXQCZPirx1r3Zoax6uYeX9WqtZaSYBI2gQa8iQ7zZ43Siclhf9c7iSWPq3VCSdbk9Nz9-OTFbE4suHELlKUHn9plcb12Q7hp2qBacf-5b6gEtfBjhdnwc0W7FxG6Cp3aAgqf__OsNBfD-DDg52zzfNBbEccbM0q9mz3XtfKA19Q5PMl6VpUYOVjyZ8exj_gfzM5kstWTFakDIq7Bsq-v34gOUjnwDfuHs6rF3x4fND4tnmDSTJxQNoDD8oUdR4liz_GrFGdIibj74yNC6ZpRiUA0oppCpMVI1yzpp_wL3AqjGKPsbo2782wo=&c=8RjSPC59iIPyqeej0gXSPnYXFBYbfD5G9Vux_I64uHqhKbGUGHJrTA==&ch=tTVODPvR8nIxZZAKtEd9XbunbCfULZ3Q10yqv6S75rXLrHhttJOBvg==).
The award honors exceptional public servants who put time and effort into bettering the Webster community. There is no one who embodies this passion for public service better than Senator Helming.

# New York Post \- NYC DAs blast discovery reform tweak as ineffective, leaving changes to state trail law in jeopardy

A reported state budget overhaul of discovery reform appears to have fallen apart after New York City district attorneys said it would do little to stop a deluge of dropped cases. "The language on the table will not have a meaningful public safety impact," reads a joint statement released Thursday afternoon by Alvin Bragg of Manhattan, Darcel Clark of the Bronx, Eric Gonzalez of Brooklyn, Melinda Katz of Queens, and Michael McMahon of Staten Island.
...
But critics of the deal are now wondering why Albany Democrats will impose the 35-day timeline now that district attorneys say they no longer want a budget deal that appears on the brink of getting approved until they released their letter. And any political credit for Hochul for pushing for that deal appears to be dissolving as well as the budget impasse continued Thursday. "Imagine negotiating a public safety change that is so meaningless you make Alvin Bragg look pro public safety," state Senate Republican Minority Leader Robert Ortt (R-Lockport) tweeted.

We have to win in 2024, so we can work on policies that help working families get ahead. Unfortunately, we’ve seen extreme National Republicans focus on the wrong priorities since winning the House. They’ve pushed a budget that would make deep cuts in our national budget that would take away health care from seniors, children and veterans. They’ve tried to roll back our efforts to fight climate change and create good-paying manufacturing jobs. And extreme Republican judges have continued their war on your personal freedoms to make your own health care decisions, including the right to an abortion.

There’s a lot at stake, and that’s why we’re kicking off our organizing across mid-Michigan earlier than ever.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: This daily savagery is only possible because GOP controlled states PURPOSELY eliminate regulations so any would-be murderer can get any gun at any time.
body:
Awash in guns
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c259950-f8d9-4847-9732-169e8da6e84f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | **My Friends, sometimes all I can do to keep from being distraught is try to make a difference in a world currently mad.** _In Cleveland, TX, a family whose baby was trying to sleep asked a nextdoor neighbor to stop shooting his gun. He rejected their plea, and a soon after_** _this vicious, evil man, Franscisco Orepeza, entered their house with an AR-15 to murder the family._** **_The human scum executed an 8-year-old boy. It's hard to write that and not break down. The bodies of women were found on top of 2 surviving children. They gave their lives so their kids could survive._** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T192b0e8e-030e-469b-a26f-e01ab4e0b42a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Honestly, what the hell kind of country are we living in??_ _To be clear, this daily savagery is only possible because as every blue state makes assault rifle harder to get for terrorists & criminals,_**_ GOP controlled states PURPOSELY eliminate regulations so any murderer can get any gun at any time. And block the federal government form passing desperately needed laws. _** [**_All any of us can do is fight with all we've got to stop this sickness. Please join Blue Amp in giving Everytown--integral to our anti-gun violence sucesses--$5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, to beat Republcians and end our grisly gun plague._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb42d3311-c1c8-43b3-a2c0-732b153c9e03/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _I thank you all for fighting this fight, so someday soon we won't have to live like this._ _Cliff_

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T24d44e2c-8af8-4925-88e6-f679c200210b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: The bread and butter of my work
body:
In Congress this past month, I met with colleagues to work toward progress on paid family leave, reliable internet for all, and more.
| | |
---
Derek, in Congress this past month, I met with colleagues to work toward progress on paid family leave, reliable internet for all, and improvements in STEM education.

This is the bread and butter of my work, Derek – the reason I’m in this to begin with. My work is dedicated to you and your family, and I’m committed to building a better future for communities across PA-06 and the United States.
But the life of a representative is a precarious one. Every two years, we get put to the test at the ballot box, and my job is no different. With threats from the far right, we managed to sustain this fight in 2022, and now, as a critical member of this grassroots movement, I’m asking you if you’ll join me again.
**[_My team set a deadline of recruiting 100 Founding Members by midnight, Derek. Can I count on you to stand in this fight with me and become a Founding Member of my campaign for 2024? My ability to follow through on so many plans depends on how long I am in this office that I am honored to hold._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62563409/403864825/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk821-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjhkMTcxNy03MGU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rd2dsQ4VXLSIYmrzEyy_7fvOwfkVaTRMa4l7nME0qGU=)**

Hi friend,
Tomorrow we hit our first end-of-month fundraising deadline. We'll be straight: our numbers aren't where we need them to be. This is going to be a competitive primary, which means we need to build out the infrastructure of this campaign fast.
Can you rush an express donation of $1, $5 or $10 right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]

Peter,

Our fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight and I’m asking if you’ll step up to support our grassroots campaign by making a donation of $10 or any amount right now. [If you can, click here to chip in.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62563691/403865560/-1524014841?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20230430_FR_eom.1.4_0_6MO_sethmagaziner_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjQ3YzE0NC03MGU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vyvQA5UYOSnt0nbTWZsbYVFhQpaqrXTTK7S8Lob01vc=)

Here’s the deal: We’re gearing up for a tough race in 2024. Republicans nearly won our district last year, and now they’ve labeled me a top target going into the next election.

That means they’ll be spending big here in Rhode Island to try and win and expand their slim majority next year. We can’t take back the House majority unless we protect competitive seats like this one, so we need to stay on track with our fundraising benchmarks, even this far out from Election Day next year.

[Can I count on you to chip in $10 or any amount before midnight tonight? name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: What the pundits are saying
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=231%2E35263%2EZkhVk2)
Peter, someone on my team recently forwarded me an article from _The New Republic_ with the headline, “Guess Which 2020 Biden State Democratic Insiders Are Worried About Holding? It May Surprise You.” **Believe me, I wasn’t surprised when they said Wisconsin.** Our state gave Donald Trump the final electoral votes he needed to secure the presidency in 2016, and four years later, Wisconsin voters helped send President Joe Biden to the White House. **Both elections were decided by less than _one_ point. ** So, it comes as no surprise that election experts and strategists are saying that Wisconsin could, once again, be the “tipping point” state in the 2024 election. The tipping point between stability and chaos in the White House. The tipping point between progress and backward movement in the Senate. The tipping point between hope and fear across the country. **Peter, it very well could all come down to Wisconsin. The weight of this campaign isn’t lost on me.** The road ahead won’t always be easy. Republicans will do and spend whatever it takes to try to squeak by and win Wisconsin’s 10 electoral votes — and flip my Senate seat along the way. But with you on my side, I know we can cross the finish line victorious next year. To win, we’ll need to roll up our sleeves and put in hard work. We’ll need to knock thousands of doors, make countless phone calls, and do everything in our power to reach voters any way we can. **And we’ll need a lot of resources to fuel this work, so staying on track with our fundraising goals will be crucial. That’s why I’m hoping you can pitch in a few dollars before our fundraising deadline tonight. You can use this link to give today:[secure.actblue.com/donate/tbe-em-launch23?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230430_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=231%2E35263%2EZkhVk2)** Thanks so much for reading this long note. I’ve never turned down a challenge before, and I’m ready to face the next one head-on with you by my side. — Tammy
---
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=231%2E35263%2EZkhVk2) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=231%2E35263%2EZkhVk2)**

---

subject: LAST CHANCE: Become a 2023 Sustaining Member!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Contribute and become a 2023 Sustaining Member before 11:59PM TONIGHT!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

clean_body: | Peter, I’m proud of the work I do to deliver real changes for our diverse and dynamic 19th Congressional District. Whether it’s providing federal funding to our cities and counties to reduce homelessness, protecting our environment, controlling the deficit, supporting our veterans, or lowering the cost of prescription drugs, I’m committed to making the federal government work for you. I make it my main priority to deliver real results — which is why I’m on the ground most of the time. Peter, working for solutions is my first priority, but I do still have to make sure my fundraising is on track. So the sooner we meet this month's fundraising goal, the sooner I can focus on issues that matter most to you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: = = = = = = Thank you for all that you do, Jimmy Panetta If you'd like to receive only the most important updates from us, Authorized and Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2024, FEC ID# C00592154 Jimmy Panetta for Congress PO Box 103 Carmel Valley, CA 93924 United States ** **

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Got a sec?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230430_em_sjj_eom2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230430_em_sjj_eom2]
Hi friends, I’m writing to follow up on the email my team sent you a couple of days ago about our April fundraising goal.
We’re trying to reach $3,000 raised from online supporters by midnight tonight, and we’re not quite there yet. Will you help close the gap? Click here to donate securely online. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230430_em_sjj_eom2]
Here’s the thing - if every single person reading this email just donated $1, we’d far surpass our goal right away!
I love that for a couple of reasons - first, because it’s pretty amazing to me that so many of you read these emails and keep in touch with me and my campaign through this medium. I’m so grateful that you open and read these!
But even more than that, I love the reminder that small actions can add up to something really big.
One dollar may seem insignificant. After all, it’s hard to even find a good cup of coffee for that much! But at scale, those small donations really do add up - and they really do make a difference in what we’re able to accomplish. The money we’re able to raise now will determine the investments we can make in online voter outreach, the strength of our organizing on the ground, even the help we can offer other great Democratic candidates.
And the stakes are just so incredibly high. With the climate crisis wreaking havoc on communities across California and the country, extremist Republicans fighting tooth and nail to roll back our reproductive rights, and the epidemic of gun violence continuing to take unbearable tolls on American families, Democrats simply cannot afford not to win in 2024.
So I’m making a personal request right now: Can you pitch in any amount - whether that’s $1 or $100 - to help make sure we are prepared to give 2024 our all? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230430_em_sjj_eom2]
Thank you so much.
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230430_em_sjj_eom2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230430_em_sjj_eom2]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

Peter,

I just got a call from my fundraising team, and to put it simply, I need your help. We’re behind on our 1,000 donor planting season goal and need a serious boost in donations today to catch up.

This is the last thing I wanted to hear since Sharla and I are busy finishing up prepping equipment and getting everything ready to start planting. So unless you're willing to get your hands dirty and spend 16 hours on a tractor with us, I need your help chipping in whatever you can.
**[Any amount you can contribute early in the campaign goes a long way in helping us grow our movement and reach these critical fundraising goals. Can I count on you to chip in and split a donation between my campaign and Patty Murray today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62564187/403867137/-1540803040?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk17-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTE1YzRjNC03MGU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GrqctXKOkw6q1y6DYqJWV_b0CuoU9aHldmqewHSHKyA=)**

clean_body: | | | | From abortion rights to affordable housing to data privacy, I'm committed to leveling the playing field for working families in Oregon and nationwide and holding corporations accountable for their greed. But I can't do it alone. I rely on the strength of this movement, and I need your help. = = Democrats are fighting to make our government – and our economy – work for working Americans, not just the rich and powerful. And now, with MAGA Republicans in Congress growing more extreme by the day, our movement is more important than ever. = Together we can make a more just and equitable world. body:
| | | Peter, On Wednesday in a 217-215 vote, the Republican-controlled House narrowly passed a debt ceiling bill that:
* Blocks student loan forgiveness
* Makes drastic cuts to food stamps and Medicaid
* Makes it harder for seniors to get Social Security
* Guts veteran benefits
* Would throw nearly 800,000 Americans out of work
* All while letting the wealthy cheat on their taxes.1

This is a MAGA Republican wish list. And House Republicans are threatening to default on our country’s debts and cause an economic crisis unless they get their way. **It doesn’t have to be this way.** In 2024, we’ve identified key congressional districts in New York and California that went for Biden in 2020 where Republicans currently serve. And with your help, we can hold these Republicans accountable and begin the work now to flip these districts and put an end to MAGA hostage-taking. **[We need to raise $25,000 in the month of April from emails like this one to stay on track for this cycle — and right now we’re only about 93 donations away from reaching that goal. Will you contribute $10 before our end-of-month deadline tonight to make sure we have the resources to flip the House in 2024?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUcUFyeQboUgBe8gmeMhzY3Ws0BxmcdthZc5LyU6kO7qrhskgjt1G7rR3En4zEjcy_mzffXmyP3EEfkXTJTFbLopG7mpqnEmWWcVMWiGpyzFTUCdSgnmXHbGuR8SGPG63hTVpP2q81epytdMSIwFRO0oIkZhz_YFSJ66Vf4PdatIVE43FaRje6_BZS8Ynz8AuM3aKrJzIwzFjuh4PuKt3YMItqYGIMsobJircfOWvUtWJB5n9B6RADKodZ2rOCfFK8jQ6vOIaNmjaUmpKeGoBNwLtRMfAYfQFvFOvgwC6JXCuej1FIBFzca0c3e8SHac2-vmJj6r-2iUzBHXl6f7P1BdpXwHXfwrJtsRZzav4YkZWbySZMNUDc3Yg7tum6kjbm6GOaQDWccGHZgeMFO3Q1pReu_0olLvm0hHQxfzCD5xs/3vs/6Gwj6phsTQ6opLD-vkxxBg/h0/FRDA82Zw2kv93ZNQBH0k4jexxwv7-k2OoZVai375mZ4)** **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUcUFyeQboUgBe8gmeMhzY3Ws0BxmcdthZc5LyU6kO7qrhskgjt1G7rR3En4zEjcy_yoP-ziktYtOF0u3e79e4BuUmGlDcGEMjQfXwu5oA79rKGy6jGGf13NmBBDUXRsOl796DuoZwLRhQE3vRvoeHAHNbdmPm2ncV2oapSJplGOD3-bHR4MPiADtpcdLNlwZOFAnBpTTFGnHBsMo5HcjdoWGfLIW5MJSjBpE28HRiNyWNnzCfHx4-Ad2OKG1xDgcF6MnjZDLz0TmUH7Y7uUiXV4_958VwCAHJ0BcclOxT-27uvdRNbSJKSYjRhfLn8KNl2f4kiINrzLLeQy7MnzvnqsYFFygrhWKsw6l4LdA0KQ2PVYw-Nu9RWab-15K7Vm8j9XAPi3Y7kNuFJVvI_D-LvIlcyFKrJNZX-2RO-5rhykY/3vs/6Gwj6phsTQ6opLD-vkxxBg/h1/TuFYc-s61rHwzNZu2bxBR1V8d0iGnJUPA4JSFtd-atI)** Republican policies like slashing food stamps and letting the wealthy cheat on their taxes are deeply unpopular with the American public. The only way they can even try and pass such a deeply unpopular agenda is to hold the economy hostage and threaten to default on our national debt.

clean_body: | | | Peter, On Wednesday in a 217-215 vote, the Republican-controlled House narrowly passed a debt ceiling bill that: Blocks student loan forgiveness Makes drastic cuts to food stamps and Medicaid Makes it harder for seniors to get Social Security Guts veteran benefits Would throw nearly 800,000 Americans out of work All while letting the wealthy cheat on their taxes.1 This is a MAGA Republican wish list. And House Republicans are threatening to default on our country’s debts and cause an economic crisis unless they get their way. It doesn’t have to be this way. In 2024, we’ve identified key congressional districts in New York and California that went for Biden in 2020 where Republicans currently serve. And with your help, we can hold these Republicans accountable and begin the work now to flip these districts and put an end to MAGA hostage-taking. Republican policies like slashing food stamps and letting the wealthy cheat on their taxes are deeply unpopular with the American public. The only way they can even try and pass such a deeply unpopular agenda is to hold the economy hostage and threaten to default on our national debt. With the Treasury set to default on our debts as early as June,2 this reckless showmanship by the MAGA Republicans in the House could result in massive job loss and steer our economy towards a recession. We need to make sure Republicans pay a political price for their irresponsibility. In solidarity, Team WFP Source: 1\. , The Washington Post, April 26, 2023 2\. , ABC News, April 26, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m personally asking you to join my reelection campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Can I explain something, folks?
I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents.
In fact, I’m very proud to be the only U.S. Senator who manages a full-time job outside the Senate — as a farmer .
Every spring, I spend weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive.
I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand.
The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy — but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded.
And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with Republican special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do.
That’s why I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team and split $15 between Seth Moulton and my campaign today to help us block Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate. Anything you can give makes a difference. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Thank you so much for sticking by me. I promise to spend every ounce of time fighting for you and your families (when I’m not out in the field, of course).
— Jon
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]

name: laura (personal)
subject: checking in with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
Friend,
Before running for Congress, I remember my inbox getting flooded with desperate, hair-on-fire emails from other campaigns. To be completely honest, I hated them.
The exaggerations and obnoxious scare tactics only lessened my enthusiasm. That’s why I told my team I wanted to do things differently.
I don’t love asking for money, but ever since the _Citizens United_ decision, elections have become more expensive and candidate fundraising has become much more vital. And as it stands today, _three of my opponents have pulled in more cash than we have._
We’re roughly short $6,270 of our April goal to get back on track. If you can, please chip in $3 to help us close the gap: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q2-2023](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62565941/403873871/62647395?refcode=em-4.30.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjczMDRmNjQtNzZlNy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qS2rtY6yAM7eIAXzMym3aazneXcsL77c1OXqxAT9rUc=)
Believe it or not, most of our donations come in on emails just like this one. We don't have billionaires or big special interests backing us the way others in this race might. This campaign is corporate money free, so when I say we're counting on your support, I truly mean it!
I’d appreciate anything you can give to help us meet this goal before April comes to a close.
Here’s the link again to chip in: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q2-2023](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62565942/403873872/62647395?refcode=em-4.30.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjczMDRmNjQtNzZlNy1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qS2rtY6yAM7eIAXzMym3aazneXcsL77c1OXqxAT9rUc=)
Thanks,
Laura

Los Angeles, CA 90027

name: Swalwell HQ
subject: No ifs, ands, or buts about it…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
We MUST take back the House in 2024. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62565943/403873875/-246429796?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzA5Y2M1Yi03NmU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XZQ5UHfe5ZO38riCJI6MAyUBtcwRmS35wLVxQNILAJs=)
Team, **It’s the last day of April and we wanted to take one last chance to reach out to you because we are still $1000 short from an important end-of-month fundraising goal.** Now, you may be thinking... **_Why should you care?_** Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA mob have made it clear that everything is on the chopping block: common sense gun policies, reproductive health care, LGBTQ+ rights, and so much more. If we turn a blind eye and fail to reach critical fundraising deadlines, Americans will continue to be victims of MAGA extremism. **_Does this really matter?_** Republicans in Congress will use anything in their power to continue to please the ultra-wealthy, all while controlling how everyday Americans live their lives, what care they receive, and who they love. This extremist policy agenda is sending our democracy into a spiral and we must act. **_What can you do?_** Eric and his Democratic colleagues have no option but to take back the House in 2024 — and together, our grassroots movement will power us across the finish line, and save our democracy. [**If you’re with us, rush a donation to Eric before the midnight end-of-month deadline. Our future will be determined by the leadership of people like Eric. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62565944/403873876/-1813554275?refcode=E21332-20230430-IfsAndsButs-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzA5Y2M1Yi03NmU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XZQ5UHfe5ZO38riCJI6MAyUBtcwRmS35wLVxQNILAJs=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: everything we’ve raised is going to be public | = Peter, we have just hours until we have to close the books on our very first public reporting deadline. Everything we’ve raised to make Brandon Presley the next governor of Mississippi is going to be released. = = | = We know that Tate Reeves is caught up in the largest public corruption scandal in Mississippi history – and that the majority of the state is fed up with his self-serving politics. But if we’re going to replace him this November, we need a surge of grassroots donations to help us meet tonight’s deadline. This is the biggest test of our campaign yet, Peter. Mississippi is going to be watching our report to see if we have what it takes to fight Tate Reeves from now until Election Day. = Thanks for all you do, Team Presley | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O.
