body:
Today is the final day of our end-of-month fundraising push to raise $40,000 in grassroots donations — and we’re closing the gap!
#
Peter,
Today is the final day of our end-of-month fundraising push to raise $40,000 in grassroots donations — and we’re just $1,200 away from closing the gap!
[****](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41799?refcode=em20230430-2430&t=1&akid=2430%2E420207%2EWKZR8u)
**[With less than 12 hours until we hit our midnight deadline, we’re reaching out to ask one last time if you are able to help us secure our April fundraising with a donation of $3 or more today. Click here to contribute, if you’re ready to push this campaign to the finish line.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41799?refcode=em20230430-2430&t=2&akid=2430%2E420207%2EWKZR8u)**
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41799?refcode=em20230430-2430&t=21&akid=2430%2E420207%2EWKZR8u)**
Since Pramila was elected to Congress, we have seen what it really means to lead with love, compassion, and a vision for progressive change. Pramila knows that the only way we’ll see true transformative change is by shaking up the status-quo, and putting pressure on those who have the power to make a difference.
But while Pramila is in Congress fighting for our rights, we need to ensure that we’re keeping up this fight for her through grassroots support. Every single dollar makes a difference, Peter. Just take another look at our goal tracker above — single-dollar donations are propelling our movement forward. And we can’t afford to slow down our momentum now.
**[Will you stand with our movement today and chip in $3 or whatever you’re able to give to help us meet our end-of-month fundraising goal? We need everyone in this fight with us to ensure that our momentum can continue to grow.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41799?refcode=em20230430-2430&t=22&akid=2430%2E420207%2EWKZR8u)**
Together,
Jayapal HQ

body:
Getting straight to the point:

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62566238/403875029/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230430EOM3_N_KK_FULL_8_NG_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmYmY4MDkzLTc3ZTctZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lTr16qa6GDU8dSPai06bwpUX_l7cCEbmZyEWf5rcEs0=)
| Fellow activist, we don't have much time to waste so allow me to get straight to the point.

**FIRST,** we have until _MIDNIGHT TONIGHT_ to reach our end-of-month goal before the Primary Election. This $4,000 goal will support our work in engaging voters for the upcoming Primary Election, and help us get a head start on registering voters for the General Election in November.

**SECOND,** tomorrow is our last day to register voters for the Primary Election on May 16. Every person we register today is another voice represented on the ballot, and we cannot afford to fall short now. **[The final days leading to the voter registration deadline on May 1st are some of the busiest and most productive voter registration days of the year. Can you chip in $10 by midnight to help us close the gap to our goal and make the most of the next two days?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62566239/403875030/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230430EOM3_N_KK_FULL_8_NG_A_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmYmY4MDkzLTc3ZTctZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lTr16qa6GDU8dSPai06bwpUX_l7cCEbmZyEWf5rcEs0=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62566240/403875031/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230430EOM3_N_KK_FULL_8_NG_A_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmYmY4MDkzLTc3ZTctZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lTr16qa6GDU8dSPai06bwpUX_l7cCEbmZyEWf5rcEs0=) There are **more than 1.2 million Pennsylvanians who are eligible to vote** at this moment but are not registered for various reasons. Our work – where we shine – is cutting through those reasons.

A long history of disenfranchisement and neglect has convinced many of Pennsylvania’s eligible voters that casting their vote simply isn’t worth the effort.

Of all of the Black folks here in the Commonwealth who are eligible to vote, 21% are not registered. That number jumps to 35% within the Latino community. And that number is even greater in the Asian American and Pacific Islander community, with 41% eligible to vote and not registered to vote in Pennsylvania.

As a voting rights organization with a primary purpose of year-round, consistent voter engagement, we are centering communities of color and the youth and talking to voters about the issues that matter most to them. This is how we collected 20,000 voter registration forms in our first full year in action, and it’s how we’re going to collect another 25,000 this year. **[But we can’t do it without you, fellow activist. Will you rush a donation of $10 right now to help us hit tonight’s end-of-month goal and move forward with the resources we need to hit our voter registration goal?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62566241/403875032/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230430EOM3_N_KK_FULL_8_NG_A_L2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmYmY4MDkzLTc3ZTctZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lTr16qa6GDU8dSPai06bwpUX_l7cCEbmZyEWf5rcEs0=)** Kadida Kenner
_Chief Executive Officer
The New Pennsylvania Project_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62566246/403875037/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230430EOM3_N_KK_FULL_8_NG_A_Signoff&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmYmY4MDkzLTc3ZTctZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lTr16qa6GDU8dSPai06bwpUX_l7cCEbmZyEWf5rcEs0=) | _The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election._ _[**______**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62566247/403875038/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230430EOM3_N_KK_FULL_8_NG_A_BIO&amount=40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmYmY4MDkzLTc3ZTctZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lTr16qa6GDU8dSPai06bwpUX_l7cCEbmZyEWf5rcEs0=)**[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62566248/403875039/550347785?refcode=EM_FR_230430EOM3_N_KK_FULL_8_NG_A_BIO&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmYmY4MDkzLTc3ZTctZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lTr16qa6GDU8dSPai06bwpUX_l7cCEbmZyEWf5rcEs0=)**_

clean_body: Getting straight to the point: = | Fellow activist, we don't have much time to waste so allow me to get straight to the point. FIRST, we have until MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to reach our end-of-month goal before the Primary Election. This $4,000 goal will support our work in engaging voters for the upcoming Primary Election, and help us get a head start on registering voters for the General Election in November. SECOND, tomorrow is our last day to register voters for the Primary Election on May 16. Every person we register today is another voice represented on the ballot, and we cannot afford to fall short now. = = There are more than 1.2 million Pennsylvanians who are eligible to vote at this moment but are not registered for various reasons. Our work – where we shine – is cutting through those reasons. A long history of disenfranchisement and neglect has convinced many of Pennsylvania’s eligible voters that casting their vote simply isn’t worth the effort. Of all of the Black folks here in the Commonwealth who are eligible to vote, 21% are not registered. That number jumps to 35% within the Latino community. And that number is even greater in the Asian American and Pacific Islander community, with 41% eligible to vote and not registered to vote in Pennsylvania. As a voting rights organization with a primary purpose of year-round, consistent voter engagement, we are centering communities of color and the youth and talking to voters about the issues that matter most to them. This is how we collected 20,000 voter registration forms in our first full year in action, and it’s how we’re going to collect another 25,000 this year. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Kadida Kenner Chief Executive Officer The New Pennsylvania Project = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to : May 1, 2023 Last day to : May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project

name: Robert Garcia
subject: I have a humble request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62566675/403876675/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTY1ZGM3OC03OGU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WXWCecJUEKemibEsV2eb0kLMcBakVTgK0F_iFzetfGA=)
**_Robert Garcia:
April Fundraising Deadline_**
**Goal:** $2,000
**Deadline:** **MIDNIGHT TONIGHT**
**Previous Online Supporter: Yes, thank you!**
**Suggested Donation:[$3.00](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62566685/403876683/871887457?refcode2=0165dc78-78e7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&refcode=em230430-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTY1ZGM3OC03OGU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WXWCecJUEKemibEsV2eb0kLMcBakVTgK0F_iFzetfGA=)**
Team, I am coming to you this morning with a humble request:
At midnight tonight, our campaign faces an important end-of-month fundraising deadline. If you have $5, $10, or even $100 to contribute, I would truly appreciate it.
Please use this link to donate:
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg-em-april23**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62566696/403876698/28553130?refcode2=0165dc78-78e7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&refcode=em230430-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTY1ZGM3OC03OGU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WXWCecJUEKemibEsV2eb0kLMcBakVTgK0F_iFzetfGA=)
As an immigrant, most would’ve never expected someone like me to end up as a member of Congress and truthfully, I did not expect it myself.
But for one, I care too much about Long Beach and Southeast LA, our state, and this country to let it fall into the hands of special interests that don’t value the needs of working Americans.
So when my team reached out to me earlier this week, letting me know that we are pacing behind our fundraising goals, I was concerned. Concerned that our movement is losing momentum.
But the reality is campaigns are expensive. But we cannot let money stop us from fighting for working class families, immigrants, LGBTQ+ communities, and everyone in between across California and across America.
So I am reaching out to you for your support because we need the resources to not only have to keep this seat safe, but fight as hard as we can to support candidates that can take back the House majority.
[**So if you can today, please make a contribution to my campaign for Congress before we reach our April end-of-month deadline at midnight. I would not ask if it weren’t so important.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62566702/403876709/28553130?refcode2=0165dc78-78e7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&refcode=em230430-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTY1ZGM3OC03OGU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WXWCecJUEKemibEsV2eb0kLMcBakVTgK0F_iFzetfGA=)
Thank you in advance for your contribution and for being a part of this team.
Onwards,
Robert
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62566707/403876714/28553130?refcode2=0165dc78-78e7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&refcode=em230430-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTY1ZGM3OC03OGU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WXWCecJUEKemibEsV2eb0kLMcBakVTgK0F_iFzetfGA=)**

name: Brendan via Team Helen
subject: The far-right billionaire attacking Helen on TV
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]
Team — Last night, we found out a shady outside group is buying up time on Philly TV stations. Tonight, their ads are up across the city, and they're attacking Helen directly.

I’ll explain more in a moment, but if you’re able to rush a donation right away, here’s a link to do so: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-fight-fund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-fight-fund]

The “coalition” that’s attacking Helen has close ties — and may even be directly funded by — Pennsylvania’s richest man: far-right billionaire Jeffrey Yass, who has a record of pushing to defund public schools and even funding the January 6 insurrection.

And these attacks could not come at a worse time. Early voting is underway in Philadelphia, and we just launched our last ad of the election. Now, we’ll need to directly compete with billionaire-funded attacks just as ballots are being cast.

That’s why Helen personally asked that we reach out:

Can you chip into our fight fund so we can respond to these attacks, keep our ads on TV, and fight for the bold solutions Philly needs? With fewer than twenty days left, your support is so crucial right now.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

CHIP IN $15 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-fight-fund?express_lane=true&amount=15]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-fight-fund?express_lane=true&amount=25]

CHIP IN $50 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-fight-fund?express_lane=true&amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-fight-fund?express_lane=true&amount=100]

CHIP IN $250 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-fight-fund?express_lane=true&amount=250]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-fight-fund]

I’ll be in touch with more information as we get it. Until then, we appreciate anything you can spare.

Onward,
Brendan McPhilips
Campaign Manager
Helen Gym for Mayor
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. clean_body: [] Team — Last night, we found out a shady outside group is buying up time on Philly TV stations. Tonight, their ads are up across the city, and they're attacking Helen directly. I’ll explain more in a moment, but if you’re able to rush a donation right away, here’s a link to do so: [] The “coalition” that’s attacking Helen has close ties — and may even be directly funded by — Pennsylvania’s richest man: far-right billionaire Jeffrey Yass, who has a record of pushing to defund public schools and even funding the January 6 insurrection. And these attacks could not come at a worse time. Early voting is underway in Philadelphia, and we just launched our last ad of the election. Now, we’ll need to directly compete with billionaire-funded attacks just as ballots are being cast. That’s why Helen personally asked that we reach out: Can you chip into our fight fund so we can respond to these attacks, keep our ads on TV, and fight for the bold solutions Philly needs? With fewer than twenty days left, your support is so crucial right now. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: CHIP IN $15 NOW [] CHIP IN $25 NOW [] CHIP IN $50 NOW [] CHIP IN $100 NOW [] CHIP IN $250 NOW [] ANOTHER AMOUNT [] I’ll be in touch with more information as we get it. Until then, we appreciate anything you can spare. Onward, Brendan McPhilips Campaign Manager Helen Gym for Mayor Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. I know you’re too smart to fall for their plan, but not everyone is as in-the-know as you, so it’s up to patriots like US to reveal the TRUTH. But right now, we’re running out of time. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: eric sorensen (personal)
subject: My least favorite part of running for Congress.
body:
It’s Sunday, so I’ll keep this brief, Peter.
**I’m reaching out to make sure you saw the news that we officially have a Republican challenger in my race. **
We'll be sharing more details about our opponent soon. For now, here's what you need to know: Since my election, national Republicans and their special interest allies have been working _aggressively_ to flip this seat.
I'll be honest, my least favorite part of campaigning is asking people to donate their hard-earned money. But an early challenge means we’ll likely begin seeing GOP attacks sooner rather than later. We can’t get caught off guard.
Midnight tonight marks an important fundraising deadline, and we're still coming up just a bit short of our goal. Can you use the personalized link below to chip in $3 before midnight?
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-q2-2023?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62567152/403877971/-665437442?refcode=em-4.30.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDc4ZTAwYy03OWU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VmRs7I6QQB-zlBUP9gXYmLSYQOSx5J2lDg-XwQ1ddMQ=)
Here’s my take: I don't believe money will be the most important factor in winning our race. It’s about which candidate is best equipped and the most trusted to handle the issues impacting our community.
When you donate, you send a message that our community is ready to keep a home-grown, trusted leader in office for a second term. To me, that’s much more powerful, and it's why I value your support.
Before tonight's deadline hits, please add a donation of $3 or more to help us hit our goal. I know we can do this.
Here's the link again: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-q2-2023?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62567153/403878037/-665437442?refcode=em-4.30.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDc4ZTAwYy03OWU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VmRs7I6QQB-zlBUP9gXYmLSYQOSx5J2lDg-XwQ1ddMQ=)
Thank you,
Eric

* * *

Eric Sorensen for Illinois
P.O. Box 1172
Moline, IL 61265
United States

name: Katy Frisch
subject: 538 was wrong about this one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
Hello,

In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert.

Everywhere you looked, the political pundits were calling Colorado’s 3rd Congressional District “Safe Republican” or “Solid R.”

Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes!
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62567671/403879797/-321553144?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2529-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzOGRiMDI3LTc5ZTctZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ffV-OTDpk7RX0l5NkWr9h8UvjWjDhTNGfy4Z6Nvqodw=)
In the end, though, the race went to a recount. **Lauren Boebert won by just 546 votes, and Adam lost the closest race in the entire country.**

Because here’s what their “models” and “forecasts” didn’t factor in: Adam put in the work. He traveled 24,000 miles in our red pickup truck to every corner of the district. He met thousands and thousands of voters – and he listened.

Now, my husband’s running again, and I’ll be honest: The first campaign was hard. But defeating Lauren Boebert is just too important to sit this out. **Adam’s all-in to finish the job in 2024. I’m all-in. Can we count on you?**
**[Please, if you can afford to, will you split a donation right now between Adam’s campaign and American Bridge PAC to help him defeat Lauren Boebert? We were outspent in 2022 and just barely lost. Whatever you can afford to give today will help us invest early and win.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62567672/403879809/-321553144?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2529-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzOGRiMDI3LTc5ZTctZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ffV-OTDpk7RX0l5NkWr9h8UvjWjDhTNGfy4Z6Nvqodw=)**

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Here’s the truth:
body:
With less than 12 hours left, we can still reach our critical end-of-month goal — if we get your help!
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=924%2E120351%2EvRMqs_)
Hey Peter — we’ll keep this short and sweet.
We just got out of a critical team meeting where we ran our monthly fundraising numbers and learned exactly where we’re at right now. **Here’s the truth:**
[**If just 71 of our supporters chip in $8 now, we’ll reach our end-of-month fundraising goal before our deadline at midnight tonight.**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3675?refcode=em-20230430-2&t=2&akid=924%2E120351%2EvRMqs_)
**Here’s another truth for you (****_this one’s pretty ugly_****):** There’s a LOT of money behind misinformation. Fox News and other bad actors like Joe Rogan want us to be divided and misinformed. It’s in their best interest to crush small independent newsrooms like COURIER. It’s why they attack us, Peter.
We take it as a sign we’re doing our job, but it’s important that we have the resources we need to continue fighting back against misinformation and to be able to continue providing the **truth** through our reporting.
**So think of it this way:** an $8 contribution works out to a dollar for each of our eight local newsrooms and powers our work to strengthen our democracy and fight back against bad information.
[**But our end-of-month fundraising deadline is closing in less than 7 hours, so will you chip in $8 or more right now to help us get there?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3675?refcode=em-20230430-2&t=3&akid=924%2E120351%2EvRMqs_)
**[Chip in $8 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3675?refcode=em-20230430-2&t=4&akid=924%2E120351%2EvRMqs_)**
**[Chip in $16 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3676?refcode=em-20230430-2&t=5&akid=924%2E120351%2EvRMqs_)**
**[Chip in $24 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3677?refcode=em-20230430-2&t=6&akid=924%2E120351%2EvRMqs_)**
**[Chip in $32 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3678?refcode=em-20230430-2&t=7&akid=924%2E120351%2EvRMqs_)**
**[Chip in another amount »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3679?refcode=em-20230430-2&t=8&akid=924%2E120351%2EvRMqs_)**
Thanks so much,
The COURIER Team

**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=9&refcode2=924_120351_vRMqs_&akid=924%2E120351%2EvRMqs_)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=924%2E120351%2EvRMqs_)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

clean_body: This is a critical moment for Pennsylvania. = Derek, this is a critical moment for Pennsylvania. On the state level, right-wing extremists are trying to take over the State House of Representatives so they can keep trying to rollback women’s freedom to choose. And on the national level, we know the GOP will spend millions in Pennsylvania to win back the White House and the Senate. But I promise you this: no matter what tricks far-right politicians try to pull, I will fight for every Pennsylvanian – regardless of what you look like, who you love, who you pray to or don’t pray to, or who you voted for. But it’s going to take all of us working together to stop the rising tide of extremism. So before midnight, will you chip in to help Team Shapiro fight and win the big fights ahead? name: John Fetterman
subject: A message from me + my body double
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
🕺🕺
#
Hi Derek, Senator John Fetterman here...or is it??
I’m back and feeling better than ever. But while I was in the hospital some fringey fringes online came up with a conspiracy that I have a body double. 🕺🕺
Look...my body double + I don’t appreciate these conspiracies. We have more important things to be focused on like increasing the minimum wage + protecting working families. In fact, we could *really* use your help.
**[Can you donate before TONIGHT’s end-of-month deadline to help us keep up our work in the Senate? We have a goal of raising $25,000 and we’re almost there...so maybe donate twice, one for me and one for my body double?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230430-1?refcode=em20230430-1-8356&refcode2=8356_434096_uMtcza&akid=8356%2E434096%2EuMtcza)** 😜
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230430-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230430-8356&refcode2=8356_434096_uMtcza&akid=8356%2E434096%2EuMtcza)**
Seriously, it would mean so much to me + my team if you could chip in even $5 before tonight’s big deadline. Thank you SO much for having my back(s).
💛 John

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230430-8356-footer&t=1&refcode2=8356_434096_uMtcza&akid=8356%2E434096%2EuMtcza)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8356%2E434096%2EuMtcza)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8356%2E434096%2EuMtcza)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Republicans' attacks on working Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
We must be louder than ever. |
#
---
Hey Peter, The first four months of this Republican-controlled House have shown just how out-of-touch the extreme GOP is with working Americans. It reached a head this week with the GOP Default on America Act, their budget that reflects their extreme policy priorities. They did not touch the Trump tax cuts for the wealthy. They did not touch defense spending. Instead, they voted to slash programs that hundreds of millions of Americans rely on: Medicaid, SNAP, child care, veterans’ care, housing, and so much more. **That is why it is more important than ever that we unite together to make our voices heard in the halls of Congress and at the ballot box.** Today is our important end-of-month fundraising deadline, so it is a perfect time to support my efforts to represent your voice in Congress and fight for everyday Americans. **If you’re able, I would deeply appreciate a contribution of any amount before tonight’s deadline so we can meet our end-of-month goal. Your support goes right to the heart of our work day in and day out, and I’m grateful for anything you can give. body:
Here's a quick update on our digital ads.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62569263/403885186/1844526888?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGJlNzViZS03ZWU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hByfiwuim4b88zAPen7Cux_GfZLxvdNI0lnEskPpukg=) Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw the news about our digital ads. **Crow’s right wing connections are well known** — including bankrolling lavish vacations for Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas and his wife Ginni Thomas, a far-right activist herself.

Last year **Sinema’s PAC received a contribution of $5,000 from Crow** , and in 2021, her campaign was even forced to **return $2,900 to Crow** after he exceeded federal contribution limits.
**Sinema has a long history of hobnobbing with shady, dark money billionaires** — we certainly know she’s more comfortable spending time with that set than with everyday Arizonans.
Time and again Sinema proves she’s more interested in prioritizing the needs of Wall Street and billionaires than her own constituents' needs. **That’s why we’re doing everything we can to get the message out to Arizonans: the 2024 cycle is quickly approaching and it’s going to be a tough one.**
****
**[Please chip in so we can let everyone know: Sinema sold out and we’re going to fight tooth and nail to replace her.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wU4jawxj4q-IkQLV2X7hAB8_XzSZaJoICzXnkB0po4kRzsjgjmpqGampvelgEDtnYaRFxBylojO-u1tGw69qMPotTjrKHWmwTKqOvryLFHHq4JKMRgS68LegK-7GA6_ndfc6df1eyeShkEgDzzNUSiafCzUkph6caC3f8M83j44S4PK0uQWflymrT4n5duvMyVqrJ6sRY8mCTxu2BnLoNWC5oJtEBHA2bdMRcyuzZrgUY0vvfN1Jx3XUQL50mqTYRBCnn8kCDqs9EbmCyIO0ULRctJFgLGgWeCj7MSo7DgwRaRuy3bgRny7JlkUtCElkg/3vs/2_XA0ogiRkOjBrXt-jmj1Q/h7/MQx5Eil7Xa1IobDWb0-1sQ77feoS1ipn3w6f_X9NRKw)**
Thanks for everything you do,
-Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024 PAC

name: Senator Heidi Campbell, Cyrus 2
subject: re: pushing for a bit more 📈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230430_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230430_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Peter,
I know that Sunday isn’t the best day to reach out, but I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this email from our campaign manager yesterday.
Today is our last day to fundraise before our April End of Month Fundraising Deadline. We’re still short of our grassroots target and we only have less than 12 HOURS left to catch up.
$5,196 NEEDED BEFORE MIDNIGHT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230430_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Peter, now is our best shot to match my opponents’ self-funded campaigns with people-powered support.
Peter, can you give any amount today so that we can put up our strongest fundraising numbers yet and continue funding our essential campaign operations like yard signs, door knocking, and phone banking? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230430_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly.DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20230430_em_fr_b1_HC_initial_]

With your grassroots support, we can ensure Nashville gets put first.
With gratitude,
Heidi
------Begin forwarded message------
Time: 4/29/2023 3:59 PM CST
From: Cyrus Shick, Campaign Manager
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Subject Line: pushing for a bit more 📈
Hi Peter, it’s Cyrus, Heidi’s campaign manager.
Heidi always inspires me and the rest of the folks on Team Campbell to push a little bit further. When she’s not fighting for us in the state legislature, she’s out knocking on doors, attending meet-and-greet events, and giving this campaign everything she's got.
To win Nashville’s most competitive race of 2023, it's going to require all of us to push a little bit further.
Peter, our first End of Month Fundraising Deadline is tomorrow at MIDNIGHT and we're not on pace to meet the remaining $9,627 of our goal right now. Will you chip in whatever you can to push us over the top? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230430_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
KEEP US PUSHING [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230430_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
I admire lots of things about Heidi, but the thing I admire the most is her commitment to defending Nashville from nonsensical statewide policies.
Heidi is the only candidate in this race who has already been a mayor, and she’s running to put Nashvillians first and keep our community healthy, affordable, and safe.
Heidi is exactly the sort of leader Nashville needs and deserves, Peter.
Peter, tomorrow at MIDNIGHT marks a really important moment in our race – the first End of Month Fundraising Deadline for our campaign – and we need every bit of people-power behind us. We need another $9,627 to meet our End of Month Fundraising Goal. Can you help us reach it with a contribution today? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230430_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
REACH OUR GOAL [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230430_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
With gratitude,
Cyrus, Campaign Manager
Campbell for Mayor
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230430_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230430_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor

clean_body: [] Peter, I know that Sunday isn’t the best day to reach out, but I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this email from our campaign manager yesterday. Today is our last day to fundraise before our April End of Month Fundraising Deadline. We’re still short of our grassroots target and we only have less than 12 HOURS left to catch up. $5,196 NEEDED BEFORE MIDNIGHT [] Peter, now is our best shot to match my opponents’ self-funded campaigns with people-powered support. Peter, can you give any amount today so that we can put up our strongest fundraising numbers yet and continue funding our essential campaign operations like yard signs, door knocking, and phone banking? >> [] If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly.DONATE $15 [] DONATE $35 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Another amount [] With your grassroots support, we can ensure Nashville gets put first. With gratitude, Heidi ------Begin forwarded message------ Time: 4/29/2023 3:59 PM CST From: Cyrus Shick, Campaign Manager To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Subject Line: pushing for a bit more 📈 Hi Peter, it’s Cyrus, Heidi’s campaign manager. Heidi always inspires me and the rest of the folks on Team Campbell to push a little bit further. When she’s not fighting for us in the state legislature, she’s out knocking on doors, attending meet-and-greet events, and giving this campaign everything she's got. To win Nashville’s most competitive race of 2023, it's going to require all of us to push a little bit further. Peter, our first End of Month Fundraising Deadline is tomorrow at MIDNIGHT and we're not on pace to meet the remaining $9,627 of our goal right now. Will you chip in whatever you can to push us over the top? [] KEEP US PUSHING [] I admire lots of things about Heidi, but the thing I admire the most is her commitment to defending Nashville from nonsensical statewide policies. Heidi is the only candidate in this race who has already been a mayor, and she’s running to put Nashvillians first and keep our community healthy, affordable, and safe. Heidi is exactly the sort of leader Nashville needs and deserves, Peter. Peter, tomorrow at MIDNIGHT marks a really important moment in our race – the first End of Month Fundraising Deadline for our campaign – and we need every bit of people-power behind us. We need another $9,627 to meet our End of Month Fundraising Goal. Can you help us reach it with a contribution today? >> [] REACH OUR GOAL [] With gratitude, Cyrus, Campaign Manager Campbell for Mayor Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill. [] As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves. Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment. Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote. Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream. Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023. Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to: Campbell for Mayor P.O. name: Kim Nguyen
subject: Black April
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | Today is the 48th anniversary of the fall of Saigon, which marked the end of the Vietnam War.

**For those in the Vietnamese community, this day is known as Black April. This was the day they lost their country. The fall of Saigon will forever be ingrained in the minds of the Vietnamese refugees and those who served.**

Black April led to the collapse of the Republic of Vietnam, the establishment of a one-party authoritarian state, and a humanitarian crisis that has forever changed our community.

After the fall of Saigon, millions of people fled Vietnam, finding refuge in the United States and in countries across the globe, including my father and his family. Hundreds of thousands died while trying to escape.

Today, we honor the sacrifice of those who served and remember all who lost their lives.

Thank you,

Kim

---
|
* * *
---
| **Democrat Kim Bernice Nguyen is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation.** The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. Now, she's running for Congress to reduce prescription drug costs, increase housing affordability, invest in working families, and strengthen our democracy.

subject: Kentuckians from all corners are rallying behind Andy.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
You can join the growing movement of grassroots supporters helping Andy win re-election. Peter,

We're thrilled to report that this election year has started on a strong note! Grassroots supporters have stepped up in a huge way to combat the outside spending that is inundating Kentucky and threatening Andy's re-election campaign. But now, we're facing another test of this campaign – our final pre-primary reporting deadline is on Monday.

**Since we first reached out about this important deadline, we are delighted to say that we have received immense support from Kentuckians from all corners of the Commonwealth:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62569924/403887354/833868747?refcode=em23_230430_dedln4_fndd_gq_act___BFT_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230430_dedln4_fndd_gq_act___BFT_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=cecf96db-80e7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWNmOTZkYi04MGU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38-jR8ogFegaF5S320oYvHtjsy8X3KLwN-VkTYQjNew=) [**You too can join this energized grassroots group by making a donation to help us prepare for the next stage of this election. | | Can I be blunt? Senate Republicans like to talk about "freedom" (guns, masks, taxes), but they're not actually interested in freedom. They're really looking to rip our freedoms away and force their decisions on other people—especially when it comes to the most personal and intimate things, like whether to become parents or what kind of birth control to choose. These decisions should be made by you, not judges and politicians. Anti-abortion senators, judges, and their silent allies have proven that they will do anything they can strip us of our rights. Now we have to prove that we will not stop fighting for our rights. **[We need to organize.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62570867/403890254/-641752998?refcode=2023-04-30-win-the-senate-kicker&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=212e8e90-81e7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTJlOGU5MC04MWU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MrJmA1LMrhqGCnuHd_uzUJ429WX7wAlU6auVqQxXelY=)** **We need to march.** **We need to vote.** **[We need to elect a pro-choice Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62570868/403890255/-641752998?refcode=2023-04-30-win-the-senate-kicker&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=212e8e90-81e7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTJlOGU5MC04MWU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MrJmA1LMrhqGCnuHd_uzUJ429WX7wAlU6auVqQxXelY=)** **We need to pass legislation guaranteeing reproductive rights.** **We need to nominate and confirm more judges committed to reproductive freedom and human rights.** I am committed to fighting for abortion rights. Gwen Moore shares this fight, tirelessly advocating for Wisconsin's workers. But we can't wait until 2024 to make change happen, Gwen's seat is crucial to retaining the Democratic House majority now. Her voice makes a difference for Wisconsin families, and we must amplify it. Join me in supporting Gwen's re-election campaign! Your contribution will create the grassroots movement Gwen needs to win, and any amount can make a difference. The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

Will you? Hi there, it’s Randy Bryce, the “Iron Stache” who took on Paul Ryan. I’ve fought my entire life to improve the livelihoods of working people as an iron worker, veteran, and candidate. Gwen Moore shares this fight, tirelessly advocating for Wisconsin's workers. But we can't wait until 2024 to make change happen, Gwen's seat is crucial to retaining the Democratic House majority now. Her voice makes a difference for Wisconsin families, and we must amplify it. Join me in supporting Gwen's re-election campaign! Your contribution will create the grassroots movement Gwen needs to win, and any amount can make a difference. = = [Donate] Thanks, my friend! Randy Bryce The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92. = | | | = | =| = ---|---|--- Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress P.O. body:
Judicial corruption revealed
| | | | |

| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf25a165a-0579-498e-bb0b-6267cf53f5b9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, [**BREAKING: Another Investigation Shows Yet More Supreme Court Corruption!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26a856ea-02e9-4fe2-a2d4-6e904db595be/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _The venality of the right-wing members of the Supreme Court is simply breathtaking._ _First, over the last month we learned of Clarence Thomas' superyacht trips, 500K vacation to Asia, etc, all paid for by creepy, racist-right-wing billionaire, Harlan Crow. He, of course, has business before the Court. _**_Crow even bought Clarence Thomas' mother's house so she could live in it mortgage free._** **_This week it was a land deal that netted Neil Gorsuch $500,000, where he didn't list a buyer. Turns out it was a partner at mega-corporate law firm Greenberg-Traurig, who have cases in front of him all the time._** _I'm sure Gorsuch just forgot._ **_Now, it's Brett Kavanaugh._**_ In breaking news in The Guardian, we learn what we all suspected. Read the key paragraph below:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T82cd33a2-3cf5-4f97-91f8-f72eaddd4bdf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Of course Grassley did. Total shocker._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T02568f8b-965c-40c9-a13a-ed91927c3161/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Folks, this is existential. _We MUST reform this filth-riddled chamber of ill-repute by adding judges to the Court. Otherwise, its authoritarian members will keep taking cash from rich right-wingers and inventing rights to block voting, take over a woman's body or allow 15-yr olds to buy assault rifles._** [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in the fight to take back the Supreme Court from corrupt zealots by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Demand Justice?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T04aeaf69-5fe6-4eb9-8f3f-2a614606d81c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for never accepting the corruption of our highest court._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6236f688-0347-4c99-836a-3cc24ef05a3e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

clean_body: Only a few hours left... | | | | | Our deadline is almost here, friend, We only have a FEW HOURS before our April Fundraising Deadline and our team is SO CLOSE to our goal! Before midnight tonight, we need to raise $643.50 to reach our April goal. Saying that this is urgent is an understatement, friend. The Democrats are already sizing up our campaign for the 2024 election, and if we miss our goal, we will only have a larger target on our backs. Help Team Kean fight off the Dems by rushing in a donation . Thank you, Madi Team Kean | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2023 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . Be sure to follow the campaign on , , , and . If you have any suggestions, comments, complaints, or feedback, please send your ideas to mailto:info@TomKean.com.

clean_body: | | | | Fellow American, Our end of month deadline is and I’ll be staying up to make sure we hit our goal. And while you don’t have to stay up with me, I do need you to take action before this critical deadline. My Senate seat is one of the majority deciders for 2024, and we can’t afford to miss a single goal in this razor-thin race. | | Thank you, Josh Hawley \--- Forward --- The Left has created a machine to try and solidify their power at an alarming rate, Fellow American. They took control of the media and big tech so all the next generation sees is their lies. Now, they’re taking advantage of it by getting millions of Americans to buy into their socialist agenda. I know you’re too smart to fall for their plan, but not everyone is as in-the-know as you, so it’s up to patriots like US to reveal the TRUTH. But right now, we’re running out of time. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

| | Today is the last day of the month and we want to tell you a little bit of what Rick has been up to this month. Just last week, Rick announced his efforts to help NOAA bring more than $37 million in funding to Northwest Washington. These funds will be used for eight new climate projects and will be a source of new green jobs in our district. Rick has also been working with community members and local leaders to identify important projects in Northwest Washington. So far, these investments include improvements to roads and bridges, water and flood protection, community services, and education. **This is not flashy stuff that wins you stardom on cable news. But it creates jobs right here in our communities. Jobs that support families. And that is what really matters.** Of course, it only happens because we have built a grassroots team that stands with Rick every step of the way. **[Can you chip in $5 before midnight to help Rick build the grassroots team he needs to power our campaign to victory once clean_body: | | | | Today is the last day of the month and we want to tell you a little bit of what Rick has been up to this month. Just last week, Rick announced his efforts to help NOAA bring more than $37 million in funding to Northwest Washington. These funds will be used for eight new climate projects and will be a source of new green jobs in our district. Rick has also been working with community members and local leaders to identify important projects in Northwest Washington. So far, these investments include improvements to roads and bridges, water and flood protection, community services, and education. This is not flashy stuff that wins you stardom on cable news. But it creates jobs right here in our communities. Jobs that support families. And that is what really matters. Of course, it only happens because we have built a grassroots team that stands with Rick every step of the way. = It is because of grassroots supporters like you that Rick can keep up the good work in Congress. Team Larsen | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen PO Box 326 Everett, WA 98206 United States Email is an important way for Rick Larsen to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

poll closing at midnight
| | **BREAKING: Congressional Republicans Attack DC Sovereignty as Democrats Renew Push for Statehood**
---
The MAGA GOP knows that DC Statehood would almost certainly mean TWO more Democratic Senators, so they’re doing everything in their power to KILL the bill!

If we’re going to have any chance of fighting back, we need to demonstrate MASSIVE grassroots support for DC Statehood! **Please, respond now:**

[**Do you support DC Statehood?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v2/?source=VPP_20230430_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=7412%2E878179%2E5U2cGI)

*** PLEASE RESPOND BEFORE 11:59 PM TONIGHT OR YOUR ANSWER WILL AUTOMATICALLY BE MARKED “ NO.” ***
* * *
Listen, not only would DC Statehood give hundreds of thousands of people much-needed representation in Congress, _it could SAVE our slim Senate majority!_

Republicans are TERRIFIED — so they’re launching vicious attacks to shut down any chance we have of making DC Statehood a reality.

**We need 5,000 loyal Democrats to respond by MIDNIGHT:**
[**Do you support DC Statehood?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/DCStatehoodPoll_v2/?source=VPP_20230430_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=7412%2E878179%2E5U2cGI)

Thank you,

name: Jon Tester
subject: the most vulnerable senator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I’m so grateful for your help, and for all that we’ve been able to accomplish as a result.

| Peter,

I’m sure your inbox is flooded with messages about the upcoming end-of-month fundraising deadline, but I want to take a minute to say something different: **I want to tell you how grateful I am that you’re part of this grassroots team.**

Without you, I wouldn’t have been elected as the Senate’s only seven-fingered dirt farmer, and I definitely wouldn’t have won reelection in a state Donald Trump carried twice.

I’m so grateful for your help, and for all that we’ve been able to accomplish as a result: we’ve invested in infrastructure and education. We’ve lowered health care costs. We’ve fought back against inflation and helped working families get the support they need — whether they live on a farm like me or in a big city.

You helped make all of this possible — thank you.

**But there is still work to be done.** Hardworking families are still struggling to stay afloat, and small businesses are still fighting to survive. And instead of working to actually solve these problems, national politicians are proposing dumb-as-rocks ideas like a national sales tax. I’m running for reelection because Montanans have worked too hard these past few years to let the GOP take us backward.

So I need to thank you in advance for supporting my reelection campaign. We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and I sure as hell don’t want to face this alone.

**I’m the most vulnerable senator up for reelection next year, and if we’re going to win, it’ll take all of us working together — just like we always do.

[_I’m personally asking: Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress ahead of tonight’s end-of-month fundraising deadline and help keep me in the Senate delivering for Montana?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62571916/403892784/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230429-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkYWE2NjE0LTg3ZTctZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EfwHBxdJYDkrW9F9QOxJeeCtoPiobhYAycmSIuzbrK8=)**

clean_body: I’m so grateful for your help, and for all that we’ve been able to accomplish as a result. | Peter, I’m sure your inbox is flooded with messages about the upcoming end-of-month fundraising deadline, but I want to take a minute to say something different: I want to tell you how grateful I am that you’re part of this grassroots team. Without you, I wouldn’t have been elected as the Senate’s only seven-fingered dirt farmer, and I definitely wouldn’t have won reelection in a state Donald Trump carried twice. I’m so grateful for your help, and for all that we’ve been able to accomplish as a result: we’ve invested in infrastructure and education. We’ve lowered health care costs. We’ve fought back against inflation and helped working families get the support they need — whether they live on a farm like me or in a big city. You helped make all of this possible — thank you. But there is still work to be done. Hardworking families are still struggling to stay afloat, and small businesses are still fighting to survive. And instead of working to actually solve these problems, national politicians are proposing dumb-as-rocks ideas like a national sales tax. I’m running for reelection because Montanans have worked too hard these past few years to let the GOP take us backward. So I need to thank you in advance for supporting my reelection campaign. We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and I sure as hell don’t want to face this alone. I’m the most vulnerable senator up for reelection next year, and if we’re going to win, it’ll take all of us working together — just like we always do. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks again for everything. — Jon * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. name: Lexi Schiff
subject: Meet my dad, Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2159%2E5257348%2Ef--PCK ]Adam Schiff for Senate

I’ve looked up to my dad my whole life,
Derek.

He’s always had a really big heart.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230430_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2159%2E5257348%2Ef--PCK ]Lexi as a child with her father, Adam Schiff.”

And while you might think of him as Congressman, Representative, or just
Adam — to me, he’s dad. And I’m his daughter Lexi! His smartest, funniest,
most fashionable... and only daughter.

After all these years, he hasn’t changed.

Not after he was elected to Congress.

Not after managing Trump’s impeachment and facing the right wing’s
attacks.

Not now that he’s running for Senate — he’s just having the same
conversations about our democracy, our ideals and our values that we’ve
had around the dinner table for the last 20 years.

My dad is the same incredibly earnest, dad-joke telling guy who loves his
family and his country. He's the kind of dad who held me up to the
microphone to speak at a 4th of July parade when I was just a toddler
begging him to "tell them about me!" (I still do that).

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230430_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2159%2E5257348%2Ef--PCK ]Lexi as a child with her father, Adam Schiff, at a 4th of July event.”

He's also the guy who kept a relaxed enough atmosphere in a congressional
campaign office that a kid like me could play with the telephones. A lot.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230430_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2159%2E5257348%2Ef--PCK ]Lexi as a child at Adam's campaign office.”

He's a really great dad! (And now that he’s running a statewide campaign
in California, I am sure he is STRESSING, even though he would never show
it.)

Running for office is a big task. But it's always been clear to me why my
dad does it. Growing up, he would tell us stories about the people he'd
met from his district and their concerns about their jobs, their families,
and all of the things that they wanted to be different in our country —
that mattered most to them.

My first thought hearing those stories as a kid was always that it must be
so hard to listen to those stories every day and have people expect so
much from you as just one person. But my dad would always tell us that it
was the best part of the job. The chance to hear people's struggles and
honest concerns and work to fix them - and make their lives better.

That's what truly and genuinely motivates him at his core — and that’s
what I know he will bring to the Senate, if we can elect him there. The
humanity and the unrelenting passion to change people's lives for the
better, and make our country and our world a better place to live in.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=apr2023_abs_em.S8d4Hr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230430_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2159%2E5257348%2Ef--PCK ]So before my dad’s fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, I would
really appreciate it if you could make a contribution (and let him get
back to spending some time with my mom, Eve). What do you
say, Derek?
Can you chip in $10 to my dad’s campaign before midnight?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=apr2023_abs_em.O2ILzB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230430_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2159%2E5257348%2Ef--PCK ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=apr2023_abs_em.c2HEr4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230430_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2159%2E5257348%2Ef--PCK ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=apr2023_abs_em.2RUxgc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230430_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2159%2E5257348%2Ef--PCK ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=apr2023_abs_em.i2ayRH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230430_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2159%2E5257348%2Ef--PCK ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=apr2023_abs_em.1_b9xO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230430_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2159%2E5257348%2Ef--PCK ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230430_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=2159%2E5257348%2Ef--PCK ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks for hearing me out. I know you don’t usually get emails like this,
but his campaign team said I could write what I wanted! And share some
corny anecdotes about my dad with you. Here’s another adorable baby
picture of me before you go:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230430_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=2159%2E5257348%2Ef--PCK ]Lexi as a child with her father, Adam Schiff, and mother Eve at a 4th of
July parade.”

xx Lexi

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=apr2023_abs_em.jChiIi&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230430_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=2159%2E5257348%2Ef--PCK ]DONATE MONTHLY

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

name: Jon Tester
subject: personally asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and I sure as hell don’t want to face this alone.

| Peter,

I’m sure your inbox is flooded with messages about the upcoming end-of-month fundraising deadline, but I want to take a minute to say something different: **I want to tell you how grateful I am that you’re part of this grassroots team.**

Without you, I wouldn’t have been elected as the Senate’s only seven-fingered dirt farmer, and I _definitely_ wouldn’t have won reelection in a state Donald Trump carried twice.

I’m so grateful for your help, and for all that we’ve been able to accomplish as a result: we’ve invested in infrastructure and education. We’ve lowered health care costs. We’ve fought back against inflation and helped working families get the support they need — whether they live on a farm like me or in a big city.

_You_ helped make all of this possible — thank you.

**But there is still work to be done.** Hardworking families are still struggling to stay afloat, and small businesses are still fighting to survive. And instead of working to actually solve these problems, national politicians are proposing dumb-as-rocks ideas like a national sales tax. I’m running for reelection because Montanans have worked too hard these past few years to let the GOP take us backward.

So I need to thank you in advance for supporting my reelection campaign. We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and I sure as hell don’t want to face this alone.

**I’m the most vulnerable senator up for reelection next year, and if we’re going to win, it’ll take all of us working together — just like we always do.**

[_**I’m personally asking: Can I count on you to split what you can between me and BACKROADS PAC ahead of tonight’s April fundraising deadline and help keep me in the Senate delivering for Montana?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62572023/403892990/1999187487?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230430-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGQyNzY4NS04N2U3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5FMQtIcbPO3FZjE5q0juVU8VzZ-ODVdtP4vt7rZNSs=)

name: Amanda Nichols
subject: Bernie's plan for a 4-day workweek!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
Peter Willis,

Over the last few decades, worker
productivity has soared, but all that extra wealth we created went right
to the top. As CEOs and shareholders hoarded the gains, our pay stayed
stagnant causing wealth inequality to explode to record levels.

That's why, as Chair of the HELP Committee, Bernie Sanders has introduced
a plan to implement a 4-day workweek after an extensive study showed
companies were more profitable and workers were happier.

Big Business and their lobbyists don't want workers to get the rewards of
their productivity and are fighting Bernie's proposal with everything they
have.

name: Stefanie
subject: this is a big moment, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |

Friend, it's Kirsten's finance director, Stefanie. Did you see Kirsten's email about her end-of-month goal?
We saw a huge surge in grassroots donations after Kirsten reached out to top supporters like you earlier today. That bump helped us cover some serious ground, but since then donations have slowed to a trickle.
**There are just a few short hours left until Kirsten's midnight deadline, and right now we're projected to fall about $1,378 short of her $30,000 goal.**
This is our first major deadline since President Biden announced his reelection campaign. With the Senate and the White House on the line in 2024, it's absolutely crucial that we show strength here. **[So please, if you're ready to defend our Senate majority, will you answer Kirsten's call and rush a donation of $5 or more? We're counting on your gift before midnight tonight to make up the gap here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62578888/403919206/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4091-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWExNmQ1Yy1hOWU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AH8CsWc1ttBsNuEavaXczEFlOyyn59sblTjb0bx_nIo=)**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. clean_body: | | | Friend, it's Kirsten's finance director, Stefanie. Did you see Kirsten's email about her end-of-month goal? We saw a huge surge in grassroots donations after Kirsten reached out to top supporters like you earlier today. That bump helped us cover some serious ground, but since then donations have slowed to a trickle. There are just a few short hours left until Kirsten's midnight deadline, and right now we're projected to fall about $1,378 short of her $30,000 goal. This is our first major deadline since President Biden announced his reelection campaign. With the Senate and the White House on the line in 2024, it's absolutely crucial that we show strength here. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks so much, Stefanie | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

| | Team,

Since starting Districts for Democracy, we’ve seen a surge in momentum for our fight to keep culture wars out of our schools.

Protecting our children’s freedom to learn and our teachers’ freedom to teach is still fortunately a unifying cause in America. **But MAGA extremists are infiltrating every corner of the nation, and have enough funding to do serious harm to our kids. If we fail to act now, the damage may be irreversible.**

[It’s almost the end of April. As these attacks on our children grow more relentless, we must fight back even harder. From banning books about Rosa Parks, to defunding public libraries . . . MAGA extremists will keep scoring local victories unless we organize to fight back. Wherever people committed to freedom of expression have done that, we have prevailed.

We absolutely cannot afford to lose our momentum now. It’s time we stand up for the ideals we’ve taught our children to cherish, and keep partisan culture wars out of their lives – once and for all.

[Pitch in $10 today to ensure our country stands up for our children and their right to fair, uncensored education.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62572625/403895294/1647013030?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230430_FR_EOM_0_DistrictsforDemocracy_NA_NA_EOM&refcode2=0a69fd83-89e7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTY5ZmQ4My04OWU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uW8bAlZ2Seayx7Ox85OOmTHpiawa0LAi3O7ipiJHnIc=)

Thank you,

Districts for Democracy
* * *
| Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States.

clean_body: | | Team, Since starting Districts for Democracy, we’ve seen a surge in momentum for our fight to keep culture wars out of our schools. Protecting our children’s freedom to learn and our teachers’ freedom to teach is still fortunately a unifying cause in America. But MAGA extremists are infiltrating every corner of the nation, and have enough funding to do serious harm to our kids. If we fail to act now, the damage may be irreversible. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = From banning books about Rosa Parks, to defunding public libraries . . . MAGA extremists will keep scoring local victories unless we organize to fight back. Wherever people committed to freedom of expression have done that, we have prevailed. We absolutely cannot afford to lose our momentum now. It’s time we stand up for the ideals we’ve taught our children to cherish, and keep partisan culture wars out of their lives – once and for all. = Thank you, Districts for Democracy * | Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States. = = Paid for by Districts for Democracy Districts for Democracy P.O. Box 01 Ringoes, NJ 08851-0001 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

name: Greg Stanton
subject: I’m asking personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friends –

It's Greg. Look, it’s starting to feel like Groundhog Day because, at the end of every month, I have to reach out because we’re falling short of our fundraising goal.

Well, this month is no different: I'm writing to you personally because we are just hours away from our end-of-month deadline, and we still need to raise $3,215 to meet our goal. Will you chip in using this link?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gs-april23-eom?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.30_b1_gs_all&amount=25

If you want to help me avoid this last-minute outreach in the future, consider making a monthly recurring donation with this link. Doing so helps us plan our budget and avoid falling short at the last minute.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gs-april23-eom?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.30_b1_gs_all&amount=25&recurring=1

Thank you for being a part of this journey. Together, we can make a difference.

Best,

Greg

-------------- Paid for by Stanton for Congress
Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix, AZ 85018
United States

Kirsten's opponent is a dangerous extremist trying to pass himself off as a moderate. Last time, he outspent us 6:1. This time will be different.
