* * *
**TO: Rep. George Santos**
**FROM: Add your name**
Dear Rep. George Santos,

I’m SICK and TIRED of your misinformation, lies, and constant scandals.

American working families need REAL support, but you’re too busy playing politics and covering up your potential crimes!!

[That’s why I’m calling on you to RESIGN NOW and gladly chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to remove MAGA extremists like YOU from public office »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44186?t=9&akid=7413%2E878179%2EpLWLwq)
[**DONATE $3 AND SIGN MY NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44186?t=10&akid=7413%2E878179%2EpLWLwq)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ryan=20Chamberlin=20for=20State=20Representative?=
subject: Why the Radical Left Hope Republicans Won’t Vote in the Special Election
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/voteryanchamberlin/conservative-businessman-ryan-chamberlin-475337?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | | **THE ELECTION CLOCK IS TICKING!**
---
| Hey Everybody - hope you all had a great week. **We have begun the countdown.** Only _**two more weekends**_**** until Election Day. ** It is critically important that every Republican get out and vote. ** This week, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris announced that they are running for re-election, and already Democrats in Florida are trying to use this campaign as a bellwether for their strength. Does that mean they think they can win? Of course not. **But they are hoping that Republican turnout won’t be very high so that they can sell the national press a bill of goods.** They will say that Republican turnout in Florida State House District 24 was flat and that it is an indication of no intensity among the conservative base.

You and I both know that is not true and would be a fabrication, but **we can take that entire message away from the radical left if we will just make the effort to get out and vote** and send another ally of Governor DeSantis to Tallahassee to help **keep us the Free State of Florida**.

**I am looking forward to serving you in Tallahassee, and our strong conservative message of lower property taxes, stronger measures against illegal immigration, and zero tolerance for woke ideology in our classrooms is resonating with the voters. **
---
|
---
| **Just this week, my fellow conservatives Speaker Paul Renner, Tax Collector George Albright, and Senator Dennis Baxley endorsed our campaign. Next week, we will be announcing even more.**

Together, let’s win this seat and keep Florida strong.

Sincerely,

P.S. Don’t be fooled by the Democrats. Many of them are saying that it is a foregone conclusion that we are going to win and are trying to make it seem like they don’t care. What they are hoping for is that conservatives won’t take this election seriously and give them something to talk about in the national press. **Let’s turn out the vote and win!**
---
| | **IMPORTANT VOTING INFORMATION**
---
| **Special General Election**

Only registered voters who live within House District 24 are eligible to vote in this election.

Voter Registration Deadline: April 17, 2023

Early Voting: May 6, 2023, to May 13, 2023, Sites open from 10 AM to 6 PM

Mail Ballot Request Deadline: May 6, 2023, by 5 PM
Mail ballots must be received by the Supervisor of Elections office by 7 PM Election Day to be counted

**Election Day: May 16, 2023 - Polls open from 7 AM to 7 PM **

---
| [LEARN MORE ABOUT ME AT MY WEBSITE](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=c05f254fa1&e=d1c1b9864f "LEARN MORE ABOUT ME AT MY WEBSITE")
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._
Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative526 E Park AveTallahassee, FL 32301-2568
[Add us to your address book](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/vcard?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=a8f6c3d1d4) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=a8f6c3d1d4).

---

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=21d33cb0f94743b5b319225f62fb84a4&_e=ZTTlvYiEVG4zQI3ptJ1aRAfZ57ZiOTiq_vK7qlGb3ZPvmCm-D8ktWNVRUb3Z32kRU4u-EPCOSH6iF74RUosPyRIwWTWuSaLxX8eOagAGbHpMZ9a9ClxIfflcXeBCTJp3qFFyiO3rf6EZsD-9T2aXb5LM8pfxe4bJ4wALuIkiYOze6CkZP6X5oETUGDjCBrka2s8ePkqBco-NndQqxDFt6c_FVaABujkIEv0hvDgUseAmz9z6fXHRNFwOw5LStkj71whhVlldz3MxR4HKUMHnNJHBFPPN8sDQez_J3qtlkM1EbLmbCyWv_HTHYlLbjKntxy2hsMVw-bBAIq1VFn26mRKv5tLfIdkw1ekamwVX6KXr09tJt9TOaopTnCyFVRJr8jDR_LpdWEzqWEpTRYnCHbNepuuRB5FTyJP_csDB9-8%3D)

Text messages and emails can be incessant, trust me, I know. Unfortunately, in today’s political environment, **if we’re not sending digital fundraising solicitations, Republicans will never have a competitive edge over Democrats again.**

If every Republican member of the House were to stop raising funds for reelection tomorrow,**we’d be all but guaranteed to lose the House to Democrats in the next election.** Not only would Democrats win the majority outright, but they’d also hold onto it for the foreseeable future.

My team and I are dedicating every waking hour of the day to ensure our campaign, as well as the campaigns of my colleagues, **[have the necessary funds to ward off any challenger in upcoming election.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=21d33cb0f94743b5b319225f62fb84a4&_e=ZTTlvYiEVG4zQI3ptJ1aRAfZ57ZiOTiq_vK7qlGb3ZPvmCm-D8ktWNVRUb3Z32kRU4u-EPCOSH6iF74RUosPyRIwWTWuSaLxX8eOagAGbHpMZ9a9ClxIfflcXeBCTJp3qFFyiO3rf6EZsD-9T2aXb5LM8pfxe4bJ4wALuIkiYOze6CkZP6X5oETUGDjCBrka2s8ePkqBco-NndQqxDFt6c_FVaABujkIEv0hvDgUseAmz9z6fXHRNFwOw5LStkj71whhVlldz3MxR4HKUMHnNEWv7ToPfAabIfw_5r2n8WBzyVaJDWLMmJbq_vlxRQavmkWxvXBVmpKxJS4hdWeMRv2EfTFG1DYRQ0FkX0JZSi9zLfPqPXAeTVCr7mlJMsuFOP2jTwqv5m1YOVKsyO_0R0AHNaqQrpqYKUe_mns2TRk%3D)**

It's somehow already the end of April, meaning there are more than four months of fundraising that have come and gone, putting us four months closer to Election Day. It went fast, didn't it? Without a strong outpouring of support toda**y,[we’re all but assured to miss our monthly fundraising goal](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=21d33cb0f94743b5b319225f62fb84a4&_e=ZTTlvYiEVG4zQI3ptJ1aRAfZ57ZiOTiq_vK7qlGb3ZPvmCm-D8ktWNVRUb3Z32kRU4u-EPCOSH6iF74RUosPyRIwWTWuSaLxX8eOagAGbHpMZ9a9ClxIfflcXeBCTJp3qFFyiO3rf6EZsD-9T2aXb5LM8pfxe4bJ4wALuIkiYOze6CkZP6X5oETUGDjCBrka2s8ePkqBco-NndQqxDFt6c_FVaABujkIEv0hvDgUseAmz9z6fXHRNFwOw5LStkj71whhVlldz3MxR4HKUMHnNDjkjbmhPO0u4LAOLmS1J31fCdPw3kvfOXxFzi6XEYrMq9LhfYDr2FWWfulaM1wvO8RvqViWuLSOETYqUxZYiOWaK16ns-LWNCfo0UB7cTmWYtW6t1s23t34DzD26EmJh8cQywfZotxqjBdbXeVZ5A4%3D)**.

**Please, don't let that happen to us.**

I don’t want to miss our goal, and I don’t think you want Republicans to continue to be outraised every month either.**If you can spare $2 right now, will you click the link below and generously make a gift today?** [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=21d33cb0f94743b5b319225f62fb84a4&_e=ZTTlvYiEVG4zQI3ptJ1aRAfZ57ZiOTiq_vK7qlGb3ZPvmCm-D8ktWNVRUb3Z32kRU4u-EPCOSH6iF74RUosPyRIwWTWuSaLxX8eOagAGbHpMZ9a9ClxIfflcXeBCTJp3qFFyiO3rf6EZsD-9T2aXb5LM8pfxe4bJ4wALuIkiYOze6CkZP6X5oETUGDjCBrka2s8ePkqBco-NndQqxDFt6c_FVaABujkIEv0hvDgUseAmz9z6fXHRNFwOw5LStkj71whhVlldz3MxR4HKUMHnNIhA8SvLXo04H2V5bfCvkJw0F-EEn_j8W0mbbP9CXNgJrRxk0HGInhwL9ygn-7JRIXn6-7sdWQ0aQD3q08DmWChFS0NXFD003mzxqFWYz9gMa6IlCyFWUQ-UdUbuBa-Wg4QO2V3H0M4Bq9FI9UppMRc%3D)

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

The fight ahead will be incredibly difficult, and with National Republicans aiming to flip this seat, we can’t afford to rest on our laurels. name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Counting on you tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
With your support, we can reach our goal Peter,

In just one moment, I'm going to ask you to chip in to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal. But first, I'm going to tell you why we need your support.

Last month, the NRCC listed my seat as one of the top targets of their campaign to expand their narrow House majority. This news came after a Republican challenger announced their campaign against me.

We can expect to once again face millions of dollars in attacks, and it's only a matter of time before more opponents start jumping into this race. We need to be prepared for the tough road ahead.

With your support, we’ve withstood their attacks time and time again. That’s why I know that for us to build another campaign capable of protecting this seat, I’ll need to count on you once more.

**With just hours left to go before our midnight deadline, can I count on you to chip in to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal? With your support, we can defend this seat and retake the House majority in 2024 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-april23-eom](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62579311/403920950/-476631296?refcode=em23_230430_EOM5_fnd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230430_EOM5_fnd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=19bfa1c3-aae7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOWJmYTFjMy1hYWU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F-eTtOu4oRR5TdCaRfwkSegYrnHvtchNc8NnvqnVgUI=)**

We can expect to once again face millions of dollars in attacks, and it's only a matter of time before more opponents start jumping into this race. We need to be prepared for the tough road ahead. With your support, we’ve withstood their attacks time and time again. That’s why I know that for us to build another campaign capable of protecting this seat, I’ll need to count on you once more. With just hours left to go before our midnight deadline, can I count on you to chip in to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal? With your support, we can defend this seat and retake the House majority in 2024 >> = Thank you, Kim | Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: 2024 is right around the corner
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
This week, President Biden announced his re-election bid, and I am excited to support him and to help make the case to people at home, across the state, and across the country to send him back to the White House to continue the work.
House Republicans made the case themselves this week, threatening to default on America's bills for the first time in history unless their demands are met. They effectively issued a ransom note, passing a bill with massive spending cuts that will hurt people across the country. By refusing to act now to prevent a default–as Congress has time and again, including three times under President Trump–they are threatening an economic disaster that will devastate Americans across the country and playing politics rather than governing responsibly.
Each week, we see how important it is that we take back the House, gain ground in the Senate, and hold on to the White House.
And our campaign will play an important part. That’s why we are working as hard as ever to do our part, and that means hitting the goals we set.
Our next end-of-month deadline is tonight. If you can help us hit it, we can stay on track, and lead the efforts here in Texas that will impact the country. Any amount you can contribute will make a difference, so thanks for considering it. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230430?refcode=folf230430_2]

Together, we can do anything,

If you choose to donate to our campaign today, it’s something I’ll never forget. Thanks Joe | If you would like to unsubscribe from emails like these, Paid for by Biden for President.

name: Tedra Cobb
subject: I hate to bother you on a Sunday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Electing more rural Democrats and taking back the House are our top priorities as we get ready for the year ahead, but we can’t do it alone.

| Peter,

I hate to bother you on a Sunday, so I’ll keep this short.

Our April fundraising deadline is tonight, but we still haven’t met our goal. I know it may not seem like fundraising matters right now, especially since the 2024 elections are so far away, but the work we do now in these early stages of the election cycle will allow us to build a strong foundation and help us win big next year.

Electing more rural Democrats and taking back the House are our top priorities as we get ready for the year ahead, but we can’t do it alone.

subject: You there?

body:
| | I know your inbox is probably flooded with end-of-month fundraising appeals, so I apologize in advance — but I had to check-in.

**Our fight is impossible without your support. **Every day we are seeing escalated attacks on our students, teachers, and librarians. Districts for Democracy is on a mission to stop MAGA extremists from censoring what our children are taught about American history, civics, science, and human relationships.

We must finish this month strong, and to do that — I need your help.

Can you chip in $10 right now? Here’s a personalized link to use:

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfd-2304](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62580425/403924070/1647013030?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230430pm_FR_EOM_0_TomMalinowski_NA_NA_EOM&refcode2=ccebd3a2-afe7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2ViZDNhMi1hZmU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zzBTp-3hu09e1491Q3mRlimxI6LahlGIIsQFKFCdyVg=)

Thank you,

Tom Malinowski

| | **Grassroots supporters like you are protecting free and fair elections in Georgia and across the country ahead of the 2024 election. If you’re able, will you chip in $27.13 or whatever makes sense right now before our end-of-month fundraising deadline tonight?** **Chip in here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ff-apr23-em/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62580495/403924263/87239263?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230430_f_eom3_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTcwMTdkNS1hZmU3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WwGrQMngZyWY3Fgcz_nuN2-wa9WJ_TBS_LaIPtT4VIY=)** Right now, we’re hours away from our end-of-month fundraising deadline and the entire Fair Fight team is putting our energy into not only meeting, but exceeding, our goal. There are many reasons why chipping in before our deadline is important, but here’s what’s top of mind for me right now: Across the country, extremist Republicans are preparing for 2024 by attempting to roll back voting rights protections and suppress the voices of voters. Since the 2020 election and the 2021 runoff solidified Georgia as a swing state, we can predict that it will remain on the frontline of these voter suppression attacks. Anti-democracy conspiracy theorists have doubled down on their commitment to meddling in our elections and consolidating their power. It will take a unified coalition to fight back — and that’s the work that Fair Fight is committed to doing right now. But the amount of early support that we raise now will determine just how vigorously we can fight by the time the 2024 election really ramps up. So I’m asking: Can you please make a donation before our April fundraising deadline tonight to protect the freedom to vote and make sure every eligible voter can register to vote, cast a ballot, and have that ballot counted in this critical election? name: Eric (iPhone)
subject: Why now?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
I refuse to let MAGA Republicans make a mockery of our Congress.
Team,
I wanted to reach out to you just before this midnight deadline. While we made great strides this month, we need one last surge of donations so my team and I can feel good about where we stand going into May.
Look, MAGA Republicans are angry that I haven’t backed down after getting booted from the House Intelligence Committee. Instead, I’ve been at their throats and holding them accountable for their disgraceful attempts at glossing over the January 6th insurrection, fueling blatant anti-semitism, and destroying our democracy.
**That’s why now more than ever, we need to show them that I’m not backing down — and I refuse to let them try to single-handedly make a mockery of our Congress.**
Chip in any amount you can so they know they don’t stand a chance at holding the House in 2024. name: Helen Gym
subject: the poll, the attacks, and our deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]
Hi , I'm reaching out to respectfully ask if you’d chip in before my last end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight. The first public poll of our race just came out showing me in a five-way statistical tie, but I know if we stand together, we’ll win and deliver the transformative change Philadelphians need.

Here’s your personal link: actblue.com/donate/hhg-personal?supporter=dpwillis67@gmail.com [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-personal]

Long before I was a candidate for office, I was a mom and a public school teacher. I never planned on getting into politics.

But I couldn’t stand on the sidelines when I saw what happens when a political system goes wrong: schools and libraries closed, people evicted from their homes, communities subject to violence, workers denied living wages. I kept seeing the people in power walk away at the first sight of hard problems, but giving up on this city was never an option for me. So I got to work myself, and for 30 years, I’ve been taking on the issues others called impossible to solve.

And I haven’t been alone. I’ve spent most of my life working directly with people, building strong coalitions, and getting results.

Together, we restored nurses and counselors to schools, created an eviction diversion program that kept thousands of families in their homes, guaranteed stable schedules for 130,000 hourly workers, and launched our city’s first mental health mobile crisis response unit.

Now, I’m running for Mayor to continue the fight we began together 30 years ago. But we’re facing a historically crowded field of candidates, and last week, a shady group connected to a far-right billionaire started attacking me on Philly TV stations.

So here’s that personal donation link again: actblue.com/donate/hhg-personal?supporter=dpwillis67@gmail.com [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-personal]

Our city is in a critical moment, but I know we have the capacity to rise to it — not by tinkering around the edges, but by working together to deliver solutions as big as the problems. However you choose to support us, your contribution is incredibly appreciated.

Thank you, and have a happy Sunday night.

— Helen
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-feb2023]
Friends of Helen Gym
PO Box 11766
Philadelphia, PA 19101
United States
www.helengym.com [https://www.helengym.com/] | info@helengym.com [info@helengym.com]
Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe.
